Abstract: Explicit reconstruction constraints derived from the decoupled representation are further imposed to suppress abnormal channel amplification and chromatic noise. Experiments on LOLv2-Real, MIT-Adobe FiveK, and LSRW show that the proposed method achieves competitive or superior quantitative and visual performance, reaching 29.71 dB PSNR and 0.89 SSIM on LOLv2-Real. DarkFace experiments further indicate improved downstream face detection under low-light conditions. Code and pretrained models are available at: https://github.com/mubaisam/ICD.

</details>


### [185] [AutoFocus: Uncertainty-Aware Active Visual Search for GUI Grounding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02630)
*Ruilin Yao,Shegnwu Xiong,Tianyu Zou,Shili Xiong,Yi Rong*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了AutoFocus框架，通过不确定性感知的主动视觉搜索来解决GUI grounding中的分辨率差距问题，利用坐标生成的token级困惑度来建模空间不确定性，无需训练即可提升高分辨率界面上的定位性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前视觉语言模型在GUI grounding任务中面临分辨率差距问题：现代显示器的高分辨率界面包含密集布局和小型交互元素，而模型输入尺寸有限。现有的放大策略（固定锚点、启发式网格、强化学习）缺乏自适应确定何处需要细化以及探索多少空间不确定性的原则性机制。

Method: AutoFocus是一个无需训练、不确定性感知的主动视觉搜索框架。核心洞察：坐标生成的token级困惑度自然反映空间不确定性。方法：1) 采样多个坐标假设，将其轴向困惑度转换为各向异性高斯空间概率场，显式建模方向不确定性；2) 基于该概率场生成全局和局部区域提案；3) 引入形状感知缩放来平衡精确定位和上下文保留；4) 通过视觉提示聚合步骤进行结构化比较，选择最一致的预测。

Result: 在ScreenSpot-Pro和ScreenSpot-V2数据集上的广泛实验表明，AutoFocus在通用和GUI专用视觉语言模型上都取得了持续改进。

Conclusion: AutoFocus通过利用坐标生成过程中的不确定性信号，提供了一种原则性的自适应放大机制，有效解决了高分辨率GUI grounding中的分辨率差距问题，无需额外训练即可提升现有模型的性能。

Abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have enabled autonomous GUI agents that translate natural language instructions into executable screen coordinates. However, grounding performance degrades in high-resolution interfaces, where dense layouts and small interactive elements expose a resolution gap between modern displays and model input constraints. Existing zoom-in strategies rely on fixed anchors, heuristic grids, or reinforcement learning, lacking a principled mechanism to adaptively determine where refinement is needed and how much spatial uncertainty should be explored. We propose AutoFocus, a training-free, uncertainty-aware active visual search framework for GUI grounding. Our key insight is that token-level perplexity in coordinate generation naturally reflects spatial uncertainty. Rather than committing to a single prediction, AutoFocus samples multiple coordinate hypotheses and converts their axial perplexities into an anisotropic gaussian spatial probability field, explicitly modeling directional uncertainty. Based on this field, we generate global and local region proposals and introduce Shape-Aware Zooming to balance tight localization with contextual preservation. A visual prompt-based aggregation step then selects the most consistent prediction via structured comparison. Extensive experiments on ScreenSpot-Pro and ScreenSpot-V2 demonstrate consistent improvements across both general-purpose and GUI-specialized VLMs.

</details>


### [186] [ViewSAM: Learning View-aware Cross-modal Semantics for Weakly Supervised Cross-view Referring Multi-Object Tracking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02638)
*Jiawei Ge,Xintian Zhang,Jiuxin Cao,Bo Liu,Fabian Deuser,Chang Liu,Gong Wenkang,Siyou Li,Juexi Shao,Wenqing Wu,Chen Feng,Ioannis Patras*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个弱监督下的跨视角引用多目标跟踪框架ViewSAM，通过利用SAM等基础模型生成伪标签，并设计了两阶段方法，在仅使用类别标签作为粗粒度监督的情况下实现了SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有跨视角引用多目标跟踪方法严重依赖昂贵的帧级空间标注和跨视角身份监督，本文旨在探索弱监督下的解决方案，减少对人工标注的依赖。

Method: 提出两阶段框架：第一阶段设计亲和力引导的跨视角重新提示策略，利用SAM3生成并关联跨视角的轨迹片段作为伪标签；第二阶段构建ViewSAM模型，基于SAM2显式建模视角感知的跨模态语义，将视角变化建模为可学习条件。

Result: ViewSAM在弱监督下实现了SOTA性能，与全监督方法相比仍具有竞争力，且仅需增加约10%的参数。

Conclusion: 通过重新利用基础模型作为伪标签生成器，提出的两阶段弱监督框架能够有效解决跨视角引用多目标跟踪问题，显著减少对昂贵标注的依赖。

Abstract: Cross-view Referring Multi-Object Tracking (CRMOT) aims to track multiple objects specified by natural language across multiple camera views, with globally consistent identities. Despite recent progress, existing methods rely heavily on costly frame-level spatial annotations and cross-view identity supervision. To reduce such reliance, we explore CRMOT under weak supervision by leveraging the capabilities of foundation models. However, our empirical study shows that directly applying foundation models such as SAM2 and SAM3, even with task-specific modifications, fails to accurately understand referring expressions and maintain consistent identities across views. Yet, they remain effective at producing reliable object tracklets that can serve as pseudo supervision. We therefore repurpose foundation models as pseudo-label generators and propose a two-stage framework for weakly supervised CRMOT, using only object category labels as coarse-grained supervision. In the first stage, we design an Affinity-guided Cross-view Re-prompting strategy to refine and associate SAM3-generated tracklets across cameras, producing reliable cross-view pseudo labels for subsequent training. In the second stage, we introduce ViewSAM, a CRMOT model built upon SAM2 that explicitly models view-aware cross-modal semantics. By formulating view-induced variations as learnable conditions, ViewSAM bridges the gap between view-variant visual observations and view-invariant textual expressions, enabling robust cross-view referring tracking with only approximately 10% additional parameters. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ViewSAM achieves SOTA performance under weak supervision and remains competitive with fully supervised methods.

</details>


### [187] [Mamoda2.5: Enhancing Unified Multimodal Model with DiT-MoE](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02641)
*Yangming Shi,Shixiang Zhu,Tao Shen,Zhimiao Yu,Dengsheng Chen,Taicai Chen,Yunfei Yang,Juan Zhou,Chen Cheng,Liang Ma,Xibin Wu,Benxuan Yan,Ge Li,Tuoyu Zhang,Dan Li,Chang Liu,Zhenbang Sun*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Mamoda2.5是一个统一的AR-Diffusion框架，在单一架构中集成多模态理解和生成，通过MoE设计实现高效扩展，在视频生成和编辑任务上达到顶级性能，并实现快速推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 需要开发一个统一的框架，能够同时处理多模态理解和生成任务，同时解决模型扩展时训练成本过高的问题，并提升视频编辑的推理速度。

Method: 1. 基于Diffusion Transformer构建统一AR-Diffusion框架
2. 采用细粒度MoE设计（128个专家，Top-8路由），构建250亿参数模型，仅激活30亿参数
3. 结合少步蒸馏和强化学习框架，将30步编辑模型压缩为4步模型

Result: 1. 在VBench 2.0上达到顶级生成性能
2. 在视频编辑质量上创下新纪录，超越开源模型，匹配顶级专有模型（包括Kling O1）
3. 实现高达95.9倍的视频编辑推理加速
4. 在广告视频编辑场景中达到98%的成功率

Conclusion: Mamoda2.5成功构建了高效的多模态生成框架，通过MoE设计平衡了模型容量和训练成本，并通过蒸馏加速实现了快速推理，在实际应用中展现出优秀的性能。

Abstract: We present Mamoda2.5, a unified AR-Diffusion framework that seamlessly integrates multimodal understanding and generation within a single architecture. To efficiently enhance the model's generation capability, we equip the Diffusion Transformer backbone with a fine-grained Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) design (128 experts, Top-8 routing), yielding a 25B-parameter model that activates only 3B parameters, significantly reducing training costs while scaling up the model capacity. Mamoda2.5 achieves top-tier generation performance on VBench 2.0 and sets a new record in video editing quality, surpassing evaluated open-source models and matching the performance of current top-tier proprietary models, including the Kling O1 on OpenVE-Bench. Furthermore, we introduce a joint few-step distillation and reinforcement learning framework that compresses the 30-step editing model into a 4-step model and greatly accelerates model inference. Compared to open-source baselines, Mamoda2.5 achieves up to $95.9\times$ faster video editing inference. In real-world applications, Mamoda2.5 has been successfully deployed for content moderation and creative restoration tasks in advertising scenarios, achieving a 98% success rate in internal advertising video editing scenario.

</details>


### [188] [Human Activity Recognition Method for Moderate Violence Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02659)
*Luis Angel Aparicio Borjas,Victor Elias Nieto,Juan Irving Vasquez,Alfonso Fernandez-Vazquez,Gerardo Antonio Alvarez Hernandez*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 开发了基于YOLO11和YOLO11-Pose的实时推搡行为检测系统，通过骨骼关键点分析身体倾斜和关节角度，在真实监控场景中实现了72%的精确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 公共场所的物理暴力是重要的公共卫生问题，推搡等轻微事件往往是更严重暴力升级的前兆，需要早期检测和干预。

Method: 集成YOLO11进行人体检测和YOLO11-Pose进行骨骼关键点提取，通过计算身体倾斜度和肩髋关节角度，训练随机森林分类器区分正常行为和攻击性身体接触。

Result: 在三个难度递增的案例研究中，正面视角的受控环境下精度达0.98；在最具挑战性的高空大角度真实监控场景中，尽管存在显著透视变形和视觉噪声，仍保持0.72的精度。

Conclusion: 研究证明了基于骨骼分析的早期暴力干预系统在城市安防场景中的可行性，能够有效检测推搡等中度暴力行为。

Abstract: Physical violence in public spaces is a significant public health concern, with minor incidents such as pushing often serving as precursors to more severe escalations. This research develops an automated system for the real-time detection of moderate physical violence, specifically pushing, in surveillance camera footage. The proposed solution integrates state-of-the-art computer vision models, utilizing YOLO11 and YOLO11-Pose for human detection and skeletal keypoint extraction. By calculating body inclination and joint angles between shoulders and hips, a Random Forest classifier was trained to distinguish between normal behavior and aggressive physical contact. The system's performance was evaluated through three progressive case studies representing increasing levels of difficulty. In controlled environments with frontal views, the model achieved a precision of 0.98. In the most challenging scenario, featuring high-altitude, steep-angle recordings from real-world surveillance infrastructure, the system maintained a precision of 0.72 despite significant perspective distortion and visual noise. These results demonstrate the feasibility of using skeletal analysis for early violence intervention in urban security contexts.

</details>


### [189] [SAIL: Structure-Aware Interpretable Learning for Anatomy-Aligned Post-hoc Explanations in OCT](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02707)
*Tienyu Chang,Tianhao Li,Ruogu Fang,Jiang Bian,Yu Huang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出SAIL框架，通过整合视网膜解剖先验到表征学习中，增强OCT图像疾病检测的可解释性，无需修改现有可解释性方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: OCT在视网膜疾病诊断中至关重要，但深度学习模型的"黑箱"特性阻碍临床采纳。现有可解释AI方法难以描绘细粒度病变结构、尊重解剖边界或抑制噪声。

Method: 提出结构感知可解释学习(SAIL)框架，在表征层面整合视网膜解剖先验，通过融合设计将其与语义特征耦合。

Result: SAIL框架在多个OCT数据集上产生更清晰、解剖对齐的归因图，增强了解释性。消融研究表明结构先验和语义特征及其适当融合对最佳解释质量至关重要。

Conclusion: 结构感知表征是实现OCT可靠可解释性的关键步骤，为临床信任和监管批准提供支持。

Abstract: Optical coherence tomography (OCT), a commonly used retinal imaging modality, plays a central role in retinal disease diagnosis by providing high-resolution visualization of retinal layers. While deep learning (DL) has achieved expert-level accuracy in OCT-based retinal disease detection, its "black box" nature poses challenges for clinical adoption, where explainability is essential for clinical trust and regulatory approval. Existing post-hoc explainable AI (XAI) methods often struggle to delineate fine-grained lesion structures, respect anatomical boundaries, or suppress noise, limiting the trustworthiness of their explanations. To bridge these gaps, we propose a Structure-Aware Interpretable Learning (SAIL) framework that integrates retinal anatomical priors at the representation level and couples them with semantic features via a fusion design. Without modifying standard post-hoc explainability methods, this representation yields sharper and more anatomically aligned attribution maps. Comprehensive experiments on diverse OCT datasets demonstrate that our structure-aware method consistently enhances interpretability, producing clinically meaningful and anatomy-aware explanations. Ablation studies further show that strong interpretability requires both structural priors and semantic features, and that properly fusing the two is critical to achieve the best explanation quality. Together, these results highlight structure-aware representations as a key step toward reliable explainability in OCT.

</details>


### [190] [OphMAE: Bridging Volumetric and Planar Imaging with a Foundation Model for Adaptive Ophthalmological Diagnosis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02714)
*Tienyu Chang,Zhen Chen,Renjie Liang,Jinyu Ding,Jie Xu,Sunu Mathew,Amir Reza Hajrasouliha,Andrew J. Saykin,Ruogu Fang,Yu Huang,Jiang Bian,Qingyu Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: OphMAE是一个眼科多模态基础模型，通过融合3D OCT和2D en face OCT图像，在多种眼科疾病诊断任务中实现最先进性能，并具有单模态适应性和数据高效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前眼科AI主要局限于单模态推理，与临床实践中依赖多模态图像综合诊断的实际需求不符。同时，在资源有限环境中，先进3D成像设备的缺乏限制了高性能AI的部署。

Method: 开发了OphMAE多模态基础模型，采用新颖的跨模态融合架构和自适应推理机制。在32,765名患者的183,875对OCT图像上进行预训练，通过结合3D OCT的体深度和2D en face OCT的平面上下文信息。

Result: 在17个不同诊断任务的基准测试中，OphMAE实现了最先进性能：AMD的AUC为96.9%，DME的AUC为97.2%。即使在仅使用单模态2D输入时，AMD的AUC仍达93.7%。仅需500个标注样本即可保持95.7%的AUC，表现出卓越的数据效率。

Conclusion: OphMAE为眼科AI建立了可扩展和适应性强的框架，在不同任务中保持稳健性能，解决了临床多模态诊断需求与资源限制之间的差距。

Abstract: The advent of foundation models has heralded a new era in medical artificial intelligence (AI), enabling the extraction of generalizable representations from large-scale unlabeled datasets. However, current ophthalmic AI paradigms are predominantly constrained to single-modality inference, thereby creating a dissonance with clinical practice where diagnosis relies on the synthesis of complementary imaging modalities. Furthermore, the deployment of high-performance AI in resource-limited settings is frequently impeded by the unavailability of advanced three-dimensional imaging hardware. Here, we present the Ophthalmic multimodal Masked Autoencoder (OphMAE), a multi-imaging foundation model engineered to synergize the volumetric depth of 3D Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT) with the planar context of 2D en face OCT. By implementing a novel cross-modal fusion architecture and a unique adaptive inference mechanism, OphMAE was pre-trained on a massive dataset with of 183,875 paired OCT images derived from 32,765 patients. In a rigorous benchmark encompassing 17 diverse diagnostic tasks with 48,340 paired OCT images from 8,191 patients, the model demonstrated state-of-the-art performance, achieving an Area Under the Curve (AUC) of 96.9% for Age-related Macular Degeneration (AMD) and 97.2% for Diabetic Macular Edema (DME), consistently surpassing existing single-modal and multimodal foundation models. Crucially, OphMAE exhibits robust engineering adaptability: it maintains high diagnostic accuracy, such as 93.7\% AUC for AMD, even when restricted to single-modality 2D inputs, and demonstrates exceptional data efficiency by retaining 95.7% AUC with as few as 500 labeled samples. This work establishes a scalable and adaptable framework for ophthalmic AI, ensuring robust performance across different tasks.

</details>


### [191] [PubMed-Ophtha: An open resource for training ophthalmology vision-language models on scientific literature](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02720)
*Verena Jasmin Hallitschke,Carsten Eickhoff,Philipp Berens*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: PubMed-Ophtha是一个包含102,023个眼科图像-标注对的分层数据集，从PubMed Central的15,842篇开放获取文章中提取，提供高质量的眼科视觉语言模型训练数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉语言模型在眼科学中具有重要应用前景，但其发展受限于大规模、高质量图像-文本数据集的稀缺。现有数据集无法满足眼科领域对精细标注图像的需求。

Method: 从PubMed Central文章PDF中直接提取高分辨率图像，分解为组成面板、面板标识符和单个图像。使用两步LLM方法将图注分割为面板级子标注，并标注成像模态和标记状态。开发了面板和图像检测模型，提供完整的生成流程。

Result: 构建了包含102,023个图像-标注对的数据集。面板级子标注的平均句子BLEU分数达到0.913。面板和图像检测模型的mAP@0.50分别为0.909和0.892，图像提取的IoU中位数为0.997。提供了人工标注的真值数据、训练模型和完整生成流程。

Conclusion: PubMed-Ophtha为眼科视觉语言模型开发提供了高质量、大规模的数据资源，支持可重复性研究，有望推动眼科人工智能的发展。

Abstract: Vision-language models hold considerable promise for ophthalmology, but their development depends on large-scale, high-quality image-text datasets that remain scarce. We present PubMed-Ophtha, a hierarchical dataset of 102,023 ophthalmological image-caption pairs extracted from 15,842 open-access articles in PubMed Central. Unlike existing datasets, figures are extracted directly from article PDFs at full resolution and decomposed into their constituent panels, panel identifiers, and individual images. Each image is annotated with its imaging modality -- color fundus photography, optical coherence tomography, retinal imaging, or other -- and a mark status indicating the presence of annotation marks such as arrows. Figure captions are split into panel-level subcaptions using a two-step LLM approach, achieving a mean average sentence BLEU score of 0.913 on human-annotated data. Panel and image detection models reach a mAP@0.50 of 0.909 and 0.892, respectively, and figure extraction achieves a median IoU of 0.997. To support reproducibility, we additionally release the human-annotated ground-truth data, all trained models, and the full dataset generation pipeline.

</details>


### [192] [Perceptual Flow Network for Visually Grounded Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02730)
*Yangfu Li,Yuning Gong,Hongjian Zhan,Teng Li,Yuanhuiyi Lyu,Tianyi Chen,Qi Liu,Ziyuan Huang,Zhihang Zhong,Dandan Zheng,Yue Lu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: PFlowNet通过解耦感知与推理，结合多维度奖励和邻域几何塑造，解决了LVLM中视觉轨迹约束不足导致的语言偏见和幻觉问题，在多个基准测试中达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）的标准优化目标（如MLE）无法有效约束视觉轨迹，导致语言偏见和幻觉问题。现有方法引入视觉专家的几何先验作为额外监督，但这种监督偏向几何精度且推理效用有限。

Method: 提出感知流网络（PFlowNet）：1）解耦感知与推理，建立自条件生成过程；2）通过变分强化学习整合多维度奖励和邻域几何塑造，促进推理导向的感知行为同时保持视觉可靠性。

Result: PFlowNet提供了可证明的性能保证，在多个基准测试中取得有竞争力的实证结果：在V* Bench上达到90.6%，在MME-RealWorld-lite上达到67.0%，均创下新的SOTA记录。

Conclusion: PFlowNet避免了对专家先验的刚性对齐，实现了更可解释且更有效的视觉推理，为LVLMs的视觉轨迹约束问题提供了创新解决方案。

Abstract: Despite the success of Large-Vision Language Models (LVLMs), general optimization objectives (e.g., standard MLE) fail to constrain visual trajectories, leading to language bias and hallucination. To mitigate this, current methods introduce geometric priors from visual experts as additional supervision. However, we observe that such supervision is typically suboptimal: it is biased toward geometric precision and offers limited reasoning utility. To bridge this gap, we propose Perceptual Flow Network (PFlowNet), which eschews rigid alignment with the expert priors and achieves interpretable yet more effective visual reasoning. Specifically, PFlowNet decouples perception from reasoning to establish a self-conditioned generation process. Based on this, it integrates multi-dimensional rewards with vicinal geometric shaping via variational reinforcement learning, thereby facilitating reasoning-oriented perceptual behaviors while preserving visual reliability. PFlowNet delivers a provable performance guarantee and competitive empirical results, particularly setting new SOTA records on V* Bench (90.6%) and MME-RealWorld-lite (67.0%).

</details>


### [193] [SIAM: Head and Brain MRI Segmentation from Few High-Quality Templates via Synthetic Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02737)
*Romain Valabregue,Ines Khemir,Eric Badinet,François Rousseau,Guillaume Auzias,Reuben Dorent*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SIAM是一个仅使用6个高质量手动标注模板训练的3D全头部分割模型，可分割16个解剖结构，包括脑组织和脑外组织，实现了无需预处理的自动化分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有合成训练方法依赖数百个自动标注模板，存在系统性偏差且难以纳入新的解剖结构。需要更灵活的、高质量标注的合成训练方法来实现全头部解剖结构的分割。

Method: SIAM将域随机化扩展到强度和形状域：合成图像生成确保对比度变化，高分辨率空间变换模拟皮质厚度和深部核团形态的解剖差异。仅使用6个高质量手动标注模板进行训练。

Result: 在8个异质数据集（N=301）上评估，涵盖多种对比度（T1加权、T2加权、CT）和广泛年龄范围。SIAM在脑结构分割上达到或超越最先进方法，并首次实现非脑结构的自动化分割，在对比度和重复采集间表现出更高一致性，对细微灰质萎缩具有更好敏感性。

Conclusion: SIAM展示了仅使用少量高质量手动标注模板训练全头部解剖结构分割模型的可行性，实现了无需预处理的自动化分析，在多个数据集和对比度上表现出色，为脑影像分析提供了更全面的解决方案。

Abstract: Synthetic training has recently advanced brain MRI segmentation by enabling contrast-agnostic models trained entirely on generated data. However, most existing approaches rely on hundreds of automatically labeled templates, introducing systematic biases and limiting their flexibility to incorporate new anatomical structures. We present the Segment It All Model (SIAM), a 3D whole-head segmentation framework for 16 anatomical structures, trained using only six high-quality, manually annotated templates. SIAM extends domain randomization to both intensity and shape domains: synthetic image generation ensures contrast variability, while high-resolution spatial transformations model anatomical differences in cortical thickness and deep nuclei morphology. Unlike prior synthetic models, SIAM simultaneously segments brain as well as extra-cerebral tissues, including cerebrospinal fluid, vessels, dura mater, skull, and skin, enabling fully automated, preprocessing-free analysis. Evaluation across eight heterogeneous datasets (N=301), that include multiple contrasts (T1-weighted, T2-weighted, CT) and span a wide range of ages, demonstrates that SIAM matches or outperforms state-of-the-art methods for brain structures, in addition to extending automated segmentation to non-brain structures. The model also exhibits superior consistency across contrasts and repeated acquisitions, together with improved sensitivity to subtle gray matter atrophy. We openly release the model and the label templates at https://github.com/romainVala/SIAM.

</details>


### [194] [Virtual Scanning for NSCLC Histology: Investigating the Discriminatory Power of Synthetic PET](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02746)
*Fatih Aksu,Laura Ciuffetti,Francesco Di Feola,Filippo Ruffini,Giulia Romoli,Fabrizia Gelardi,Arturo Chiti,Valerio Guarrasi,Paolo Soda*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该研究提出使用3D Pix2Pix GAN从CT扫描合成伪PET图像，通过多模态融合提升非小细胞肺癌亚型分类性能，在714例多中心数据上验证了合成代谢特征的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 准确区分非小细胞肺癌的腺癌和鳞状细胞癌对个体化治疗至关重要。[18F]FDG PET/CT虽为标准工具，但成本高且有辐射暴露。研究探索"虚拟扫描"作为特征增强策略，评估合成PET数据是否能补充CT扫描在组织学亚型分类中的特征表示。

Method: 提出基于3D Pix2Pix GAN的框架，在FDG-PET/CT病变数据集上预训练，从解剖CT扫描合成伪PET体积。将合成数据与结构CT数据在MINT框架（多阶段中间融合架构）中集成。

Result: 在多中心714名受试者数据集上，包含合成代谢特征显著提升了分类性能：AUC从0.489提高到0.591，GMean从0.305提高到0.524。多模态方法相比仅使用CT的基线有统计学显著改善。

Conclusion: 合成PET扫描提供了具有区分性的代谢线索，使深度学习模型能够利用互补的跨模态信息。这为无法进行物理PET扫描的临床场景提供了一种潜在的特征增强策略。

Abstract: Accurate histological differentiation between adenocarcinoma (ADC) and squamous cell carcinoma (SCC) is critical for personalized treatment in non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC). While [$^{18}$F]FDG PET/CT is a standard tool for the clinical evaluation of lung cancer, its utility is often limited by high costs and radiation exposure. In this paper, we investigate the feasibility of "virtual scanning" as a feature-enhancement strategy by evaluating whether synthetic PET data can provide complementary feature representations to supplement anatomical CT scans in histological subtype classification.
  We propose a framework that leverages a 3D Pix2Pix Generative Adversarial Network (GAN), pretrained on the FDG-PET/CT Lesions dataset, to synthesize pseudo-PET volumes from anatomical CT scans. These synthetic volumes are integrated with structural CT data within the MINT framework, a multi-stage intermediate fusion architecture.
  Our experiments, conducted on a multi-center dataset of 714 subjects, demonstrate that the inclusion of synthetic metabolic features significantly improves classification performance over a CT-only baseline. The multimodal approach achieved a statistically significant increase in the Area Under the Curve (AUC) from 0.489 to 0.591 and improved the Geometric Mean (GMean) from 0.305 to 0.524. These results suggest that synthetic PET scans provide discriminatory metabolic cues that enable deep learning models to exploit complementary cross-modal information, offering a potential feature-enhancement strategy for clinical scenarios where physical PET scans are unavailable.

</details>


### [195] [Does it Really Count? Assessing Semantic Grounding in Text-Guided Class-Agnostic Counting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02752)
*Giacomo Pacini,Luca Ciampi,Nicola Messina,Nicola Tonellotto,Giuseppe Amato,Fabrizio Falchi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个新的评估框架PrACo++和MUCCA数据集，用于评估文本引导的类无关计数模型的鲁棒性和可信度，发现当前SOTA模型在文本提示与视觉对象表示的语义对齐上存在严重问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前开放世界文本引导的类无关计数评估主要关注单类别图像中的标准计数误差，忽视了模型正确理解文本提示并基于视觉场景进行对象定位的基本能力要求。研究发现现有模型经常难以根据给定提示确定应该计数的对象类别，存在文本语义与视觉对象表示的错位问题。

Method: 提出了PrACo++评估框架，包含两种专门评估协议：负标签测试和干扰物测试，并设计了新的专门指标。同时创建了MUCCA评估数据集，包含每张图像中多个标注对象类别的真实世界图像，不同于现有仅包含单类别图像的基准。

Result: 对10个SOTA方法的广泛实验评估显示，尽管在标准计数指标上表现良好，但当前模型在理解和定位对象类别描述方面存在显著弱点。通过定量分析提示间语义相似性如何影响这些失败。

Conclusion: 研究结果强调了需要更多语义基础架构的必要性，并为未来开放世界文本引导的类无关计数方法评估提供了可靠框架。

Abstract: Open-world text-guided class-agnostic counting (CAC) has emerged as a flexible paradigm for counting arbitrary object classes by using natural language prompts. However, current evaluation protocols primarily focus on standard counting errors within single-category images, overlooking a fundamental requirement: the ability to correctly ground the textual prompt in the visual scene. In this paper, we show that several state-of-the-art CAC models often struggle to determine which object class should be counted based on the given prompt, revealing a misalignment between textual semantics and visual object representations. This limitation leads to spurious counting responses and reduced reliability in real-world scenarios. To systematically address these limitations, we propose a new evaluation framework focused on model robustness and trustworthiness. Our contribution is two-fold: (i) we introduce PrACo++ (Prompt-Aware Counting++), a novel test suite featuring two dedicated evaluation protocols -- the negative-label test and the distractor test -- paired with new specialized metrics; and (ii) we present the MUCCA (MUlti-Category Class-Agnostic counting) evaluation dataset, a new collection of real-world images featuring multiple annotated object categories per scene, unlike existing CAC benchmarks that typically include a single category per image. Our extensive experimental evaluation of 10 state-of-the-art methods shows that, despite strong performance under standard counting metrics, current models exhibit significant weaknesses in understanding and grounding object class descriptions. Finally, we provide a quantitative analysis of how semantic similarity between prompts influences these failures. Overall, our results underscore the need for more semantically grounded architectures and offer a reliable framework for future assessment in open-world text-guided CAC methods.

</details>


### [196] [Unified Map Prior Encoder for Mapping and Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02762)
*Zongzheng Zhang,Sizhe Zou,Guantian Zheng,Zhenxin Zhu,Yu Gao,Guoxuan Chi,Shuo Wang,Yuwen Heng,Zhigang Sun,Yiru Wang,Hao Sun,Chao Ma,Zhen Li,Anqing Jiang,Hao Zhao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: UMPE是一个统一的地图先验编码器，能够融合多种异构地图先验（HD/SD矢量地图、栅格化地图、卫星图像）用于自动驾驶的在线建图和端到端规划，通过几何对齐和置信度融合机制显著提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前自动驾驶中的在线建图和端到端规划主要依赖传感器数据，而丰富的地图先验（如HD/SD矢量地图、栅格地图、卫星图像）由于异构性、位姿漂移和测试时可用性不一致等问题未能充分利用。

Method: UMPE采用双分支结构：矢量编码器通过SE(2)校正预对齐HD/SD折线，使用多频正弦特征编码点，生成带置信度的折线token；栅格编码器使用FiLM条件化的ResNet-18骨干网络，进行SE(2)微对齐，通过零初始化残差融合注入先验。采用"矢量优先、栅格次之"的融合顺序，体现几何优先、外观次之的归纳偏置。

Result: 在nuScenes建图任务中，UMPE将MapTRv2从61.5提升至67.4 mAP（+5.9），MapQR从66.4提升至71.7 mAP（+5.3）。在Argoverse2上提升+4.1 mAP。对于端到端规划，将轨迹误差从0.72降至0.42米L2（-0.30米），碰撞率从0.22%降至0.12%（-0.10%）。UMPE表现出组合性：用所有先验训练后，即使测试时只有一个先验可用，也能超越单先验模型。

Conclusion: 统一、对齐感知的异构地图先验处理方法能够显著提升自动驾驶的建图和规划性能，UMPE框架通过融合多种地图先验，在多个基准测试中取得了显著改进。

Abstract: Online mapping and end-to-end (E2E) planning in autonomous driving remain largely sensor-centric, leaving rich map priors, including HD/SD vector maps, rasterized SD maps, and satellite imagery, underused because of heterogeneity, pose drift, and inconsistent availability at test time. We present UMPE, a Unified Map Prior Encoder that can ingest any subset of four priors and fuse them with BEV features for both mapping and planning. UMPE has two branches. The vector encoder pre-aligns HD/SD polylines with a frame-wise SE(2) correction, encodes points via multi-frequency sinusoidal features, and produces polyline tokens with confidence scores. BEV queries then apply cross-attention with confidence bias, followed by normalized channel-wise gating to avoid length imbalance and softly down-weight uncertain sources. The raster encoder shares a ResNet-18 backbone conditioned by FiLM with scaling and shift at every stage, performs SE(2) micro-alignment, and injects priors through zero-initialized residual fusion, so the network starts from a do-no-harm baseline and learns to add only useful prior evidence. A vector-then-raster fusion order reflects the inductive bias of geometry first, appearance second. On nuScenes mapping, UMPE lifts MapTRv2 from 61.5 to 67.4 mAP (+5.9) and MapQR from 66.4 to 71.7 mAP (+5.3). On Argoverse2, UMPE adds +4.1 mAP over strong baselines. UMPE is compositional: when trained with all priors, it outperforms single-prior models even when only one prior is available at test time, demonstrating powerset robustness. For E2E planning with the VAD backbone on nuScenes, UMPE reduces trajectory error from 0.72 to 0.42 m L2 on average (-0.30 m) and collision rate from 0.22% to 0.12% (-0.10%), surpassing recent prior-injection methods. These results show that a unified, alignment-aware treatment of heterogeneous map priors yields better mapping and better planning.

</details>


### [197] [FoR-Net: Learning to Focus on Hard Regions for Efficient Semantic Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02764)
*Hsin-Jui Pan,Sheng-Wei Chan,Meng-Qian Li,Chun-Po Shen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: FoR-Net是一种轻量级语义分割架构，专注于识别和增强困难区域，通过重要性映射和Top-K激活机制选择性地强调信息区域，在有限计算资源下实现竞争性性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语义分割方法通常依赖繁重的全局建模，计算成本高。FoR-Net旨在设计一种轻量级架构，通过专注于困难区域（如细薄结构和物体边界）来提高分割效率，同时减少计算负担。

Method: FoR-Net采用选择性强调策略：1）选择器模块预测区域重要性映射，识别困难区域；2）Top-K激活机制聚焦于最具信息量的区域；3）多尺度推理使用不同感受野的卷积分支，实现多样化的空间上下文聚合。

Result: 在Cityscapes基准测试中，尽管采用轻量级设计和标准训练配置，FoR-Net取得了竞争性性能，并在困难区域（如细薄结构和边界）表现出更好的分割一致性。

Conclusion: 区域聚焦推理为高效语义分割提供了一种简单而有效的归纳偏置，表明通过有选择地关注困难区域而非依赖全局建模，可以在有限计算资源下实现良好的分割性能。

Abstract: We present FoR-Net, a lightweight architecture for semantic segmentation that focuses on identifying and enhancing hard regions. Instead of relying on heavy global modeling, FoR-Net adopts an efficient strategy that selectively emphasizes informative regions through a learned importance map and a Top-K activation mechanism. Specifically, a selector module predicts region-wise importance, enabling the model to focus on challenging areas such as thin structures and object boundaries. Multi-scale reasoning is achieved using convolutional branches with different receptive fields, allowing diverse spatial context aggregation. We evaluate FoR-Net on the Cityscapes benchmark under limited computational resources. Despite its lightweight design and standard training configuration, FoR-Net achieves competitive performance and demonstrates improved consistency in challenging regions. These results suggest that region-focused reasoning provides a simple yet effective inductive bias for efficient semantic segmentation.

</details>


### [198] [TOC-SR: Task-Optimal Compact diffusion for Image Super Resolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02767)
*Sowmya Vajrala,Akshay Bankar,Manjunath Arveti,Shreyas Pandith,Sravanth Kodavanti,Subhajit Sanyal,Amit Unde,Srinivas Soumitri Miriyala*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: TOC-SR框架通过发现紧凑扩散骨干网络，构建高效的一步超分辨率模型，实现参数减少6.6倍和计算量减少2.8倍，同时保持重建质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型在图像恢复任务中表现出色，但模型尺寸大、迭代采样过程计算成本高，难以实际部署。需要开发更高效的超分辨率模型。

Method: 从16通道潜在扩散模型出发，使用特征级生成蒸馏构建参数高效的代理块，通过epsilon约束贝叶斯优化进行架构发现以最小化模型复杂度同时保持生成保真度，然后将扩散过程蒸馏为单步生成器。

Result: 紧凑扩散骨干网络实现参数减少6.6倍、GMACs减少2.8倍，实验表明该方法在保持强重建质量的同时实现高效超分辨率。

Conclusion: TOC-SR框架通过紧凑扩散骨干网络发现和单步蒸馏，成功构建了高效且保持高质量的超分辨率模型，解决了扩散模型计算成本高的问题。

Abstract: Diffusion models have recently demonstrated strong performance for image restoration tasks, including super-resolution. However, their large model size and iterative sampling procedures make them computationally expensive for practical deployment. In this work, we present TOC-SR, a framework for building efficient one-step super-resolution models by first discovering a compact diffusion backbone. Starting from a sixteen-channel latent diffusion model, we construct parameter-efficient surrogate blocks using feature-wise generative distillation and perform architecture discovery using epsilon-constrained Bayesian Optimization to minimize model complexity while preserving generative fidelity. The resulting compact diffusion backbone achieves a 6.6x reduction in parameters and a 2.8x reduction in GMACs compared to the expanded diffusion model. We then adapt this backbone for super-resolution and distill the diffusion process into a single-step generator. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed approach enables efficient super-resolution while maintaining strong reconstruction quality.

</details>


### [199] [Linearizing Vision Transformer with Test-Time Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02772)
*Yining Li,Dongchen Han,Zeyu Liu,Hanyi Wang,Yulin Wang,Gao Huang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种将预训练Transformer转换为线性复杂度注意力模型的方法，通过架构对齐和表征对齐解决Softmax与线性注意力之间的表示差距，并在Stable Diffusion 3.5上验证，仅需1小时微调即可达到接近原始模型的质量，同时提升推理速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 线性复杂度注意力机制虽然能解决二次复杂度瓶颈，但从头训练成本过高。继承预训练Transformer权重是理想方案，但Softmax与线性注意力之间的表示差距阻碍了有效权重迁移。

Method: 从两个角度解决转换挑战：1）架构对齐：识别Test-Time Training（TTT）作为线性复杂度架构，其双层动态公式与Softmax注意力结构对齐，可直接继承预训练注意力权重；2）表征对齐：引入关键实例归一化和轻量级局部性增强模块，对齐关键表示属性（如键位移不变性和局部性）。

Result: 在Stable Diffusion 3.5上验证方法，创建SD3.5-T^5模型。仅需4×H20 GPU上1小时微调，文本到图像质量与微调后的Softmax模型相当，在1K和2K分辨率下分别加速1.32×和1.47×。

Conclusion: 该方法成功实现了预训练Transformer向线性复杂度注意力的高效转换，解决了表示差距问题，在保持质量的同时显著提升推理效率，为大规模模型部署提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: While linear-complexity attention mechanisms offer a promising alternative to Softmax attention for overcoming the quadratic bottleneck, training such models from scratch remains prohibitively expensive. Inheriting weights from pretrained Transformers provides an appealing shortcut, yet the fundamental representational gap between Softmax and linear attention prevents effective weight transfer. In this work, we address this conversion challenge from two perspectives: architectural alignment and representational alignment. We identify Test-Time Training (TTT) as a linear-complexity architecture whose two-layer dynamic formulation is structurally aligned with Softmax attention, enabling direct inheritance of pretrained attention weights. To further align representational properties, including key shift-invariance and locality, we introduce key instance normalization and a lightweight locality enhancement module. We validate our approach by linearizing Stable Diffusion 3.5 and introduce SD3.5-T$^5$ (Transformer To Test Time Training). With only 1 hour of fine-tuning on 4$\times$H20 GPUs, SD3.5-T$^5$ achieves comparable text-to-image quality to the fine-tuned Softmax model, while accelerating inference by 1.32$\times$ and 1.47$\times$ at 1K and 2K resolutions.

</details>


### [200] [HumanSplatHMR: Closing the Loop Between Human Mesh Recovery and Gaussian Splatting Avatar](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02784)
*Yeheng Zong,Pou-Chun Kung,Yike Pan,Seth Isaacson,Yizhou Chen,Ram Vasudevan,Katherine A. Skinner*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: HumanSplatHMR：一种联合优化框架，通过可微分渲染器反向传播损失来同时优化3D人体姿态和高保真化身，实现新视角和新姿态的合成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法无法准确恢复人体的3D几何形状。ViT方法不可靠且容易过拟合2D视图，而NeRF和Gaussian Splatting方法将姿态和外观分开处理，限制了新姿态的渲染泛化能力。需要一种能在野外场景下同时优化姿态和化身的实用方法。

Method: 提出HumanSplatHMR联合优化框架，将几何姿态估计与可微分渲染形成闭环。仅使用最先进的人体姿态估计器获得的人体网格作为初始估计，通过可微分渲染器反向传播光度、分割和深度损失到姿态参数和全局位置，同时优化3D姿态和化身。

Result: 实验表明，该方法在姿态恢复精度和化身渲染质量上均优于基线方法。与忽略图像级细化的姿态恢复基线以及将姿态估计与化身重建解耦的化身基线相比，都取得了持续改进。

Conclusion: HumanSplatHMR通过联合优化姿态和化身，实现了更准确的3D人体姿态恢复和更好的新视角/新姿态合成，为野外场景下构建高保真人体化身提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Accurately recovering human pose and appearance from video is an essential component of scene reconstruction, with applications to motion capture, motion prediction, virtual reality, and digital twinning. Despite significant interest in building realistic human avatars from video, this paper demonstrates that existing methods do not accurately recover the 3D geometry of humans. ViT-based approaches are not consistently reliable and can overfit to 2D views, while NeRF- and Gaussian Splatting-based avatars treat pose and appearance separately, limiting rendering generalization to new poses. To resolve these shortcomings, this paper proposes HumanSplatHMR, a joint optimization framework that refines 3D human poses while simultaneously learning a high-fidelity avatar for novel-view and novel-pose synthesis. Our key insight is to close the loop between geometric pose estimation and differentiable rendering. Unlike prior human avatar methods that rely on accurate human pose obtained through motion capture systems or offline refinement, which are impractical in in-the-wild scenarios, our approach uses only human mesh estimates from a state-of-the-art human pose estimator to better reflect real-world conditions. Therefore, instead of using the human pose only as a deformation prior, HumanSplatHMR backpropagates photometric, segmentation, and depth losses through a differentiable renderer to the pose parameters and global position. This coupling refines the global 3D pose over time, improving accuracy and alignment while producing better renderings from novel views. Experiments show consistent improvements over pose recovery baselines that omit image-level refinement and avatar baselines that decouple pose estimation from avatar reconstruction.

</details>


### [201] [Edge-Efficient Image Restoration: Transformer Distillation into State-Space Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02794)
*Srinivas Soumitri Miriyala,Sowmya Vajrala,Sravanth Kodavanti,Vikram Nelvoy Rajendiran,Sharan Kumar Allur*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一个用于混合图像恢复的模块化框架，集成Transformer和SSM块，通过特征蒸馏训练轻量SSM块作为Transformer块的替代，并引入高效网络搜索自动发现任务特定混合配置，在保持恢复质量的同时显著提升边缘硬件运行效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Transformer在图像恢复中提供强大的全局建模能力，但其注意力机制在移动设备上（特别是高分辨率输入）带来显著延迟；而SSM（如Mamba）提供线性时间序列建模且运行时开销更低，但在细粒度恢复任务上可能表现不足。需要在准确性和效率之间取得平衡。

Method: 提出模块化混合图像恢复框架：1）训练轻量SSM块作为Transformer块的特征蒸馏替代品；2）构建混合U-Net风格架构；3）引入高效网络搜索（ENS）作为多目标搜索策略，从预对齐组件中选择任务特定混合配置，优化恢复质量同时惩罚Transformer使用以降低延迟。

Result: 在Snapdragon 8 Elite CPU上，Restormer基线推理需10119.52ms。ENS发现的混合模型显著减少运行时间：ENS-Deblurring仅需2973ms（快3.4倍），ENS-Deraining需5816ms（快1.74倍），ENS-Denoising需8666ms（快1.17倍），同时保持有竞争力的恢复质量。

Conclusion: 该框架通过集成Transformer和SSM块，结合特征蒸馏和高效网络搜索，实现了在边缘硬件上平衡准确性和运行效率的混合图像恢复方案，为移动设备上的高质量图像恢复提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: We propose a modular framework for hybrid image restoration that integrates transformer and state-space model (SSM) blocks with a focus on improving runtime efficiency on edge hardware. While transformers provide strong global modeling through self-attention, their attention kernels incur substantial latency on mobile devices, especially for high-resolution inputs. In contrast, SSMs such as Mamba offer lineartime sequence modeling with lower runtime overhead but may underperform on fine grained restoration tasks. To balance accuracy and efficiency, we train lightweight SSM blocks as feature-distilled surrogates of transformer blocks and use them to construct hybrid U-Net-style architectures. To automatically discover effective block combinations, we introduce Efficient Network Search (ENS), a multi-objective search strategy that selects task-specific hybrid configurations from pre-aligned components. ENS optimizes restoration quality while penalizing transformer usage, serving as a lightweight proxy for latency and enabling architecture discovery without repeated hardware profiling. On a Snapdragon 8 Elite CPU, the Restormer baseline requires 10119.52 ms for inference. In contrast, ENS-discovered hybrids significantly reduce runtime: ENS-Deblurring runs in 2973 ms (3.4x faster), ENS-Deraining in 5816 ms (1.74x faster), and ENS-Denoising in 8666 ms (1.17x faster), while maintaining competitive restoration quality.

</details>


### [202] [IConFace: Identity-Structure Asymmetric Conditioning for Unified Reference-Aware Face Restoration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02814)
*Axi Niu,Jinyang Zhang,Senyan Qing*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: IConFace是一个统一的盲脸修复框架，结合了参考感知和无参考两种模式，通过身份-结构非对称条件化来提升身份一致性和细节恢复质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 严重退化下的盲脸修复是高度不适定的问题，身份关键细节可能缺失。虽然使用相同身份参考可以减少歧义，但参考图像在姿态、表情、光照、年龄、妆容或局部面部状态上的不匹配可能导致过度使用参考外观。

Method: 提出身份-结构非对称条件化：将参考图像蒸馏为基于范数加权的全局AdaFace身份锚点进行图像调制；同时通过低秩残差和块状退化交叉注意力（两路记忆）将退化图像强化为空间结构锚点。

Result: 单个检查点模型能够利用可用参考进行修复，在无参考时自动回退到无参考修复，在统一模型中提升了身份一致性、细节恢复质量和纯退化图像的修复质量。

Conclusion: IConFace通过身份-结构非对称条件化实现了统一的参考感知和无参考盲脸修复，有效解决了参考图像不匹配问题，提升了身份保持和细节恢复能力。

Abstract: Blind face restoration is highly ill-posed under severe degradation, where identity-critical details may be missing from the degraded input. Same-identity references reduce this ambiguity, but mismatched pose, expression, illumination, age, makeup, or local facial states can lead to overuse of reference appearance. We propose \textbf{IConFace}, a unified reference-aware and no-reference framework with identity--structure asymmetric conditioning. References are distilled into a norm-weighted global AdaFace identity anchor for image-only modulation, while the degraded image is reinforced as the spatial structure anchor through low-rank residuals and block-wise degraded cross-attention with two-route memory. The resulting single checkpoint exploits references when available and falls back to no-reference restoration when absent, improving identity consistency, fine-detail recovery, and degraded-only restoration quality in a unified model.

</details>


### [203] [VideoNet: A Large-Scale Dataset for Domain-Specific Action Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02834)
*Tanush Yadav,Mohammadreza Salehi,Jae Sung Park,Vivek Ramanujan,Hannaneh Hajishirzi,Yejin Choi,Ali Farhadi,Rohun Tripathi,Ranjay Krishna*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: VideoNet是一个针对特定领域动作识别的基准测试，包含37个领域的1000个动作，用于评估视觉语言模型的动作识别能力。研究发现，现有模型在该任务上表现不佳，即使提供少量样本示例，改进也有限。通过构建大规模训练数据集并微调模型，可以显著提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 由于缺乏足够多样化和具有挑战性的数据，现代视觉语言模型在动作识别能力上缺乏评估。为了在VLM时代重新激活动作识别研究，需要关注特定领域的动作识别任务。

Method: 1. 引入VideoNet基准测试，包含37个领域的1000个特定动作；2. 采用多种评估设置：多项选择、二元分类、少样本上下文示例；3. 收集大规模训练数据集（近50万个视频问答对）；4. 在VideoNet数据上微调Molmo2-4B模型。

Result: 1. 闭源模型（Gemini 3.1 Pro）表现优于开源模型（Qwen3-VL-8B）；2. 在少样本设置下，不同模型表现不一：Qwen提升+7.0%，而Gemini下降-4.8%；3. 人类在少样本示例下提升+13.6%，优于模型；4. 微调后的Molmo2-4B超越了所有8B开源模型。

Conclusion: 视觉语言模型在特定领域动作识别任务上仍有挑战，特别是难以充分利用上下文示例。通过构建领域特定的训练数据并微调模型，可以显著提升性能，为动作识别研究提供了新的基准和方法。

Abstract: Videos are unique in their ability to capture actions which transcend multiple frames. Accordingly, for many years action recognition was the quintessential task for video understanding. Unfortunately, due to a lack of sufficiently diverse and challenging data, modern vision-language models (VLMs) are no longer evaluated on their action recognition capabilities. To revitalize action recognition in the era of VLMs, we advocate for a returned focus on domain-specific actions. To this end, we introduce VideoNet, a domain-specific action recognition benchmark covering 1,000 distinct actions from 37 domains. We begin with a multiple-choice evaluation setting, where the difference between closed and open models is stark: Gemini 3.1 Pro attains 69.9% accuracy while Qwen3-VL-8B gets a mere 45.0%. To understand why VLMs struggle on VideoNet, we relax the questions into a binary setting, where random chance is 50%. Still, Qwen achieves only 59.2% accuracy. Further relaxing the evaluation setup, we provide $k\in\{1,2,3\}$ in-context examples of the action. Some models excel in the few-shot setting, while others falter; Qwen improves $+7.0\%$, while Gemini declines $-4.8\%$. Notably, these gains fall short of the $+13.6\%$ improvement in non-expert humans when given few-shot examples. Finding that VLMs struggle to fully exploit in-context examples, we shift from test-time improvements to the training side. We collect the first large-scale training dataset for domain-specific actions, totaling nearly 500k video question-answer pairs. Fine-tuning a Molmo2-4B model on our data, we surpass all open-weight 8B models on the VideoNet benchmark.

</details>


### [204] [Active Sampling for Ultra-Low-Bit-Rate Video Compression via Conditional Controlled Diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02849)
*Amirhosein Javadi,Shirin Saeedi Bidokhti,Tara Javidi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ActDiff-VC是一个基于扩散模型的超低码率视频压缩框架，通过自适应关键帧选择和稀疏轨迹跟踪，在极低码率下实现感知质量良好的视频重建。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型为超低码率下的感知重建提供了强大的生成先验，但视频压缩需要利用高度紧凑的条件信号来控制生成过程。

Method: 将视频分割为变长片段，仅在需要时传输关键帧，使用紧凑的跟踪点轨迹总结时间动态。基于这些稀疏信号，条件扩散解码器合成剩余帧。引入内容自适应关键帧选择和预算感知稀疏轨迹选择两种机制。

Result: 在UVG和MCL-JCV基准测试中，ActDiff-VC在相同NIQE下实现64.6%的码率降低，在可比码率下将KID提高64.6%，FID提高37.7%，在超低码率下相比学习和扩散基线提供更好的感知率失真权衡。

Conclusion: ActDiff-VC展示了基于稀疏条件信号的扩散模型在超低码率视频压缩中的有效性，通过自适应关键帧和轨迹选择机制实现了紧凑而有效的生成重建。

Abstract: Diffusion models provide a powerful generative prior for perceptual reconstruction at ultra-low bitrates, but effective video compression requires controlling the generative process using highly compact conditioning signals. In this work, we present ActDiff-VC, a diffusion-based video compression framework for the ultra-low-bitrate regime. Our method partitions videos into variable-length segments, transmits keyframes only when needed, and summarizes temporal dynamics using a compact set of tracked point trajectories. Conditioned on these sparse signals, a conditional diffusion decoder synthesizes the remaining frames, enabling perceptually realistic reconstruction under severe rate constraints. To support this design, we introduce two mechanisms: content-adaptive keyframe selection and budget-aware sparse trajectory selection, which together enable compact yet effective conditioning for generative reconstruction. Experiments on the UVG and MCL-JCV benchmarks show that ActDiff-VC achieves up to 64.6\% bitrate reduction at matched NIQE, improves KID by up to 64.6\% and FID by up to 37.7\% at comparable bitrates against strong learned codecs, and delivers favorable perceptual rate--distortion trade-offs relative to learned and diffusion-based baselines in the ultra-low-bitrate regime.

</details>


### [205] [Pixel Perfect: Relational Image Quality Assessment with Spatially-Aware Distortions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02863)
*Fadeel Sher Khan,Long N. Le,Abhinau K. Venkataramanan,Seok-Jun Lee,Hamid R. Sheikh*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 从绝对质量预测转向关系性和方向性评估的自监督图像质量评估方法，无需人工标注，提供可解释的局部失真信息


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统IQA方法依赖人工收集的平均意见分数，成本高且无法提供针对具体失真的可解释局部反馈

Method: 1. 使用自监督合成失真引擎生成训练数据；2. 训练具有反对称目标的失真预测网络，生成空间感知、解耦的失真图；3. 通过对比学习在有序排名图像集上训练评分网络预测关系质量分数

Result: 方法能够识别失真的类型、强度和方向，提供更细粒度和可解释的IQA，无需人工标注的质量分数

Conclusion: 该方法为图像处理算法的目标优化提供了更全面和可解释的IQA方法，消除了对人工标注的依赖

Abstract: Traditional image quality assessment (IQA) methods rely on mean opinion scores (MOS), which are resource-intensive to collect and fail to provide interpretable, localized feedback on specific image distortions. We overcome these limitations by shifting from absolute quality prediction to a relational and directional assessment. Our approach utilizes a self-supervised synthetic distortion engine to generate training data, eliminating the need for manual annotation. A distortion prediction network is trained with an anti-symmetric objective to produce spatially-aware, disentangled maps that identify the type, intensity, and direction of distortions relative to a reference image. Subsequently, a scoring network is trained via contrastive learning on ordinally ranked image sets to predict a relational quality score. Our method provides a more granular and interpretable approach to IQA for the targeted optimization of image processing algorithms without requiring any human-labeled quality scores.

</details>


### [206] [Laplacian Frequency Interaction Network for Rural Thematic Road Extraction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02866)
*Baiyan Chen,Weixin Zhai*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: LFINet：一种拉普拉斯频率交互网络，用于从农业机械轨迹图像中提取拓扑道路结构，解决现有方法因下采样模糊稀疏高频道路结构以及密集田间操作噪声导致拓扑碎片化的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 农村主题道路网络构建需要从农业机械运动轨迹图像中提取拓扑道路结构。现有方法面临两个主要挑战：1）常用的下采样方法会模糊稀疏的高频道路结构；2）密集田间操作的重噪声导致提取的网络出现碎片化或冗余拓扑。

Method: 提出LFINet网络，包含四个核心组件：1）拉普拉斯多尺度分离器（LMS），将图像解耦为低频语义上下文和高频结构细节；2）交叉频率交互块（CFIB），采用双路径架构，其中高频块（HFB）细化局部结构，空间变换器（ST）捕获全局语义；3）频率门控调制（FGM）机制，利用语义上下文校准结构细节；4）渐进重建解码器，迭代融合多尺度特征以确保拓扑一致性。

Result: 在河南省真实农业轨迹数据集上的实验表明，LFINet达到新的最先进水平：F1分数92.54%，IoU 86.12%，分别比第二名方法高出0.64%和1.1%。

Conclusion: LFINet能够有效从噪声和稀疏的田间数据中构建拓扑道路网络，验证了其处理农村主题道路网络构建挑战的能力。

Abstract: Rural thematic road network construction aims to extract topological road structures from movement trajectory images of agricultural machinery. However, this task faces challenges where downsampling methods commonly used in existing studies tend to blur the sparse high-frequency road structures, and the heavy noise from dense field operations often leads to fragmented or redundant topologies in the extracted networks. To address these challenges, we propose LFINet, a Laplacian Frequency Interaction Network. The network begins with a Laplacian Multi-scale Separator (LMS) to decouple the image into low-frequency semantic contexts and high-frequency structural details. These components are then processed by the Cross-Frequency Interaction Block (CFIB) through a dual-pathway architecture in which a High-Frequency Block (HFB) refines local structures while a Spatial Transformer (ST) captures global semantics. Subsequently, a Frequency Gated Modulation (FGM) mechanism integrates the features from pathways by leveraging semantic contexts to calibrate the structural details. Finally, a Progressive Reconstruction Decoder iteratively fuses multi-scale features to ensure topological consistency. Experiments conducted on a real-world agricultural trajectories dataset from Henan Province, China, show that LFINet establishes a new state-of-the-art. Specifically, it achieves an F1-score of 92.54% and an IoU of 86.12%, surpassing the second-ranked method by 0.64% and 1.1%, respectively. This confirms its capability to effectively construct topological road networks from noisy and sparse field data.

</details>


### [207] [AlbumFill: Album-Guided Reasoning and Retrieval for Personalized Image Completion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02892)
*Yu-Ju Tsai,Brian Price,Qing Liu,Luis Figueroa,Daniil Pakhomov,Zhihong Ding,Scott Cohen,Ming-Hsuan Yang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: AlbumFill：一种无需训练的个人相册图像补全框架，通过检索身份一致参考图像来修复遮挡区域


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有个性化图像补全方法要么依赖通用修复模型（难以保持身份一致性），要么假设用户提供了合适的参考图像。实际应用中，合适的参考图像通常不会明确提供，需要从个人相册中检索身份一致的图像。

Method: 提出AlbumFill训练免费框架：1）使用视觉语言模型推断缺失语义线索指导组合图像检索；2）从个人相册中检索身份一致参考图像；3）基于参考图像使用参考驱动的补全模型完成修复。创建了包含5.4万个人像样本及相关相册图像的数据集。

Result: 通过多个基线实验验证了个性化图像补全任务的难度，并证明了身份一致参考检索的重要性。AlbumFill在保持身份一致性方面表现优于现有方法。

Conclusion: AlbumFill通过从个人相册中检索身份一致参考图像，有效解决了个性化图像补全问题，无需训练且能保持身份一致性，为实际应用提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Personalized image completion aims to restore occluded regions in personal photos while preserving identity and appearance. Existing methods either rely on generic inpainting models that often fail to maintain identity consistency, or assume that suitable reference images are explicitly provided. In practice, suitable references are often not explicitly provided, requiring the system to search for identity-consistent images within personal photo collections. We present AlbumFill, a training-free framework that retrieves identity-consistent references from personal albums for personalized completion. Given an occluded image and a personal album, a vision-language model infers missing semantic cues to guide composed image retrieval, and the retrieved references are used by reference-based completion models. To facilitate this task, we introduce a dataset containing 54K human-centric samples with associated album images. Experiments across multiple baselines demonstrate the difficulty of personalized completion and highlight the importance of identity-consistent reference retrieval. Project Page: https://liagm.github.io/AlbumFill/

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [208] [Agentopic: A Generative AI Agent Workflow for Explainable Topic Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00833)
*Brice Valentin Kok-Shun,Johnny Chan,Gabrielle Peko,David Sundaram*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Agentopic 是一种基于智能体的可解释主题建模工作流，利用大语言模型的推理能力，通过多智能体协作实现主题识别、验证、层次分组和自然语言解释，提供透明可追溯的主题分配过程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有主题建模方法（如LDA和BERTopic）在主题分配或分组过程中缺乏透明度，用户难以理解主题是如何被分配或归类的，需要更可解释的替代方案。

Method: 采用基于大语言模型的多智能体协作工作流，智能体分别负责主题识别、验证、层次分组和自然语言解释，将可解释性嵌入整个工作流程。

Result: 在BBC数据集上，Agentopic的F1分数达到0.95，与GPT-4.1相当，优于LDA（0.93），接近BERTopic（0.98）。未使用种子主题时，生成了2045个语义连贯的主题，组织在六个层次级别中，极大丰富了原有的五类别结构。

Conclusion: Agentopic通过将可解释性嵌入工作流程，为黑盒模型提供了可解释的替代方案，特别适用于金融和医疗等关键应用领域，同时通过生成解释增强了数据集的丰富性和上下文。

Abstract: Agentopic is a novel agent-based workflow for explainable topic modeling that leverages the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs). Existing topic modeling approaches such as Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA) and BERTopic often lack transparency on how topics are assigned or grouped. Agentopic addresses this by using multiple agents that collaboratively perform topic identification, validation, hierarchical grouping, and natural language explanation. This design enables users to trace the reasoning behind topic assignments, enhancing interpretability without sacrificing accuracy. When seeded with topics from the British Broadcasting Corporation (BBC) dataset, Agentopic achieves an F1-score of 0.95, matching GPT-4.1, improving on LDA (0.93), and close to BERTopic (0.98). We used Agentopic to augment the BBC dataset with generated explanations to improve the dataset's richness and context. The unseeded Agentopic generated 2045 semantically coherent topics organized across six hierarchical levels, vastly enriching the original five-category structure. By embedding explainability throughout the workflow, Agentopic offers an interpretable alternative to black-box models, making it particularly valuable for crucial applications like finance and healthcare.

</details>


### [209] [Polynomial-Time Optimal Group Selection via the Double-Commutator Eigenvalue Problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00834)
*Mitchell A. Thornton*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出多项式时间算法解决代数多样性框架中的群选择问题，通过双交换子矩阵的最小特征向量直接构造最优群生成元，无需迭代优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 代数多样性框架用代数群作用替代时间平均进行二阶统计估计，但核心开放问题是群选择：给定M维观测数据，找到其协方差结构最佳匹配的有限群。枚举所有对称群子群需要指数时间，需要高效算法。

Method: 将组合优化问题简化为由协方差矩阵双交换子导出的广义特征值问题。双交换子矩阵的最小特征向量直接构造最优群生成元的闭式解，无需迭代优化。

Result: 获得多项式时间算法，复杂度O(d²M² + d³)，其中d是生成元基的维度。算法是精确的：双交换子最小特征值为零当且仅当最优生成元在基张成空间中，其大小提供可证明的最优性间隙。

Conclusion: 该工作建立了群论、矩阵分析和统计估计的新联系，与独立成分分析、结构化矩阵逼近问题和同时对角化相关，双交换子公式是唯一同时具备多项式时间、闭式解和可证明性的方法。

Abstract: The algebraic diversity framework replaces temporal averaging over multiple observations with algebraic group action on a single observation for second-order statistical estimation. The central open problem in this framework is $\textit{group selection}$: given an $M$-dimensional observation with unknown covariance structure, find the finite group whose spectral decomposition best matches the covariance. Naive enumeration of all subgroups of the symmetric group $S_M$ requires exponential time in $M$. We prove that this combinatorial problem reduces to a generalized eigenvalue problem derived from the double commutator of the covariance matrix, yielding a polynomial-time algorithm with complexity $O(d^2M^2 + d^3)$, where $d$ is the dimension of a generator basis. The minimum eigenvector of the double-commutator matrix directly constructs the optimal group generator in closed form, with no iterative optimization. The reduction is exact: the double-commutator minimum eigenvalue is zero if and only if the optimal generator lies in the span of the basis, and its magnitude provides a certifiable optimality gap when it does not. This problem does not appear in the standard catalogs of computational complexity (Garey and Johnson, 1979) and represents a new class linking group theory, matrix analysis, and statistical estimation. We establish connections to independent component analysis (JADE), structured matrix nearness problems, and simultaneous matrix diagonalization, and we show that the double-commutator formulation is the unique approach that is simultaneously polynomial-time, closed-form, and certifiable.

</details>


### [210] [Sparse Regression under Correlation and Weak Signals: A Reproducible Benchmark of Classical and Bayesian Methods](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00835)
*Hao Xiao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究系统比较了经典稀疏回归方法（Lasso、Elastic Net等）与贝叶斯方法（Horseshoe、Spike-and-Slab）在困难条件下的表现，包括相关特征、弱信号和高维情况。贝叶斯方法在预测误差方面表现更好，但Lasso在变量选择和计算效率上更实用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究很少在真正使稀疏回归变得困难的条件下一对一比较经典和贝叶斯稀疏回归方法。经典方法（如Lasso）计算快速但没有不确定性估计，而贝叶斯方法（如Horseshoe）能提供完整后验但计算耗时。需要在实际困难场景下系统比较这两种方法家族的性能差异。

Method: 在合成数据和真实数据（糖尿病数据集）上系统评估六种方法：OLS、Ridge、Lasso、Elastic Net、Horseshoe和Spike-and-Slab。实验设置包括三种协方差结构（相关性高达0.9）、四种信噪比水平、以及p∈{20, 50, 100}的维度，总计超过2,600次实验。

Result: 贝叶斯方法在预测误差方面表现最佳（MSE 72 vs. 108-267），Horseshoe能提供接近名义水平的95%覆盖率（94.8%）。Spike-and-Slab虽然区间更窄，但覆盖率不足（91.9%）。在变量选择方面，Lasso和Spike-and-Slab的F1分数相当（约0.47），当不需要后验分布时，Lasso是更实用的默认选择。

Conclusion: 贝叶斯方法在预测精度和不确定性量化方面具有优势，特别是Horseshoe在覆盖率方面表现良好。然而，对于变量选择任务且不需要后验分布时，Lasso凭借其计算效率和相当的F1分数成为更实用的选择。方法选择应基于具体需求：需要不确定性估计时选贝叶斯方法，追求计算效率时选经典方法。

Abstract: Choosing between classical and Bayesian sparse regression methods involves a real trade-off: penalized estimators like Lasso run in milliseconds but give no uncertainty estimates,while Horseshoe and Spike-and-Slab priors produce full posteriors but need MCMC chains that take minutes per fit.Surprisingly few studies compare these two families head-to-head under the conditions that actually make sparse regression hard -- correlated features, weak signals, and growing dimensionality. We benchmark six methods (OLS, Ridge,Lasso, Elastic Net, Horseshoe, Spike-and-Slab) on synthetic data with three covariance structures (rho up to 0.9), four SNR levels, and p in {20, 50, 100}, plus the Diabetes dataset,totalling over 2,600 experiments. The results are clear on some points and nuanced on others. Bayesian methods win on prediction error (MSE 72 vs. 108-267), and the Horseshoe delivers near-nominal 95% coverage (94.8%). But Spike-and-Slab,despite narrower intervals, under-covers at 91.9% -- its continuous relaxation likely plays a role. For variable selection, Lasso and Spike-and-Slab tie at F1 ~ 0.47, making Lasso the practical default when posteriors are not needed. Code and data are available at https://github.com/xiao98/sparse-bayesian-regression-bench.

</details>


### [211] [From Euler to Dormand-Prince: ODE Solvers for Flow Matching Generative Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00836)
*Hao Xiao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文系统比较了四种经典ODE求解器在流匹配生成模型中的效率，发现RK4在80次函数评估时就能达到Euler方法200次评估的样本质量，并揭示了学习速度场的雅可比特征谱在t=1附近变硬，以及低阶与高阶求解器质量差距在模型不完美时扩大的现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 流匹配生成模型采样需要求解ODE，计算成本主要来自神经网络前向传播。不同ODE求解器的效率差异及其对采样质量的影响尚未得到系统研究，特别是在实际应用中如何平衡计算成本与样本质量。

Method: 从泰勒展开原理推导了Euler、显式中点法、经典RK4和Dormand-Prince 5(4)四种经典ODE求解器，在PyTorch中从头实现，并在从2D玩具分布到MNIST数字的条件流匹配任务上系统基准测试效率。使用切片Wasserstein距离构建NFE-质量帕累托前沿。

Result: 1) RK4在80次函数评估时达到Euler方法200次评估的样本质量；2) 学习速度场的雅可比特征谱在t=1附近急剧变硬，解释了自适应Dormand-Prince求解器自动将步长预算集中在轨迹末端；3) 低阶与高阶求解器质量差距在训练不足和较小模型中扩大，表明模型不完美时求解器选择更重要。

Conclusion: 高阶ODE求解器（如RK4）在流匹配采样中比低阶方法（如Euler）更高效，能显著减少所需函数评估次数。当模型不完美时，求解器选择对样本质量影响更大。自适应求解器能自动适应速度场的变化特性，在轨迹末端分配更多计算资源。

Abstract: Sampling from Flow Matching generative models requires solving an ordinary differential equation (ODE) whose computational cost is dominated by neural network forward passes. We derive four classical ODE solvers -- Euler, Explicit Midpoint, Classical Runge-Kutta (RK4), and Dormand-Prince 5(4) -- from first principles via Taylor expansion, implement them from scratch in PyTorch, and systematically benchmark their efficiency on Conditional Flow Matching tasks ranging from 2D toy distributions to MNIST digits. On the quantitative side, we use sliced Wasserstein distance to construct NFE-quality Pareto frontiers,finding that RK4 at 80 function evaluations achieves sample quality comparable to Euler at 200. Beyond reproducing known convergence rates, we report two empirical observations: (1) the Jacobian eigenvalue spectrum of the learned velocity field stiffens sharply near t=1, explaining why the adaptive Dormand-Prince solver automatically concentrates its step budget at the end of the trajectory; (2) the quality gap between low-order and high-order solvers widens for undertrained and smaller models, indicating that solver choice matters most when the model is imperfect. Code and all experiment scripts are publicly available.

</details>


### [212] [Fast Log-Domain Sinkhorn Optimal Transport with Warp-Level GPU Reductions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00837)
*Hao Xiao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出FastSinkhorn，一个轻量级的原生CUDA实现，采用log-domain Sinkhorn算法，通过warp级shuffle归约和共享内存分块实现高GPU利用率，在小正则化参数下保持数值稳定性，在密集OT问题上比现有实现快12倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的熵正则化最优传输（OT）实现存在两个问题：对于小正则化参数数值不稳定，或者由于深度学习框架开销导致性能不佳。需要一种既保持数值稳定性又具有高性能的GPU实现。

Method: 提出FastSinkhorn，一个轻量级的原生CUDA实现，采用log-domain Sinkhorn算法，结合warp级shuffle归约和共享内存分块技术，完全在log域中计算，确保小正则化参数下的数值稳定性。

Result: 在n=m=8192的密集OT问题上，比广泛使用的POT库快12倍，比GPU加速的PyTorch基线快5.9倍，仅消耗256MB GPU内存。能够稳定处理小至ε=10^{-4}的正则化参数。

Conclusion: 通过精心设计的数值处理和原生CUDA内核，FastSinkhorn为大规模最优传输计算提供了实用且高效的基础，在图像颜色迁移、3D点云匹配等应用中验证了其有效性。

Abstract: Entropic regularized optimal transport (OT) via the Sinkhorn algorithm has become a fundamental tool in machine learning, yet existing implementations either suffer from numerical instability for small regularization parameters or incur significant overhead from deep learning frameworks. We present FastSinkhorn, a lightweight, native CUDA implementation of the log-domain Sinkhorn algorithm that combines warp-level shuffle reductions with shared-memory tiling to achieve high GPU utilization without sacrificing numerical stability. Our solver operates entirely in the log-domain, enabling robust computation for regularization parameters as small as epsilon = 10^{-4} where standard-domain methods fail. On dense OT problems with n = m = 8192, our implementation achieves 12x speedup over the widely-used POT library and 5.9x speedup over GPU-accelerated PyTorch baselines, while consuming only 256 MB of GPU memory. We validate our solver on image color transfer, 3D point cloud matching, and convergence analysis, demonstrating that native CUDA kernels with careful numerical treatment provide a practical and efficient foundation for large-scale optimal transport computation.

</details>


### [213] [GAZE: Grounded Agentic Zero-shot Evaluation with Viewer-Level Tools and Literature Retrieval on Rare Brain MRI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00876)
*Duaa Alim,Mogtaba Alim,Liam Chalcroft*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GAZE框架让医学视觉语言模型通过调用图像查看工具和医学检索工具，以迭代方式分析医学影像，在罕见神经系统疾病诊断中显著提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉语言模型对医学图像的分析是一次性前向传播，而放射科医生通常需要多次检查图像并查阅文献才能撰写报告。这种差异在罕见疾病诊断中尤为明显。

Method: GAZE框架让医学VLM能够迭代调用图像查看工具（缩放、窗宽窗位、对比度、边缘检测）和医学检索工具（PubMed医学文献、Open-i放射学图像），同时使用结构化输出和模式验证确保可审计性。

Result: 在包含281种罕见神经系统疾病的906个脑MRI病例的NOVA基准测试中，GAZE在病灶定位方面达到58.2 mAP@0.3，诊断准确率达到34.9% Top-1。工具使用对罕见疾病帮助更大：罕见病例的IoU>0.3比例从17%提升到58%。

Conclusion: 框架设计本身是重要的实验变量，结构化提示和模式验证输出已能显著提升性能。工具使用对罕见疾病诊断帮助更大，但检索消融实验显示诊断和定位之间存在权衡，需要联合评估诊断、定位和描述能力。

Abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) read an image and produce text in a single forward pass, whereas radiologists typically inspect an image several times and consult the literature before writing a report. We introduce GAZE (Grounded Agentic Zero-shot Evaluation), a framework that lets a medical VLM work in this iterative way by calling viewer-level tools (zoom, windowing, contrast, edge detection) and two retrieval tools backed by the U.S. National Library of Medicine (PubMed for medical literature, Open-i for radiological images), with structured outputs validated against a schema and full tool-call traces recorded for auditability. On NOVA, a benchmark of 906 brain MRI cases covering 281 rare neurological conditions, GAZE reaches 58.2 mean average precision (mAP) at intersection-over-union (IoU) 0.3 for lesion localisation and 34.9% Top-1 diagnostic accuracy under a joint protocol that scores captioning, diagnosis, and localisation from the image alone, without task-specific fine-tuning. Before any tool is used, structured prompting and schema-validated outputs already improve over the published Gemini 2.0 Flash baseline (20.2 to 29.4 mAP@0.3), so framework design is itself an experimental variable. Tool use helps rare pathologies disproportionately: the fraction of cases with IoU > 0.3 rises from 17% to 58% for diagnoses with three or fewer examples versus 25% to 68% for common conditions ($\geq$10 cases), with gains tracking engagement (Gemini 3 Flash: Cohen's d = 0.79, 11.8 tool calls per case; Gemini 2.0 Flash: tools used in 8.2% of cases, no significant benefit). Retrieval ablations additionally reveal a model-dependent trade-off in which gains in diagnosis can coincide with losses in localisation, reinforcing the case for joint evaluation of diagnosis, localisation, and captioning in medical VLMs.

</details>


### [214] [StyleShield: Exposing the Fragility of AIGC Detectors through Continuous Controllable Style Transfer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00924)
*Guantian Zheng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: StyleShield是一个基于流匹配的文本风格转换框架，通过DiT骨干网络和零初始化交叉注意力适配器，在连续token嵌入空间操作，实现AI生成文本的"去AI化"以逃避检测器识别，同时保持语义相似度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI生成内容检测器存在根本性矛盾：随着语言模型训练数据与人类写作数据趋同，AI与人类写作的统计边界将消失。商业利益导致检测服务与"去AI化"工具往往来自同一供应链，用内容来源判断替代了内容质量评估。

Method: 提出StyleShield框架，基于流匹配进行条件文本风格转换，在连续token嵌入空间操作，使用DiT骨干网络和零初始化交叉注意力适配器，条件化于冻结的Qwen-7B表示。推理时采用SDEdit范式，通过单个参数gamma平滑控制逃避检测与内容保留的权衡。

Result: 在多领域中文基准测试中，StyleShield对训练检测器达到94.6%的逃避率，对三个未见检测器逃避率≥99%，同时保持0.928的语义相似度。还提出RateAudit算法，证明检测率判决可被设定为任意值。

Conclusion: AI检测器存在根本可靠性问题，基于分数的评估方法不可靠。StyleShield框架有效逃避检测器，同时保持内容质量，这直接质疑了当前检测系统的有效性。

Abstract: AI-generated content (AIGC) detectors are increasingly deployed in high-stakes settings such as academic integrity screening, yet their reliability rests on a fundamental paradox: as language models are trained on human-written corpora, the statistical boundary between AI and human writing will inevitably dissolve as models improve. Commercial incentives have further distorted this landscape -- detection services and "de-AIification" tools often operate within the same supply chain, replacing evaluation of content quality with judgment of content origin. We present StyleShield, the first flow matching framework for conditional text style transfer, operating directly in continuous token embedding space via a DiT backbone with zero-initialized cross-attention adapters conditioned on frozen Qwen-7B representations. At inference, we adapt the SDEdit paradigm from image synthesis to text embeddings, with a single parameter gamma providing smooth continuous control over the evasion-preservation trade-off. On a multi-domain Chinese benchmark, StyleShield achieves 94.6% evasion against the training detector and >=99% against three unseen detectors, maintaining 0.928 semantic similarity. We further introduce RateAudit, a document-level scheduling algorithm that demonstrates detection-rate verdicts can be set to arbitrary values, directly questioning the reliability of score-based evaluation.

</details>


### [215] [Linking spatial biology and clinical histology via Haiku](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00925)
*Yan Cui,Jacob S. Leiby,Wenhui Lei,Dokyoon Kim,Yanxiang Deng,Aaron T. Mayer,Zhenqin Wu,Alexandro E. Trevino,Zhi Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Haiku是一个三模态对比学习模型，整合空间蛋白质组学、组织病理学和临床数据，实现跨模态检索、临床预测和零样本生物标志物推断。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前缺乏系统框架来联合建模分子、形态和临床数据，限制了基础与转化生物医学研究。需要一种能够整合多模态数据的方法。

Method: 开发Haiku三模态对比学习模型，在共享嵌入空间中对齐26.7百万个空间蛋白质组学图像块、H&E组织学图像和临床元数据。支持跨模态检索、下游分类、临床预测和零样本生物标志物推断。

Result: Haiku在跨模态检索（Recall@50达0.611）、生存预测（C-index 0.737，相对提升7.91%）和零样本生物标志物推断（52个生物标志物平均Pearson相关0.718）方面优于基线方法。反事实分析揭示了与乳腺癌进展和肺癌生存相关的分子变化模式。

Conclusion: Haiku通过三模态对齐实现了空间生物学的整合分析，将分子测量与临床背景联系起来，为生物探索提供了新工具。反事实结果为假设生成提供了信号。

Abstract: Integrating molecular, morphological, and clinical data is essential for basic and translational biomedical research, yet systematic frameworks for jointly modeling these modalities remain limited. Here we present Haiku, a tri-modal contrastive learning model trained on multiplexed immunofluorescence (mIF). It comprises 26.7 million spatial proteomics patches from 3,218 tissue sections across 1,606 patients spanning 11 organ types, with matched hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) histology and clinical metadata aligned in a shared embedding space. Haiku enables three-way cross-modal retrieval, improves downstream classification and clinical prediction tasks over unimodal baselines, and supports zero-shot biomarker inference through fusion retrieval conditioned on clinical metadata-only text descriptions. Across tasks, Haiku outperforms competing approaches, achieving cross-modal retrieval (Recall@50 up to 0.611 versus near-zero baseline), survival prediction (C-index 0.737, +7.91% relative improvement), and zero-shot biomarker inference (mean Pearson correlation 0.718 across 52 biomarkers). Furthermore, we introduce a counterfactual prediction framework in which modifying only clinical metadata while fixing tissue morphology surfaces niche-specific molecular shifts associated with breast cancer stage progression and lung cancer survival outcomes. In a lung adenocarcinoma case study, the counterfactual analysis recovers niche-specific shifts characterized by increased CD8 and granzyme B, reduced PD-L1, and decreased Ki67, broadly consistent with patterns reported for favorable outcomes. We present these counterfactual results as exploratory, hypothesis-generating signals rather than mechanistic claims. These capabilities demonstrate that tri-modal alignment via Haiku enables integrative analysis of spatial biology, bridging molecular measurements with clinical context for biological exploration.

</details>


### [216] [A Review of the Receiver Operating Characteristic Curve and a Proof About the Area Beneath It](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00926)
*Steven Redolfi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文对ROC曲线下面积（AUC）的概率解释进行了形式化论证，在假设不满足时给出了误差界限，并对ROC曲线相关文献进行了简要回顾。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ROC曲线下面积（AUC）通常被解释为分类器将随机正样本排在随机负样本之上的概率，但这一解释需要形式化的数学证明和条件分析。

Method: 对AUC的概率解释进行形式化数学论证，当假设不满足时推导误差界限，并对ROC曲线相关文献进行系统性回顾。

Result: 形式化证明了AUC的概率解释，给出了当假设不满足时的误差上界，并整理了ROC曲线的相关研究进展。

Conclusion: AUC的概率解释在特定条件下成立，当假设不满足时误差可控，该研究为ROC曲线的理论理解和实际应用提供了坚实基础。

Abstract: The Receiver Operating Characteristic (ROC) curve of a binary classifier has often been utilized to measure the performance of the classifier. The area beneath this curve is used in particular because of its quoted probabilistic interpretation as being equal to the probability that the classifier will rank a random positive observation above a random negative observation. This paper formalizes this claim, produces a bound on how far away from the truth it is if a hypothesis is not met, and gives a small literature review of the ROC curve.

</details>


### [217] [PhaseNet++: Phase-Aware Frequency-Domain Anomaly Detection for Industrial Control Systems via Phase Coherence Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00929)
*Raviteja Bommireddy,Varshith Bandaru,Lohith Pakala,Pradeep Kumar B*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PhaseNet++：首个系统研究工业控制系统（ICS）中相位域异常检测的方法，通过保留短时傅里叶变换的幅度和相位谱，利用相位一致性指数构建图注意力网络，在SWaT基准上取得优异性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前多变量时间序列异常检测方法主要基于原始时域幅值建模传感器间关系，但丢弃了时频变换产生的相位谱。作者认为相位信息构成了ICS异常检测中一个互补且被忽视的检测模态。

Method: 提出PhaseNet++，一种频域自编码器，在滑动传感器窗口的短时傅里叶变换上操作，保留幅度和相位谱。引入受神经科学相位锁定值启发的相位一致性指数（PCI），将跨频率箱的成对相位一致性总结为连续邻接矩阵，指导图注意力网络在相位同步传感器间优先传播信息。使用传感器令牌Transformer编码器捕获系统范围结构，双头解码器通过圆形和一致性感知目标联合重建幅度和相位。

Result: 在Secure Water Treatment（SWaT）基准测试中，PhaseNet++达到F1分数90.98%、ROC-AUC 95.66%、平均精度91.51%。消融研究表明相位感知前端和PCI图模块仅增加264,816个参数，表明相位归纳偏置是轻量级的。虽然绝对F1分数略低于某些原始值方法，但这是ICS相位域异常检测的首个系统研究。

Conclusion: 相位信息为ICS异常检测提供了有效的补充检测模态，PhaseNet++证明了相位域方法的可行性，虽然性能略低于最佳原始值方法，但为领域开辟了新的研究方向，且相位归纳偏置是轻量高效的。

Abstract: Multivariate time series anomaly detection in ICS has attracted growing attention due to the increasing threat of cyber-physical attacks on critical infrastructure. State-of-the-art methods model inter-sensor relationships from raw time-domain amplitude values, using graph neural networks, Transformers. However, these methods discard the phase spectrum produced by time frequency transformations, We argue that phase information constitutes a complementary and previously overlooked detection modality for ICS anomaly detection. We present PhaseNet++, a frequency-domain autoencoder that operates on the Short-Time Fourier Transform (STFT) of sliding sensor windows, retaining both magnitude and phase spectra. A Phase Coherence Index (PCI), inspired by the Phase Locking Value from neuroscience, summarizes pairwise phase consistency across frequency bins into a continuous adjacency matrix. This matrix guides a graph attention network that propagates information preferentially among phase-synchronized sensors. A sensor-token Transformer encoder captures system-wide structure, and a dual-head decoder reconstructs magnitude and phase jointly via circular and coherence-aware objectives. Evaluated on the Secure Water Treatment (SWaT) benchmark, PhaseNet++ achieves an F1-score of 90.98%, ROC-AUC of 95.66%, and average precision of 91.51%. Ablation studies show that the phase-aware front-end and PCI graph module together add only 264,816 parameters, demonstrating that the phase inductive bias is lightweight. While the absolute F1-score is second best than that of all recent raw-value methods evaluated under different protocols, we position this work as the first systematic study of phase-domain anomaly detection for ICS.

</details>


### [218] [Hierarchical Federated Learning for Networked AI: From Communication Saving to Architecture-Aware Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00931)
*Seyed Mohammad Azimi-Abarghouyi,Mehdi Bennis,Leandros Tassiulas*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出分层联邦学习（HFL）应超越传统通信节省协议的框架，将其重新定位为网络AI的架构感知设计框架，围绕三个设计轴：架构参数、分层优化分解和分层通信实现，强调收敛性能与架构选择直接相关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有联邦学习研究主要关注平面架构，忽视了现实多层级网络环境的特性。作者认为分层联邦学习不应仅被视为通信优化手段，而应作为网络AI系统的架构设计框架，以更好地适应真实分布式环境。

Method: 提出基于三个耦合设计轴的系统框架：1）架构参数（层级深度、层间不对称性、分层连接性）；2）分层优化分解（全局目标在层间的分解策略）；3）分层通信实现（异构通信机制下的物理实现）。以大规模无线边缘智能为典型案例，对比分析了平面FL、两层HFL和深度HFL。

Result: 建立了HFL作为架构依赖型分布式优化的理论视角，证明收敛性能直接受层级结构、优化角色分配和通信机制的影响。提供了基于不同网络体制的设计指导图，为未来网络AI系统设计提供了实用方法论。

Conclusion: 分层联邦学习应被视为网络AI系统的架构感知设计框架，而非单纯的通信优化技术。通过三个设计轴的协同设计，HFL能够为未来分布式智能系统提供可扩展、高效的实现方案，特别是在大规模无线边缘智能等复杂网络环境中。

Abstract: Federated learning (FL) is fundamentally a distributed optimization problem executed by communicating agents with local data, local computation, and partial system visibility. Once FL is viewed through that lens, hierarchy is not merely a scalability mechanism. It becomes the natural place to rethink how distributed optimization should be organized over real multi-tier networks. This article argues that hierarchical federated learning (HFL) should move beyond its common framing as a communication-saving protocol and instead be viewed as an architecture-aware design framework for networked AI. The framework is organized around three coupled design axes: architectural parameters, layer-wise optimization decomposition, and layer-wise communication realization. The first axis determines the coordination geometry of learning through hierarchy depth, layer asymmetry, and layered connectivity. The second determines how the global FL objective is decomposed across layers and highlights modular multi-layer optimization as a major opportunity beyond one dominant method everywhere. The third determines how the distributed optimization is physically realized under heterogeneous communication regimes, from interference-limited lower tiers to reliable upper tiers. A central message is that, in HFL, convergence becomes architecture-dependent: it is directly shaped by the chosen hierarchy, the assigned optimization roles, and the communication mechanisms that connect them. We develop this viewpoint using large-scale wireless edge intelligence as a flagship networked AI setting, then provide a comparative perspective on flat FL, two-tier HFL, and deep HFL together with a regime-oriented design map. The resulting perspective positions HFL as a practical methodology for designing future networked AI systems.

</details>


### [219] [CGM-JEPA: Learning Consistent Continuous Glucose Monitor Representations via Predictive Self-Supervised Pretraining](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00933)
*Hada Melino Muhammad,Zechen Li,Flora Salim,Ahmed A. Metwally*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出CGM-JEPA自监督预训练框架，通过预测掩码潜在表示而非原始值，实现跨模态迁移；X-CGM-JEPA增加掩码血糖密度跨视图目标，提升分布信息。在三个临床场景中表现最优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 连续血糖监测（CGM）可检测早期代谢亚型（胰岛素抵抗、β细胞功能障碍），但大规模部署面临两个耦合问题：同一生理状态通过多个视图（CGM时间序列、静脉OGTT、血糖密度摘要）呈现，单视图表示在模态或设置变化时无法迁移；基线方法在这些变化中表现不一致。需要能抽象单视图、捕捉高层次时空和分布结构的表示。

Method: 提出CGM-JEPA自监督预训练框架，预测掩码潜在表示而非原始值，实现跨模态抽象。X-CGM-JEPA增加掩码血糖密度跨视图目标，提供补充分布信息。使用228名受试者的约389k未标记CGM读数进行预训练，在两个临床队列（N=27和N=17公开子集）上评估，采用20次×2折交叉验证。

Result: X-CGM-JEPA在所有三个场景（队列泛化、静脉到CGM迁移、家庭CGM）中，对两个终点的AUROC均排名第一或第二，而基线方法无法做到。在队列泛化中比最强基线高+6.5个百分点，在静脉到CGM迁移中高+3.6个百分点（配对Wilcoxon，p<0.001）。在模态偏移下，匹配平均AUROC同时向弱势亚组重新分配（种族AUROC差距缩小25-54%）；在稀疏域内静脉数据上，分布视图提升标签感知聚类（ARI +39%，NMI +40%）。

Conclusion: CGM-JEPA和X-CGM-JEPA通过自监督预训练和多视图学习，有效解决CGM部署中的模态迁移问题，在跨场景泛化、减少健康差异和提升聚类性能方面显著优于基线方法。

Abstract: Continuous Glucose Monitoring (CGM) can detect early metabolic subphenotypes (insulin resistance, IR; $β$-cell dysfunction), but population-scale deployment faces two coupled problems. First, the same physiological state appears through multiple views (CGM time series, venous OGTT, Glucodensity summaries), so single-view representations fail to transfer when deployment shifts the modality or setting. Second, baselines perform inconsistently across these shifts. Both problems point to one remedy: representations that abstract away from any single view to capture higher-level temporal and distributional structure. We propose CGM-JEPA, a self-supervised pretraining framework which predicts masked latent representations rather than raw values, yielding abstraction that transfers across modalities. X-CGM-JEPA adds a masked Glucodensity cross-view objective for complementary distributional information. We pretrain on $\sim$389k unlabeled CGM readings from 228 subjects and evaluate on two clinical cohorts ($N=27$ and $N=17$ public-release subsets) across three regimes (cohort generalization, venous-to-CGM transfer, home CGM) under 20-iteration $\times$ 2-fold cross-validation. X-CGM-JEPA ranks first or second on AUROC for both endpoints across all three regimes while no baseline does, exceeding the strongest baseline by up to $+6.5$ pp in cohort generalization and $+3.6$ pp in venous-to-CGM transfer (paired Wilcoxon, $p<0.001$). Under modality shift, it matches mean AUROC while redistributing toward weaker subgroups (ethnicity AUROC gap shrinks 25-54%); on sparse in-domain venous data, the distributional view lifts label-aware clustering (ARI $+39\%$, NMI $+40\%$). Code and weights: https://github.com/cruiseresearchgroup/CGM-JEPA

</details>


### [220] [Structured Analytic Coherent Point Drift for Non-Rigid Point Set Registration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00934)
*Wei Feng,Haiyong Zheng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Analytic-CPD：一种用于非刚性点集配准的结构化解析变体CPD方法，用有限维结构化解析映射替代高斯核位移场，通过截断多元泰勒映射表示变形，在代表性大变形场景中实现更低最终误差和更快收敛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准相干点漂移(CPD)方法使用点索引的高斯核位移场，导致M×M核系统复杂度高，且在大变形场景中可能不稳定。需要一种更紧凑、可解释且能处理大变形的非刚性配准方法。
