Method: 保留CPD的后验对应层，但用有限维结构化解析映射估计器替代高斯核位移场。通过重心恒等式将GMM后验概率凝聚为加权软目标点，将CPD成对软对应目标转换为加权解析拟合问题。使用截断多元泰勒映射表示变形，变形参数数量由环境维度和解析阶数控制而非移动点数的核系统。采用阶数延续策略逐步激活高阶解析模式以稳定大变形配准。

Result: 在二维解析变形和三维平滑非解析变形实验中，Analytic-CPD在代表性大变形设置中比标准CPD实现更低的最终误差和更快的收敛速度。

Conclusion: CPD风格的概率对应和结构化解析映射为基于核的非刚性配准提供了紧凑且可解释的替代方案，能够有效处理大变形场景。

Abstract: We introduce Analytic-CPD, a structured analytic variant of coherent point drift for non-rigid point set registration. The method retains the CPD posterior correspondence layer, but replaces the point-indexed Gaussian-kernel displacement-field M-step with a finite-dimensional structured analytic mapping estimator. Posterior probabilities from the Gaussian mixture model are condensed through a barycentric identity into weighted soft target points, converting the CPD pairwise soft-correspondence objective into a weighted analytic fitting problem. The deformation is represented by a truncated multivariate Taylor mapping of a vector-valued function, so the number of deformation parameters is controlled by the ambient dimension and the analytic order rather than by an M-by-M kernel system over the moving points. A degree-continuation strategy is further introduced to stabilize large-deformation registration by progressively activating higher-order analytic modes. Experiments on two-dimensional analytic deformations and three-dimensional smooth non-analytic deformations show that Analytic-CPD achieves lower final errors and faster convergence than standard CPD in representative large-deformation settings. The results suggest that CPD-style probabilistic correspondences and structured analytic mappings provide a compact and interpretable alternative to kernel-based non-rigid registration. Code is available at https://github.com/monge-ampere/Analytic-CPD.

</details>


### [221] [Watch Your Step: Information Injection in Diffusion Models via Shadow Timestep Embedding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00935)
*An Huang,Junggab Son,Zuobin Xiong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种名为Shadow Timestep Embedding (STE)的新颖机制，探索扩散模型中未充分利用的时间步嵌入空间，用于恶意信息注入和安全风险分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前扩散模型研究主要集中在提高生成效率和质量，而时间步嵌入作为扩散管道的关键组件，虽然包含大量信息，但在安全风险和可靠溯源方面仍未被充分探索。研究者希望填补这一空白，研究时间步嵌入作为侧信道的信息承载能力。

Method: 提出Shadow Timestep Embedding (STE)机制，深入分析时间步嵌入空间的特征表示能力，发现不同时间步具有不同的信息编码能力，可以通过调度器接口进行攻击和防御。对时间步嵌入进行位置编码映射的理论分析，推导出互相干评估来解释不相交时间步区间的可分性。

Result: 研究发现扩散模型的时间步可以作为强大的侧信道来承载特定信息，揭示了时间步嵌入在恶意信息注入方面的潜力，为理解时间维度提供了新的视角。

Conclusion: 时间步嵌入空间是扩散模型中一个未被充分探索但具有重要安全意义的研究方向，通过理解时间维度可以为对抗性生成建模开辟新的研究方向。

Abstract: Diffusion models have become the foundation of modern generative systems, with most research focusing primarily on improving generation efficiency and output quality. The timestep embedding component is a crucial part of the diffusion pipeline, which provides a temporal conditioning signal to the denoising network, enabling it to adapt its predictions across different noise levels throughout the process. Despite their potential to contain substantial information, timestep embeddings remain underexplored in current research, especially for security risks and reliable provenance. To fill this gap, we introduce Shadow Timestep Embedding (STE), a novel mechanism that investigates the underutilized temporal space for malicious information injection into diffusion models. In particular, when zooming in on the timestep embedding space, we find that different timesteps exhibit distinct representational capabilities that can encode side-channel information. Moreover, such encoded information can be utilized for attack and defense purposes through the scheduler interface. We present a theoretical analysis of timestep embeddings as position-encoding mappings and derive a mutual coherence evaluation that explains the separability of disjoint timestep intervals. Our findings reveal the diffusion model's timestep as a powerful side channel for carrying dedicated information, motivating new directions for adversarial generative modeling by understanding the temporal dimension.

</details>


### [222] [EventADL: Open-Box Anomaly Detection and Localization Framework for Events in Cloud-Based Service Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00936)
*Luan Pham,Victor Nicolet,Joey Dodds,Hui Guan,Daniel Kroening*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: EventADL：首个基于事件数据的云系统异常检测与定位框架，通过分析事件语义模式和频率模式来识别异常，并构建干预图进行根因定位，在真实云服务系统中表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前异常检测与定位研究主要关注指标和日志数据，而事件数据尚未被充分探索。云系统中事件数据包含丰富的系统交互信息，对异常检测和根因定位具有重要价值。

Method: 提出EventADL框架，包含三个阶段：离线训练阶段学习事件语义模式（ESP）和事件频率模式（EFP）；在线异常检测阶段识别偏离正常模式的事件；根因定位阶段构建干预图自动定位根因。

Result: 在三个真实云服务系统和两个真实世界事件上评估，EventADL优于现有方法，异常检测F1分数至少90%，根因定位前3准确率达到100%。

Conclusion: EventADL是首个基于事件数据的开箱即用异常检测与定位框架，能够高效处理无标签数据，提供可解释的异常及其根因，为云系统可靠性维护提供有效工具。

Abstract: Anomaly detection and localization (ADL) is critical for maintaining reliability and availability in cloud systems. Recent ADL developments focus on metric and log data, leaving event data unexplored. To address this gap, we propose EventADL, the first open-box event-based ADL framework for cloud-based service systems. To motivate the design of our framework, we conduct a systematic analysis on 520 real-world incidents, and provide insights into how anomalies and their root causes manifest through event data. EventADL has three phases: offline training, online anomaly detection, and root cause localization. During the training phase, EventADL first learns Event Semantic Patterns (ESPs), which capture normal interactions between system entities using historical event data, and then learns Event Frequency Patterns (EFPs), which capture the normal frequency of known ESPs. In the online anomaly detection phase, any data in the event stream that deviates significantly from either pattern is identified as anomalous. For localization, EventADL constructs an Intervention Graph that models the relationships between recent system interactions and the detected anomalies for automatic root cause localization. The framework is designed to operate efficiently with unlabeled data and to produce interpretable anomalies with their corresponding root causes. Our evaluation on three real cloud service systems and two real-world incidents demonstrates that EventADL outperforms existing methods, achieving F1-scores of at least 90% for anomaly detection and 100% top-3 accuracy in root cause localization.

</details>


### [223] [Fusing Urban Structure and Semantics: A Conditional Diffusion Model for Cross-City OD Matrix Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00938)
*Bin Chen,Zhuoya Meng,Fang Yang,Runkang Guo,Jingtao Ding,Yin Zhang,Chuan Ai,Zhengqiu Zhu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SEDAN是一种基于结构增强扩散模型的通用OD矩阵生成方法，通过图表示融合城市语义和空间约束，显著提升通勤流预测精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 通勤流建模对城市治理、交通规划和资源配置很重要，但由于个体意图、地理约束和社会动态的复杂交互，通勤模式存在显著异质性，现有模型难以跨城市泛化。

Method: 将城市建模为属性图，区域作为节点（含人口和兴趣点特征），通勤流作为加权边。设计融合机制联合建模语义信息和空间信息：使用图变换器建模节点交互捕获潜在出行需求，同时将邻接矩阵和距离矩阵作为显式约束注入生成过程。

Result: 在美国城市真实OD数据集上的实验表明，SEDAN相比最先进基线WEDAN在RMSE指标上提升了7.38%，在异构城市场景和不同结构模式中保持鲁棒性。

Conclusion: SEDAN提供了一种有效且可推广的通勤OD矩阵生成解决方案，融合城市语义和空间约束，能生成行为合理且地理连贯的OD矩阵。

Abstract: Accurate modeling of commuting flows is important for urban governance, traffic planning, and resource allocation. However, the combined influence of individual intentions, geographic constraints, and social dynamics leads to considerable heterogeneity in commuting patterns, making it difficult to develop generation models that generalize across cities. To address this issue, we propose SEDAN, a Structure-Enhanced Diffusion model conditioned on Attributed Nodes for generalizable OD matrix generation. SEDAN models a city as an attributed graph. Each region is treated as a node with demographic and point-of-interest features, and commuting flows are modeled as weighted edges. Adjacency and distance matrices are incorporated to characterize spatial structure. Based on this representation, we design a fusion mechanism within SEDAN to jointly model semantic information and spatial information. Regional semantic attributes are used to model latent travel demand through graph-transformer-based node interactions, while spatial structure is injected into the generation process as explicit constraints. The adjacency matrix guides attention weights to strengthen interactions between neighboring regions. Meanwhile, the distance matrix serves as a diffusion condition to capture spatial proximity and travel impedance. The fusion of urban semantics and spatial constraints enables SEDAN to generate OD matrices that are both behaviorally plausible and geographically coherent. Experiments on real-world OD datasets from U.S. cities show that SEDAN achieves a 7.38\% improvement in RMSE over the state-of-the-art baseline, WEDAN. It also remains robust across heterogeneous urban scenarios and varying structural patterns. Our work provides an effective and generalizable solution for commuting OD matrix generation. The code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/SEDAN.

</details>


### [224] [From Flat Facts to Sharp Hallucinations: Detecting Stubborn Errors via Gradient Sensitivity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00939)
*Yee Zhing Liew,Andrew Huey Ping Tan,Anwar P. P Abdul Majeed*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出EPGS方法，通过扰动输入嵌入并测量梯度变化来检测LLM中的"顽固幻觉"——模型自信但错误的输出


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统幻觉检测方法在"顽固幻觉"上失效，这些是LLM自信但错误的输出。需要区分稳定知识和脆弱记忆导致的错误

Method: 提出嵌入扰动梯度敏感度(EPGS)：通过高斯噪声扰动输入嵌入，测量梯度幅度的峰值变化。这作为Hessian谱的有效代理，区分平坦最小值（稳定事实）和尖锐最小值（顽固幻觉）

Result: 实验表明EPGS显著优于基于熵和表示的方法，为检测高置信度事实错误提供了稳健信号

Conclusion: EPGS通过几何视角有效检测顽固幻觉，为LLM可靠性评估提供了新方法，区分了基于稳定知识的输出和脆弱记忆导致的自信错误

Abstract: Traditional hallucination detection fails on "Stubborn Hallucinations" -- errors where LLMs are confidently wrong. We propose a geometric solution: Embedding-Perturbed Gradient Sensitivity (EPGS). We hypothesize that while robust facts reside in flat minima, stubborn hallucinations sit in sharp minima, supported by brittle memorization. EPGS detects this sharpness by perturbing input embeddings with Gaussian noise and measuring the resulting spike in gradient magnitude. This acts as an efficient proxy for the Hessian spectrum, differentiating stable knowledge from unstable memorization. Our experiments show that EPGS significantly outperforms entropy-based and representation-based baselines, providing a robust signal for detecting high-confidence factual errors.

</details>


### [225] [Interpretable experiential learning based on state history and global feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00940)
*Anton Kolonin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于状态历史和全局反馈的可解释经验学习模型，用于解决资源受限环境下的强化学习问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决资源受限环境中的强化学习问题，需要一种可解释且高效的学习模型，而不是依赖计算密集的神经网络方法。

Method: 基于状态历史和全局反馈构建行为模型，表示为状态集合之间的转移图，转移边带有效用和证据计数属性。

Result: 在OpenAI Gym Atari Breakout基准测试中表现良好，性能可与一些已知的神经网络解决方案相媲美。

Conclusion: 该可解释经验学习模型为资源受限环境提供了一种有效的强化学习解决方案，具有与神经网络方法相当的性能。

Abstract: A new interpretable experiential learning model based on state history and global feedback is presented. It is capable of learning a behavioral model represented by a transition graph between sets of states, with transitions attributed with utility and evidence count. This model is expected to be suitable for solving reinforcement learning problem in resource-constrained environments. The model was thoroughly evaluated on the OpenAI Gym Atari Breakout benchmark, demonstrating performance comparable to some known neural network-based solutions.

</details>


### [226] [Divergence is Uncertainty: A Closed-Form Posterior Covariance for Flow Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00941)
*Jiarui Xing,Song Wang,Jian Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Flow matching的生成不确定性可以通过速度场的散度精确计算，无需重新训练或额外计算成本


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法量化flow matching生成不确定性的方法存在训练成本高、推理成本高或精度不足的问题，需要一种无需重新训练且计算高效的方法

Method: 提出"散度-不确定性恒等式"，证明干净数据的后验协方差迹等于速度场散度乘以已知时间相关因子再加常数，可直接用于预训练模型

Result: 在MNIST上验证了不确定性图在数字边界处语义上有意义，不确定性分数能跟踪实际预测误差，计算成本比集成方法低约10,000倍

Conclusion: 该方法为flow matching提供了精确、高效的不确定性量化，无需重新训练或架构修改，显著优于现有方法

Abstract: Flow matching has become a leading framework for generative modeling, but quantifying the uncertainty of its samples remains an open problem. Existing approaches retrain the model with auxiliary variance heads, maintain costly ensembles, or propagate approximate covariance through many integration steps, trading off training cost, inference cost, or accuracy. We show that none of these trade-offs is necessary. We prove that, for any pre-trained flow matching velocity field, the trace of the posterior covariance over the clean data given the current state equals, in closed form, the divergence of the velocity field, up to a known time-dependent prefactor and an additive constant. We call this the \emph{divergence-uncertainty identity} for flow matching. The matrix-level form of the identity is similarly closed-form, depending solely on the velocity Jacobian. Because the identity is exact and post-hoc, it is computable on any pre-trained flow matching model, with no retraining and no architectural modification. For one-step generators such as MeanFlow, the same identity yields the exact end-to-end generation uncertainty in a single forward pass, eliminating the multi-step variance propagation required by all prior methods. Experiments on MNIST confirm that the resulting per-pixel uncertainty maps are semantically meaningful, concentrating on digit boundaries where inter-sample variation is highest, and that the scalar uncertainty score tracks actual prediction error, all at roughly 10,000$\times$ less total compute than ensembling or Monte Carlo dropout.

</details>


### [227] [Graph Rewiring in GNNs to Mitigate Over-Squashing and Over-Smoothing: A Survey](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00951)
*Hugo Attali,Nathalie Pernelle,Davide Buscaldi,Fragkiskos D. Malliaros*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该综述论文系统回顾了图重布线技术，这些技术通过修改图拓扑结构来解决GNN中的过度压缩和过度平滑问题，从而改善信息传播。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 图神经网络在从图结构数据中学习时面临两个关键挑战：过度压缩（来自遥远节点的信息被过度压缩）和过度平滑（重复传播导致节点表示变得不可区分）。这两种现象源于消息传递与输入拓扑之间的相互作用，最终会降低信息流的质量并限制GNN的性能。

Method: 该论文采用综述方法，全面回顾了图重布线技术这一类别的方法。这些方法旨在修改图拓扑结构以增强GNN中的信息传播。论文深入探讨了最先进的重布线方法，包括它们的理论基础、实际实现和性能权衡。

Result: 论文提供了对图重布线技术的全面回顾，包括这些技术的理论背景、实现方式和在不同场景下的性能表现。通过分析现有方法，论文展示了重布线技术如何有效缓解GNN中的信息传播问题。

Conclusion: 图重布线技术是解决GNN中过度压缩和过度平滑问题的有效方法。通过修改图拓扑结构，这些技术能够显著改善信息传播，从而提升GNN的性能。该综述为研究者和实践者提供了对这一领域技术和方法的系统理解。

Abstract: Graph Neural Networks are powerful models for learning from graph-structured data, yet their effectiveness is often limited by two critical challenges: over-squashing, where information from distant nodes is excessively compressed, and over-smoothing, where repeated propagation makes node representations indistinguishable. Both phenomena stem from the interaction between message passing and the input topology, ultimately degrading information flow and limiting the performance of GNNs. In this survey, we examine graph rewiring techniques, a class of methods designed to modify the graph topology to enhance information propagation in GNNs. We provide a comprehensive review of state-of-the-art rewiring approaches, delving into their theoretical underpinnings, practical implementations, and performance trade-offs.

</details>


### [228] [Robust volatility updates for Hierarchical Gaussian Filtering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00966)
*Christoph Mathys,Nicolas Legrand,Peter Thestrup Waade,Nace Mikus,Lilian Aline Weber*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出改进的二次近似方法，解决HGF网络中波动耦合节点可能产生负后验精度的问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 原始的HGF更新方程在参数空间的某些区域可能导致负后验精度（逻辑上不可能），使算法终止出错

Method: 引入改进的二次近似方法，在两个二次展开之间插值：一个在先验预测处，另一个在通过Lambert W函数获得的第二模态处

Result: 新的更新方程在整个参数空间都鲁棒，即使对于大的预测误差也能准确跟踪变分后验

Conclusion: 解决了HGF波动耦合节点的负后验精度问题，提高了算法的稳定性和可靠性

Abstract: Hierarchical Gaussian Filtering (HGF) networks allow for efficient updating of posterior distributions (beliefs) about hidden states of an agent's environment. HGF parent nodes can target the mean or variance of their children. New information entering at input nodes leads to a cascade of belief updates across the network according to one-step update equations for each node's mean and precision (inverse variance). However, the original form of the update equations for variance-targeting parents(volatility coupling) can in some regions of parameter space lead to negative posterior precision, a logical impossibility which causes the updating algorithm to terminate with an error. In this report, we introduce a modified quadratic approximation to the variational energy of volatility-coupled nodes that avoids negative posterior precision. The key idea is to interpolate between two quadratic expansions of the variational energy: one at the prior prediction and one at a second mode whose location is obtained in closed form via the Lambert W function. The resulting update equations are robust across the entire parameter space and faithfully track the variational posterior even for large prediction errors.

</details>


### [229] [Physiology-Aware Masked Cross-Modal Reconstruction for Biosignal Representation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00973)
*Hao Zhou,Simon A. Lee,Cyrus Tanade,Keum San Chun,Juhyeon Lee,Migyeong Gwak,Megha Thukral,Justin Sung,Eugene Hwang,Mehrab Bin Morshed,Li Zhu,Viswam Nathan,Md Mahbubur Rahman,Subramaniam Venkatraman,Sharanya Arcot Desai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: xMAE是一个用于生物信号预训练的框架，通过跨模态的掩码重建来捕捉不同生物信号之间的时间顺序关系，从而学习到更具生理意义的表征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的自监督学习方法通常将来自身体不同位置的生物信号视为可互换的视图，忽略了它们之间存在的方向性时间动态关系。例如，心电图（ECG）捕捉心脏电活动的起始，而光电容积脉搏波（PPG）记录的是由血管动力学延迟的周围脉搏，两者之间存在明确的时间顺序关系。

Method: xMAE框架采用跨模态掩码重建作为训练约束，在时间顺序的生物信号之间进行掩码重建，以鼓励学习到的表征具有生理意义的时间结构。具体来说，它利用ECG和PPG等信号之间的已知时间延迟关系来指导预训练过程。

Result: xMAE预训练得到的表征在19个下游任务中的15个上优于单模态和多模态基线方法，包括心血管结果预测、异常实验室检测、睡眠分期和人口统计推断等任务，并且能够跨设备、身体位置和采集设置进行泛化。

Conclusion: xMAE证明了在信号观察共享底层过程的不同阶段时，将时间结构融入多模态预训练的有效性。该方法不仅适用于ECG-PPG关系，更广泛地展示了利用时间顺序关系提升生物信号表征学习性能的潜力。

Abstract: Biosignals acquired from different locations on the body often provide temporally ordered views of the same underlying physiological process. However, most existing self supervised learning methods treat these signals as interchangeable views, overlooking the directional temporal dynamics that link them. A canonical example is the relationship between electrocardiography (ECG), which captures the electrical activation initiating each heartbeat, and photoplethysmography (PPG), which records the resulting peripheral pulse delayed by vascular dynamics. To capture this structured relationship, we introduce xMAE, a biosignal pretraining framework that leverages masked cross modal reconstruction across temporally ordered biosignals as a training time constraint to encourage physiologically meaningful timing structure in the learned representations. We show that pretraining with xMAE yields representations that outperform both unimodal and multimodal baselines on 15 of 19 downstream tasks, including cardiovascular outcome prediction, abnormal laboratory test detection, sleep staging, and demographic inference, while generalizing across devices, body locations, and acquisition settings. Further analysis suggests that the ECG PPG timing structure is reflected in the learned PPG representations. More broadly, xMAE demonstrates the effectiveness of incorporating temporal structure into multimodal pretraining when signals observe different stages of a shared underlying process. Code is available at https://github.com/hzhou3/xMAE.

</details>


### [230] [Continual Learning of Feedback-based Molecular Communication](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01020)
*Siddhant Setia,Junichi Suzuki,Tadashi Nakano*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种基于持续学习算法的性能估计方法，用于反馈式分子通信协议的顺序仿真实验，通过定制正则化和回放策略来持续学习一系列估计任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为分子通信协议开发一种能够持续学习新任务而不遗忘旧任务的性能估计方法，解决传统方法在顺序实验场景中的局限性。

Method: 基于标准神经网络架构，定制损失函数中的正则化和回放策略，使估计器能够在连续仿真结果流中增量学习，适应各种实验设置。

Result: 实验结果表明，所提出的估计器能有效学习连续仿真结果流，相比基线神经网络提高了估计精度，并可在不同计算成本下实现性能增强。

Conclusion: 该研究建立了持续学习在分子通信领域的应用价值，展示了CL方法在顺序仿真实验中的有效性，为相关研究提供了新思路。

Abstract: This paper proposes and evaluates a new performance estimation method that leverages continual learning (CL) algorithms to carry out sequential simulation experiments for a feedback-based molecular communication protocol. As the protocol is sequentially examined in various experimental settings, the proposed CL-based performance estimators incrementally learn a series of unexperienced estimation tasks without compromising those that have been learned in the past. They are designed to work on a standard neural network architecture by customizing regularization and replay strategies in the loss function. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed estimators can effectively learn on a continuous stream of simulation results and enhance the baseline neural network by improving estimation accuracy at a variety of computational costs. This paper's contribution is to establish the implications of CL in the field of molecular communication.

</details>


### [231] [Finite-Sample Analysis of Elimination in Active Hypothesis Testing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01039)
*Ziyuan Lin,Hoang Ngoc Nguyen,Jie Xu,Ivan Ruchkin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种增强的Track-and-Stop算法，通过逐步剔除假设来减少停止时间，在非主导项上获得有限样本收益。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 主动假设检验在安全关键应用中需要有限样本下的固定置信度保证。在序列假设检验框架下，研究假设剔除对停止时间的影响，旨在加速决策过程。

Method: 提出消除增强的Track-and-Stop算法：逐步剪枝特定冠军-对手对，将感知资源重新分配给存活假设；引入攻击性参数调节消除速度与置信保证的权衡。

Result: 推导了期望停止时间的非渐近上界；消除带来的收益体现在非主导项上，源于缩减假设集上更紧的跟踪和集中常数；合成高斯实例实验验证了理论预测。

Conclusion: 假设消除能有效减少序列假设检验的停止时间，特别是在有限样本场景下；通过攻击性参数可实现消除速度与置信保证的灵活权衡。

Abstract: A fixed-confidence, finite-sample problem of active hypothesis testing arises in many safety-critical applications. Situated in the context of sequential hypothesis testing, this paper studies the effect of hypothesis elimination on the stopping time. We introduce an elimination-augmented Track-and-Stop algorithm, in which champion-specific active-opponent sets are progressively pruned, and sensing effort is reallocated toward the surviving alternatives. Our analysis derives a non-asymptotic upper bound on the expected stopping time. The gain in finite-sample from elimination appears on the scale of the non-leading term, resulting from tighter tracking and concentration constants on the reduced hypothesis set. Furthermore, we introduce an aggressiveness parameter to modulate the trade-off between faster elimination and weaker confidence guarantee. An experimental study on synthetic Gaussian instances confirms the theoretical predictions.

</details>


### [232] [Learning in the Fisher Subspace: A Guided Initialization for LoRA Fine-Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01046)
*Zhi-Quan Feng,Ying-Jia Lin,Hung-Yu Kao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于Fisher信息的数据感知LoRA初始化方法，通过下游数据分布引导适配子空间选择，显著提升下游任务性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LoRA初始化方法仅依赖预训练权重的内在属性，忽略了模型与下游数据分布的交互，导致可能选择任务无关的适配方向，严重影响下游性能。

Method: 提出Fisher引导的框架，利用下游数据诱导的曲率信息来刻画参数扰动对模型预测的影响，基于数据感知的敏感性而非仅权重幅度来选择LoRA适配子空间。

Result: 在多种任务和模态上的实验结果表明，数据感知的初始化方法相比现有方法能一致且显著地提升下游任务性能。

Conclusion: 数据感知的敏感性比仅基于权重的幅度更能有效指导LoRA适配子空间的选择，Fisher引导的初始化方法提供了原则性、任务依赖的适配方向选择标准。

Abstract: LoRA adapts large language models (LLMs) by restricting updates to low-rank subspaces of pre-trained weights. While this substantially reduces training cost, the effectiveness of adaptation critically depends on which subspace is chosen at initialization: a poor initialization that allocates capacity to task-irrelevant directions can severely hinder downstream performance. Existing initialization strategies primarily rely on the intrinsic properties of pre-trained weights, implicitly assuming that weight geometry alone reflects task relevance. However, such criteria overlook how the model interacts with the downstream data distribution. In this work, we formulate LoRA initialization as identifying the degree of impact of directions in parameter space under the target data distribution. We argue that data-aware sensitivity, rather than weight-only magnitude, should govern the choice of adaptation subspaces. Building on this perspective, we propose a Fisher-guided framework that leverages curvature information induced by downstream data to characterize how parameter perturbations influence model predictions. This perspective yields a principled, task-dependent criterion for selecting LoRA directions that better align adaptation with the target objective. Empirical results across diverse tasks and modalities demonstrate that data-aware initialization consistently and significantly improves downstream performance over existing approaches.

</details>


### [233] [LEAP: Layer-wise Exit-Aware Pretraining for Efficient Transformer Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01058)
*Shashank Kapadia,Deep Naryan Mishra,Sujal Reddy Alugubelli,Haoan Wang,Saipraveen Vabbilisetty,Rishi Bhatia,Anupriya Sharma*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文揭示了层对齐蒸馏与基于收敛的早退机制在标准部署条件下的系统性不兼容问题，并提出了LEAP方法来解决这一冲突，在保持模型性能的同时实现显著的推理加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 发现层对齐蒸馏与基于收敛的早退机制在标准部署条件下存在系统性不兼容。蒸馏目标将学生中间层与教师表示对齐，这会抑制早退机制所依赖的表征收敛，导致蒸馏模型上的早退机制失效。

Method: 提出了LEAP（层感知早退预训练）辅助训练目标，无需架构修改。在标准蒸馏基础上增加单一约束，确保中间层近似最终层表示，从而兼容早退机制。

Result: LEAP-MiniLM在θ=0.95时实现1.61倍实测加速（批大小=1，NVIDIA L4），91.9%样本在第7层退出，理论层减少1.80倍，而标准蒸馏模型零有效加速。在句子相似度（STS-B: 0.760±0.006）和检索基准（BEIR）上验证有效。

Conclusion: LEAP成功解决了层对齐蒸馏与早退机制的不兼容问题，在保持模型性能的同时显著提升推理效率，为实际部署提供了操作指导，包括延迟测量、决策阈值和部署标准。

Abstract: Layer-aligned distillation and convergence-based early exit represent two predominant computational efficiency paradigms for transformer inference; yet we establish that they exhibit systematic incompatibility under standard deployment conditions for convergence-based early exit. Distillation objectives that align intermediate student layers to teacher representations suppress the representational convergence that early-exit mechanisms exploit, rendering such mechanisms ineffective on distilled models. We introduce LEAP (Layer-wise Exit-Aware Pretraining), an auxiliary training objective that reconciles this incompatibility. LEAP requires no architectural modifications; it augments standard distillation with a single constraint ensuring intermediate layers approximate final-layer representations. LEAP-MiniLM achieves 1.61$\times$ measured wall-clock speedup (batch=1, NVIDIA L4) at $θ$=0.95, with 91.9% of samples exiting by layer 7 and 1.80$\times$ theoretical layer reduction, where standard distilled models achieve zero effective speedup. We validate across sentence similarity (STS-B: 0.760 $\pm$ 0.006) and retrieval benchmarks (BEIR), providing operational guidance including latency measurements, decision thresholds, and deployment criteria.

</details>


### [234] [GEODE: Angle-Adaptive OOD Detection with Universal Scorer Compatibility](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01063)
*Bruno Abrahao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GEODE提出了一种基于几何保持的OOD检测方法，通过角度自适应范数损失来模拟OE的边界校准效果，无需依赖外部辅助数据，在所有标准评分器上均表现良好且无灾难性失败。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统Outlier Exposure（OE）方法存在依赖特定评分器（如MSP强但KNN弱）且需要精心设计的辅助数据的问题。作者旨在理解OE为何有效，并开发一种无需外部数据的几何保持检测方法。

Method: GEODE通过角度自适应范数损失实现：目标值根据每个样本与最近类均值的余弦相似度进行缩放，从而在边界结构重要的区域保持特征几何。该方法基于神经崩溃理论的四个定理进行设计。

Result: 在CIFAR-10上，GEODE在所有7个标准评分器上表现一致（近OOD AUROC 89.0-92.3，远OOD达93.05），无灾难性失败。与OE结合后达到95.0 MSP/94.8 KNN，在CIFAR-100上所有评分器均优于OE。WRN-28-10上Energy评分提升4.5。

Conclusion: GEODE通过几何保持方法成功复制了OE的边界校准效果，无需依赖外部数据，解决了传统方法的评分器依赖问题，为实际部署中未知OOD场景提供了更可靠的检测方案。

Abstract: Outlier Exposure (OE) is among the strongest training-based OOD detectors on standard benchmarks but exhibits scorer-dependent tradeoffs (e.g., strong on MSP, weak on KNN) and requires curated auxiliary data. We show why OE works: its features sit at the same geometric locus as real near-OOD data, with the boundary-adjacent quartile driving nearly all of OE's gain. OE is boundary calibration, not OOD coverage. GEODE (GEOmetry-preserving DEtection) replicates this calibration synthetically through an angle-adaptive norm loss in which targets scale per-sample with cosine similarity to the nearest class mean, preserving feature geometry where boundary structure matters. Four theorems grounded in neural collapse justify the design. GEODE works across all seven standard scorers on CIFAR-10 (near-OOD AUROC 89.0-92.3, far-OOD reaching 93.05; no catastrophic failure on any scorer). Since the OOD regime is unknown at deployment, this is the test that matters. GEODE outperforms vanilla CE at matched epoch counts. Combined with OE, GEODE reaches 95.0 MSP / 94.8 KNN on CIFAR-10 and beats OE on every scorer on CIFAR-100. The gains hold on WRN-28-10 (+4.5 Energy, 3 seeds). Unlike methods that push OOD into the classifier null space (e.g., PFS, 14.38 KNN AUROC, worse than random), GEODE's adaptive target preserves the geometry that distance-based scorers depend on.

</details>


### [235] [A dimensional R2 regression metric](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01066)
*Jaesung Yoo,Stefan Lemke,Jian Zhong Guo,Kanaka Rajan,Adam Hantman*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种新的回归评估指标Dim-R2，扩展了传统R2分数，支持任意维度的输入数据，提供多维度的准确性视图，并降低对噪声的敏感性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统R2分数有三个主要局限：1) 最多只能处理二维输入；2) 将评分简化为单个标量，隐藏了预测准确性的丰富模式；3) 对低方差噪声通道敏感，可能产生大的、难以解释的负值。

Method: 提出了Dimensional R2分数（Dim-R2），这是R2的简单扩展，能够接受任意维度的数据，提供多维度的准确性视图，并减少对噪声的敏感性。

Result: 在合成正弦数据和三个多维回归数据集上展示了Dim-R2的优势，证明了其能够提供可解释且灵活的度量，突出回归准确性中的模式。

Conclusion: Dim-R2作为一种可解释和灵活的指标，能够突出回归准确性中的模式，指导回归建模，解决了传统R2在多维回归任务中的局限性。

Abstract: R2 score is the standard metric for evaluating regression tasks, offering a normalized magnitude-agnostic measure of accuracy that captures variance. However, R2 has three key limitations: it is limited to at most two dimensional inputs, it reduces the score to a single scalar that hides rich patterns of prediction accuracy, and it is sensitive to low-variance noise channels which can yield large, uninterpretable negative values. We introduce the Dimensional R2 score (Dim-R2), a simple extension of R2 that accepts data of arbitrary dimensionality, provides a multidimensional view of accuracy, and reduces sensitivity to noise. We demonstrate its advantages on both synthetic sinusoidal data and three multidimensional regression datasets. Dim-R2 offers an interpretable and flexible metric that highlights patterns in regression accuracy, guiding regression modeling.

</details>


### [236] [Deep Variational Inference Symbolic Regression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01067)
*James Butterworth,Gevik Grigorian,Alejandro DiazDelaO*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DVISR是一种变分贝叶斯符号回归方法，扩展了深度符号回归(DSR)，能够输出符号表达式及其常数的后验分布，从而量化模型不确定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统深度符号回归只能找到单一最佳表达式，缺乏对模型不确定性的量化。在存在噪声和有限数据的情况下，贝叶斯方法能够提供候选表达式的概率分布，但现有方法难以扩展到大规模符号空间。

Method: DVISR将深度符号回归扩展为变分贝叶斯框架，用证据下界(ELBO)的积分项替代原始奖励函数。扩展网络架构以输出表达式中常数的分布，实现对表达式树及其相关常数的后验推断。

Result: DVISR能够在简单设置中恢复真实后验分布（无论是否包含常数标记），并研究了随着表达式空间增大时性能的变化。结果表明DVISR能够实现符号模型的全后验推断。

Conclusion: DVISR是迈向可扩展贝叶斯符号回归的重要一步，能够为完整符号模型提供不确定性量化，在噪声和有限数据场景下具有优势。

Abstract: Symbolic regression discovers explicit, interpretable equations without assuming a functional form in advance. A Bayesian approach strengthens this through probability distributions over candidate expressions, thus quantifying uncertainty in the presence of noisy and limited data. Deep Symbolic Regression (DSR) uses a neural network to generate symbolic expressions, but it is designed to identify a single best-fitting expression rather than infer a posterior distribution over models. We introduce Deep Variational Inference Symbolic Regression (DVISR), a variational Bayesian extension of DSR. DVISR replaces the original reward with the integrand of the evidence lower bound. It also extends the network architecture to output distributions over constants within expressions, enabling posterior inference over both expression trees and their associated constants. We show that DVISR can recover the true posterior in simple settings, both with and without constant tokens, and we examine how its performance changes as the size of the expression space increases. These results position DVISR as a step toward scalable Bayesian symbolic regression with uncertainty over full symbolic models.

</details>


### [237] [Networked Information Aggregation for Binary Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01082)
*MohammadHossein Bateni,Zahra Hadizadeh,MohammadTaghi Hajiaghayi,Mahdi JafariRaviz,Shayan Taherijam*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究了在有向无环图（DAG）上的网络化二元分类问题，其中每个智能体只能观察到共享数据集的部分特征列。通过顺序分布式训练（顺序logit传递协议），分析是否能够实现信息聚合，即某些智能体能否达到与使用所有特征训练的最佳逻辑预测器相近的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是探索在分布式设置下，当每个智能体只能访问部分特征时，通过顺序协作训练是否能够实现信息聚合。之前Kearns等人的研究针对线性回归和平方损失，但将分析扩展到分类问题（特别是二元交叉熵和逻辑链接函数）具有挑战性，因为线性回归的二次结构分析不能直接适用。

Method: 采用顺序logit传递协议：智能体按DAG顺序行动，每个智能体接收来自父节点的预测列，将其与本地特征结合，通过最小化二元交叉熵（BCE）拟合逻辑预测器，然后将预测列传递给下游邻居。分析该协议在路径图（深度D）上的性能。

Result: 证明了两个主要结果：(1) 在深度为D的路径上，当每M个连续子序列的智能体共同观察所有特征时，超额损失上界为O(M/√D)；(2) 存在实例的下界至少为Ω(k/D)，其中k是特征空间维度。这表明网络深度是网络化逻辑回归中信息聚合的基本瓶颈。

Conclusion: 结论表明网络深度是网络化逻辑回归中信息聚合的根本限制因素。虽然顺序分布式训练能够实现一定程度的信息聚合，但深度D会限制性能提升。研究结果为分布式分类系统的设计提供了理论指导。

Abstract: We study networked binary classification on a directed acyclic graph (DAG) where each agent observes only a subset of the feature columns of a shared dataset. Agents act sequentially along the DAG: each receives prediction columns from its parents (if any), augments its local features with these columns, fits a logistic predictor by minimizing binary cross-entropy (BCE), and forwards its prediction column to its outgoing neighbors. We ask whether this sequential distributed training procedure achieves information aggregation, meaning that some agent attains small excess loss compared to the best logistic predictor trained with access to all feature columns.
  This question was studied for linear regression under squared loss by Kearns, Roth, and Ryu (SODA 2026). Extending their guarantees to classification is nontrivial because their analysis relies on quadratic structure that does not directly transfer to BCE with a logistic link. We analyze the resulting sequential logit-passing protocol and prove: (i) an excess loss upper bound of $O(M/\sqrt{D})$ on depth-$D$ paths under the condition that every $M$ contiguous subsequence of $M$ agents collectively observe all features, and (ii) a close lower bound showing instances with excess loss of at least $Ω(k/D)$ where $k$ is the dimension of the feature space. Together, these results identify network depth as a fundamental bottleneck for information aggregation in networked logistic regression.

</details>


### [238] [Learning Discriminators for Resampling in the Ensemble Gaussian Mixture Filter through a Normalizing Flow Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01089)
*Zain Jabbar,Andrey A. Popov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于判别器的重采样方法，用于改进集合高斯混合滤波器(EnGMF)，通过在重采样步骤中拒绝物理上不合理的粒子，提高滤波精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: EnGMF滤波器在重采样步骤中可能产生物理上不现实的样本，这些样本会导致无意义的预测。需要一种方法来确保重采样后的粒子保持物理合理性。

Method: 提出了判别器指导的重采样程序，在重采样步骤中加入判别器，基于物理合理性接受或拒绝候选粒子。判别器通过归一化流方法学习。

Result: 在Ikeda映射和Lorenz '63系统上的数值实验表明，在低集合规模情况下，判别器指导的重采样程序相对于标准EnGMF持续减少误差。

Conclusion: 判别器指导的重采样方法能够有效提高EnGMF滤波器的性能，特别是在低集合规模情况下，通过确保粒子的物理合理性来改善滤波精度。

Abstract: The ensemble Gaussian mixture filter (EnGMF) is a powerful, convergent particle filter capable of medium-to-high dimensional non-linear filtering. The EnGMF relies on a resampling step that can generate physically unrealistic posterior samples, that would subsequently produce physically meaningless forecasts. This work introduces the discriminator-informed resampling procedure, that augments the posterior resampling step with a discriminator that accepts or rejects candidate particles based on their physical plausibility. In this work these discriminators are learned through a normalizing flow approach. Numerical experiments on both the Ikeda map and the Lorenz '63 system show that discriminator informed resampling procedure consistently reduces error relative to the standard EnGMF in low-ensemble regimes.

</details>


### [239] [Learning to Race in Minutes: Infoprop Dyna on the Mini Wheelbot](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01096)
*Devdutt Subhasish,Henrik Hose,Sebastian Trimpe*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Infoprop Dyna框架使机器人能在11分钟内通过真实世界交互学习，无需精心设计的物理模拟器


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前强化学习需要精心设计的物理模拟器和领域随机化才能实现模拟到现实的转移，这限制了机器人在真实环境中的学习效率

Method: 使用Infoprop Dyna这一最先进的基于不确定性感知的模型强化学习框架，让机器人直接从真实世界交互中学习

Result: Mini Wheelbot（欠驱动独轮机器人）在11分钟的真实世界经验中学会了绕赛道竞速

Conclusion: Infoprop Dyna框架能够绕过对物理模拟器的依赖，使机器人能够高效地从真实世界交互中学习，为机器人强化学习提供了新的途径

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has the potential to enable robots with fast, nonlinear, and unstable dynamics to reach the limits of their performance. However, most recent advances rely on carefully designed physics-based simulators and domain randomization to achieve successful sim-to-real transfer within reasonable wall-clock time. In this work, we bypass the need for such simulators and demonstrate that Infoprop Dyna, a state-of-the-art uncertainty-aware model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) framework, can enable robots to learn directly from real-world interactions. Using Infoprop Dyna, the Mini Wheelbot, an underactuated unicycle robot, learns to race around a track within 11 minutes of real-world experience.

</details>


### [240] [Almost for Free: Crafting Adversarial Examples with Convolutional Image Filters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01098)
*Alexander Warnecke,Konrad Rieck*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于经典边缘检测算法的对抗图像滤波器，仅需3x3滤波器即可在神经网络上实现30-80%攻击成功率，参数量比生成模型方法减少5个数量级


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统对抗样本生成方法依赖梯度信息，需要模型访问权限或查询。本文受可解释机器学习启发，探索更简单的对抗样本生成方法，研究神经网络对恶意噪声的脆弱性

Method: 设计基于经典边缘检测算法的对抗图像滤波器，通过优化这些滤波器来欺骗学习模型。滤波器仅需3x3大小，攻击是无目标、可迁移的，且仅需对输入进行一次处理

Result: 3x3滤波器在不同神经网络上实现30-80%攻击成功率，参数量比生成对抗样本的生成模型方法减少5个数量级。学习到的滤波器具有高迁移性，且结构与经典图像滤波器有共同特征

Conclusion: 提出的对抗图像滤波器方法简单高效，进一步揭示了神经网络的脆弱性及其对恶意噪声的敏感性，为对抗攻击提供了新的视角

Abstract: Adversarial examples in machine learning are typically generated using gradients, obtained either directly through access to the model or approximated via queries to it. In this paper, we propose a much simpler approach to craft adversarial examples, drawing inspiration from insights of explainable machine learning. In particular, we design \emph{adversarial image filters} that are based on classic edge detection algorithms but optimized to deceive learning models. The resulting untargeted attacks are transferable and require only a single pass over the input. Empirically, we find that 3x3 filters already enable success rates between 30% and 80% on different neural networks. Compared to related approaches using generative models for crafting adversarial examples, we reduce the number of parameters by five orders of magnitude, resulting in a very efficient attack. When investigating the parameters of the learned filters, we observe interesting properties such as a high transferability between models and structures common to classic image filters. Our results provide further insights into the vulnerability of neural networks and their fragility to malicious noise.

</details>


### [241] [Diffusion Operator Geometry of Feedforward Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01107)
*Kanishka Reddy*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于算子理论的平滑框架来分析前馈神经网络表示几何，替代离散的邻域图曲率方法，通过高斯核扩散马尔可夫算子及其衍生观测量来稳定地追踪表示变化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究使用邻域图上的离散曲率分析神经网络表示几何，但这种方法可能产生不连续变化。需要一种平滑、稳定的算子理论框架来更可靠地分析表示几何特性。

Method: 为前馈表示快照构建高斯核扩散马尔可夫算子，通过Bakry-Emery Γ-演算推导出传输、谱、标签边界和局部尺度等观测量。在共享协方差的平衡高斯类条件模型中，得到算子观测量的闭式解。

Result: 证明了算子观测量在特征扰动下平滑变化（而硬邻域图诊断可能不连续）。在合成数据上验证了高斯桥闭式解，在MNIST上显示算子观测量能追踪训练过程、网络宽度和扰动稳定性。

Conclusion: 该算子几何框架为分析前馈表示几何提供了稳定、平滑的理论基础，能更好地追踪表示演化过程，克服了离散邻域图方法的不连续性缺陷。

Abstract: Neural networks transform data through learned representations whose geometry affects separation, contraction, and generalization. Recent work studies this geometry using discrete curvature on neighborhood graphs, suggesting Ricci-flow-like behavior across layers. We develop a smooth operator-theoretic alternative for feedforward representation snapshots. Each feature cloud induces a Gaussian-kernel diffusion Markov operator, and transport, spectral, label-boundary, and local-scale observables are derived from this single object via Bakry-Emery $Γ$-calculus. In a balanced Gaussian class-conditional snapshot model with shared covariance, the population operator has closed-form class affinities, leakage, and coarse spectra, all controlled by pairwise regularized Mahalanobis separations $c_\varepsilon^{(a,b)}$. We also prove that the resulting operator observables vary smoothly under feature perturbations, while hard neighborhood-graph diagnostics can change discontinuously. Synthetic experiments validate the closed-form Gaussian bridge, while learned MNIST experiments show that the same operator observables track training, width, and perturbation stability. Together, these results give a stable operator-geometric framework for analyzing feedforward representation geometry.

</details>


### [242] [Topological Neural Tangent Kernel](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01110)
*Sanjukta Krishnagopal*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TopoNTK是一种用于单纯复形上边特征消息传递的无限宽度核，结合了上同调与下同调相互作用，能够感知图核无法捕捉的拓扑结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 图神经网络无限宽度理论仅能处理成对结构，但许多关系系统包含更高阶的相互作用，需要单纯复形来表示。现有图核无法感知这些拓扑结构。

Method: 提出拓扑神经正切核(TopoNTK)，结合下Hodge相互作用（通过共享顶点捕捉图状耦合）和上Hodge相互作用（通过填充单纯形捕捉耦合），使核能够感知图核无法看到的拓扑结构。

Result: TopoNTK能够区分具有相同图但不同填充单纯形的复形，表现出表达能力、Hodge对齐、谱学习和稳定性性质。在合成单纯任务和DBLP高阶链接预测中验证了有效性。

Conclusion: 拓扑结构不仅仅是额外结构，它能够提供坐标，使关系学习更加忠实、可解释和有效。拓扑形式的光谱偏置表明不同Hodge分量以不同速度学习。

Abstract: Graph neural tangent kernels give a principled infinite-width theory for graph neural networks, but inherit a basic limitation of graph models: they see only pairwise structure. Many relational systems contain higher-order interactions that are more naturally represented by simplicial complexes. We introduce the Topological Neural Tangent Kernel (TopoNTK), an infinite-width kernel for simplicial message passing on edge features. TopoNTK combines lower Hodge interactions, capturing graph-like coupling through shared vertices, with upper Hodge interactions, capturing coupling through filled simplices. This makes the kernel sensitive to topology invisible to graph kernels, allowing complexes with the same graph but different filled simplices to induce different kernels. Beyond expressivity, the Hodge structure gives the kernel an interpretable learning geometry. Edge signals decompose into gradient-like, harmonic, and local circulation components, and the spectrum of the TopoNTK determines how quickly each component is learned. This yields a topological form of spectral bias: components aligned with large-eigenvalue modes are learned quickly, while global harmonic modes, retained through the residual channel, often lie at smaller eigenvalues and are learned more slowly. We prove expressivity, Hodge-alignment, spectral learning, and stability properties, and validate them on synthetic simplicial tasks and DBLP higher-order link prediction. The results show that topology is not merely extra structure; it can provide coordinates that make relational learning more faithful, interpretable, and effective.

</details>


### [243] [When Less is Enough: Efficient Inference via Collaborative Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01111)
*Yilei Chen,Sharut Gupta,Yannis Paschalidis,Ayush Sekhari,Aldo Pacchiano*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DUET是一个双模型高效两阶段推理框架，通过大模型生成推理信号，轻量模型解释信号生成答案，降低推理成本


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 单一大模型进行端到端推理成本高昂，需要设计一种能降低推理成本同时保持性能的协作推理框架

Method: 采用两阶段推理：能力强的大模型生成推理信号，轻量模型解释信号生成最终答案；使用长度惩罚联合训练目标，鼓励大模型只传输必要信息

Result: 在AIME和GPQA等挑战性推理基准上，DUET能节省大模型60%的输出token，同时保持强大的推理性能

Conclusion: DUET通过双模型协作推理，在显著降低推理成本的同时保持了任务性能，为高效推理提供了新思路

Abstract: In this work, we introduce DUET (Dual-model Efficient Two-stage inference), a collaborative inference framework in which a capable model and a lightweight model work together to solve a task. Relying on a single large model to perform end-to-end reasoning and prediction often incurs substantial inference cost. In contrast, DUET decomposes inference into two stages: the capable model produces a reasoning signal, and the lightweight model interprets this signal to generate the final answer, allowing reasoning-intensive computation to be handled by the capable model while non-reasoning-intensive components are delegated to the lightweight model without sacrificing task performance. To achieve this objective, we propose a length-penalized joint training objective that encourages the capable model to transmit only the information that is sufficient for the lightweight model to solve the task. As a result, DUET maintains strong reasoning performance with substantially lower inference cost than end-to-end inference using a large model alone, saving up to 60% of the large model's output tokens on challenging reasoning benchmarks, including AIME and GPQA.

</details>


### [244] [Machine Learning-Augmented Acceleration of Iterative Ptychographic Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01122)
*Bowen Zheng,Katayun Kamdin,David Shapiro,Alexander Ditter,Dayne Sasaki,Emma Bernard,Roopali Kukreja,Petrus H. Zwart,Slavomír Nemšák,Apurva Mehta,Nicholas Schwarz,Alexander Hexemer,Tanny Chavez*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种结合机器学习的叠层成像重建方法，通过引入学习型快速前向算子加速迭代重建，在保持物理一致性的同时减少收敛所需迭代次数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统叠层成像迭代重建算法在真实实验条件下收敛缓慢，需要加速收敛过程以提高重建效率。

Method: 采用机器学习增强方法，在标准迭代预热后引入学习型快速前向算子推进重建状态，然后恢复传统迭代更新。模型在多样化叠层成像数据集上训练。

Result: 与传统迭代求解器相比，该方法在保持相当重建质量的同时收敛更快，泊松负对数似然收敛速度提升超过两倍，计算时间减少超过一半。

Conclusion: 该方法成功整合到现有重建流程中，并在同步辐射光束线实际部署，证明了其在实时实验操作中的实用性。

Abstract: Iterative ptychographic reconstruction algorithms are widely used for coherent diffractive imaging but can exhibit slow convergence under realistic experimental conditions. We propose a machine learning-augmented approach that accelerates iterative ptychographic reconstruction by introducing a learned fast-forward operator applied during reconstruction. Following an initial warm-up using standard iterations, the fast-forward operator advances the reconstruction toward a more converged state, after which conventional iterative updates are resumed. This strategy preserves the physical consistency and flexibility of established ptychographic solvers while reducing the number of iterations required for convergence. The model is trained on diverse ptychographic datasets and evaluated on experimental data acquired in a different year, demonstrating robustness and temporal generalization. Compared with conventional iterative solvers, the machine learning-augmented method achieves comparable reconstruction quality while converging faster in terms of Poisson negative log-likelihood, yielding over a two-fold reduction in wall-clock time. The approach has been integrated into an existing reconstruction pipeline and deployed in production at a synchrotron beamline, demonstrating practicality for real-time experimental operation.

</details>


### [245] [Extreme Weather Bench: A framework and benchmark for evaluation of high-impact weather](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01126)
*Amy McGovern,Taylor Mandelbaum,Daniel Rothenberg,Nicholas Loveday,Corey Potvin,Montgomery Flora,Linus Magnusson,Eric Gilleland,John Allen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: EWB是一个用于评估AI天气模型的基准测试套件，专注于高影响天气事件的验证，提供标准案例、观测数据、影响指标和开源代码。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI天气模型评估多采用全球尺度评估或手动选取少量案例，缺乏针对高影响天气事件的标准化验证基准，这限制了模型的可信度和科学进步。

Method: 开发一个社区驱动的开源基准测试套件，包含跨越不同时空尺度的标准案例研究、观测数据、基于影响的指标和开源评估代码。

Result: 推出了Extreme Weather Bench (EWB)，这是一个免费的开源社区驱动系统，旨在促进模型在多种高影响天气灾害上的验证和验证。

Conclusion: EWB将推动所有天气模型的科学发展，通过标准化案例研究实现模型间的真实比较，并提高AI模型在特定高影响天气现象上的可信度。

Abstract: Forecasting the wide variety of high-impact weather events experienced globally is a challenge for both Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Numerical Weather Prediction (NWP) models and it is critical that such models be properly verified before deployment. Although AI weather models are rapidly evolving, much of their evaluation is currently done either with a global-scale evaluation or by hand-picking a small number of case studies or a region. A widely-used open-source benchmark suite focusing on high-impact weather will help to drive the science forward for all scales of weather models, as it has for other AI fields. Here we introduce Extreme Weather Bench (EWB), a new community-driven benchmark suite that facilitates model validation and verification on a variety of high-impact hazards that matter to people around the globe. EWB provides a standard set of case studies (spanning across multiple spatial and temporal scales and different parts of the weather spectrum), observational data, impact-based metrics, and open-source code for users to evaluate their models. Verifying that a model works against a standard set of case studies, especially events that are high-impact for the general public, is a key piece of improving the trustworthiness of AI models. EWB will help to drive the science forward for all weather models, enabling true comparisons across models and evaluating models on specific high-impact phenomena through the use of case studies. EWB is a free open-source community-driven system and will continue to evolve to include additional phenomena, test cases and metrics in collaboration with the worldwide weather and forecast verification community.

</details>


### [246] [Forager: a lightweight testbed for continual learning with partial observability in RL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01131)
*Steven Tang,Xinze Xiong,Anna Hakhverdyan,Andrew Patterson,Jacob Adkins,Jiamin He,Esraa Elelimy,Parham Mohammad Panahi,Martha White,Adam White*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Forager是一个轻量级部分可观测持续强化学习环境，用于研究损失可塑性、部分可观测性和状态构建在CRL中的作用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前CRL研究主要关注损失可塑性问题，但忽略了部分可观测性和记忆/循环网络的重要性，且现有部分可观测CRL环境计算成本过高。

Method: 提出Forager环境，具有恒定内存占用，设计实验和样本任务来评估当前CRL智能体，并创建生成无限新任务的变体。

Result: Forager对当前CRL智能体具有挑战性，智能体表现出损失可塑性，缓解措施有帮助，但最有效的是利用状态构建。无限任务变体突显了当前CRL智能体的局限性。

Conclusion: Forager为研究部分可观测CRL提供了轻量级平台，揭示了状态构建的重要性，并展示了当前CRL方法在持续学习新任务方面的不足。

Abstract: In continual reinforcement learning (CRL), good performance requires never-ending learning, acting, and exploration in a big, partially observable world. Most CRL experiments have focused on loss of plasticity -- the inability to keep learning -- in one-off experiments where some unobservable non-stationarity is added to classic fully observable MDPs. Further, these experiments rarely consider the role of partial observability and the importance of CRL agents that use memory or recurrence. One potential reason for this focus on mitigating loss of plasticity without considering partial observability is that many partially-observable CRL environments are prohibitively expensive. In this paper, we introduce Forager, a light-weight partially-observable CRL environment with a constant memory footprint. We provide a set of experiments and sample tasks demonstrating that Forager is challenging for current CRL agents and yet also allows for in-depth study of those agents. We demonstrate that agents exhibit loss of plasticity, proposed mitigations can help, but that most useful is to leverage state construction. We conclude with a variant of Forager that generates an unending stream of new tasks to learn that clearly highlights the limitations of current CRL agents.

</details>


### [247] [Spectral Graph Sparsification Preserves Representation Geometry in Graph Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01136)
*Sanjukta Krishnagopal*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究了谱图稀疏化在GNN中如何保持学习嵌入的几何结构，证明了谱稀疏化对多项式滤波器、隐藏表示和Gram矩阵的扰动有界，并验证了训练动态的稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统谱图稀疏化主要用于降低计算复杂度，但缺乏对学习嵌入几何结构保持性的理论分析。本文旨在研究稀疏化是否能在保持图算子特性的同时，也保持GNN学习到的表示空间的几何结构。

Method: 采用理论分析证明ε-谱稀疏化对多项式滤波器GNN的扰动边界，包括滤波器、多层隐藏表示及其Gram矩阵的稳定性。同时分析梯度下降训练的动态稳定性。通过有效电阻稀疏化在合成图和真实数据集上进行实证验证。

Result: 理论证明谱稀疏化导致O(ε)的扰动边界，Gram矩阵和训练动态表现出低发散性。在FashionMNIST、Cora和Paul15数据集上，隐藏Gram保持性能够有效预测邻域保持和类中心稳定性。

Conclusion: 谱图稀疏化不仅能保持图算子，还能保持支持GNN嵌入下游可解释性的表示几何结构，为稀疏化在保持表示质量方面提供了理论保证。

Abstract: Spectral graph sparsification is a classical tool for reducing graph complexity while preserving Laplacian quadratic forms. In graph neural networks (GNNs), sparsification is often used to accelerate computation while maintaining predictive performance. In this work, we study a complementary representation-level question: does sparsification preserve the geometry of learned embeddings?
  For polynomial-filter GNNs, we prove that any $ε$-spectral sparsifier induces $O(ε)$ perturbations in polynomial graph filters, multilayer hidden representations, and their Gram matrices. These guarantees imply stability of squared pairwise distances, class means, and covariance structure in embedding space. We further establish finite-time training stability: under smoothness and boundedness assumptions, gradient descent on dense and sparsified graphs produces weight trajectories whose separation grows at most proportionally to the sparsification distortion.
  Empirically, effective-resistance sparsification validates the predicted perturbation chain on synthetic graphs and preserves hidden representation geometry on real datasets. In our experiments, the gram matrix and training dynamics show low divergence even under substantial sparsification, consistent with the predicted stability under spectral sparsification. Hidden Gram preservation strongly predicts neighborhood preservation and class-centroid stability across FashionMNIST, Cora, and Paul15. Together, these results show that spectral sparsification preserves not only graph operators, but also the representation geometry that supports downstream use of GNN embeddings for interpretability.

</details>


### [248] [Metric-Normalized Posterior Leakage (mPL): Attacker-Aligned Privacy for Joint Consumption](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01137)
*Gaoyi Chen,Minghao Li,Weishi Shi,Yan Huang,Yusheng Wei,Sourabh Yadav,Chenxi Qiu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出mPL（metric-normalized posterior leakage）来衡量在联合观测下隐私泄露，并开发了AmPL框架来实际控制这种泄露。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统mDP（metric differential privacy）在单记录或独立释放时有效，但在联合观测场景下，即使满足mDP，攻击者仍可能通过聚合相关项目的证据造成高隐私泄露。

Method: 提出mPL概念，在联合观测下衡量后验概率偏移；引入概率有界mPL（PBmPL）；开发自适应mPL（AmPL）框架，通过扰动、审计和参数调整来平衡隐私与效用。

Result: 在词嵌入案例研究中，神经攻击者在联合消费下即使有每记录mDP扰动仍违反mPL，而AmPL显著降低了此类违规频率且效用损失小。

Conclusion: PBmPL为联合消费场景提供了实用、可认证的保护机制，AmPL框架能有效控制联合观测下的隐私泄露风险。

Abstract: Metric differential privacy (mDP) strengthens local differential privacy (LDP) by scaling noise to semantic distance, but many machine learning (ML) systems are consumed under joint observation, where model-agnostic, per-record guarantees can miss leakage from evidence aggregation. We introduce metric-normalized posterior leakage (mPL), an attacker-aligned, distance-calibrated measure of posterior-odds shift induced by releases, and show that for single or independent releases, uniformly bounding mPL is equivalent to mDP. Under joint observation, however, satisfying mDP may still leave mPL high because learned aggregators compound evidence across correlated items. To make control practical, we formalize probabilistically bounded mPL (PBmPL), which limits how often mPL may exceed a target budget, and we operationalize it via Adaptive mPL (AmPL), a trust-and-verify framework that perturbs, audits with a learned attacker, and adapts parameters (with optional Bayesian remapping) to balance privacy and utility. In a word-embedding case study, neural adversaries violate mPL under joint consumption despite per-record mDP perturbations, whereas AmPL substantially lowers the frequency of such violations with low utility loss, indicating PBmPL as a practical, certifiable protection for joint-consumption settings.

</details>


### [249] [Multi-Perspective Transformers in ARC-AGI-2 Challenge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01154)
*Caleb Talley,Vedant Tibrewal,Seun Adekunle,Weiwen Dong,Xinyu Wu,Fariha Sheikh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 使用TinyLM模型结合测试时微调（TTT和POE）解决ARC-AGI-2视觉推理难题，在训练集上达到96.1%准确率，但在评估集上仅21.7%


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ARC-AGI-2是一个需要从有限示例中进行泛化、解释符号意义并在不同上下文中灵活应用规则的人类直觉视觉推理基准，需要开发能够解决此类难题的AI系统

Method: 使用TinyLM模型，结合测试时微调技术，包括测试时训练（TTT）和专家乘积（POE）方法

Result: 在训练集上达到96.1%的高准确率，但在评估集上仅获得21.7%的准确率，显示模型泛化能力有限

Conclusion: 尽管在训练集上表现优异，但模型在评估集上的低准确率表明ARC-AGI-2难题对当前AI系统仍具挑战性，需要更好的泛化方法

Abstract: ARC-AGI-2 is a benchmark of human-intuitive visual puzzles that measures a machine's ability to generalize from limited examples, interpret symbolic meaning, and flexibly apply rules in varying contexts. In this paper, we discuss our approach to solving the ARC-AGI-2 puzzles with TinyLM, with additional fine-tuning at test time, including Test-Time-Training (TTT) and Products of Experts (POE). Our model achieves 96.1% accuracy on the training set and 21.7% accuracy on the evaluation set.

</details>


### [250] [Minimizing Collateral Damage in Activation Steering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01167)
*Tam Nguyen,Tu Anh Nguyen,Sina Alemohammad,Richard G. Baraniuk*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种基于约束优化的激活引导方法，通过考虑激活的协方差结构来减少对非目标特征的"附带损害"，实现更精确的LLM行为控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统激活引导方法（如向量加法）在控制LLM行为时会产生"附带损害"，即非目标特征方向上的意外变化。这是因为标准方法隐含假设了非目标特征的各向同性，忽略了不同特征方向上的变化成本差异。

Method: 将激活引导形式化为约束优化问题，寻找新的激活表示：在满足目标特征对齐约束的同时，最小化以激活经验二阶矩矩阵加权的期望平方附带变化。这种加权编码了不同特征方向上扰动的不均匀成本。

Result: 通过考虑激活的经验二阶矩，该方法能够实现更精确的控制，同时在无关任务上减少模型性能的退化。

Conclusion: 提出的约束优化框架为激活引导提供了更数学化的基础，通过显式建模不同特征方向的变化成本，有效减少了传统方法中的"附带损害"，实现了更精确的LLM行为控制。

Abstract: Activation steering is a method for controlling Large Language Model (LLM) behavior by intervening in its internal representations to increase the alignment with a specific target feature direction. However, standard interventions, such as vector addition, often cause ``collateral damage", defined as unintended changes in the alignment of activations along other non-target feature directions. This damage occurs because standard methods implicitly assume the isotropy of non-target features. In this work, we provide a mathematical formalization of collateral damage and introduce a principled framework that models steering as a constrained optimization problem. Our method finds a new activation that minimizes the expected squared collateral change weighted by the empirical second-moment matrix of activations. This weighting encodes the nonuniform cost of the perturbation in different feature directions, in contrast to isotropic approaches that penalize changes uniformly in all feature directions. By accounting for the empirical second-moment of activations, our approach achieves more precise control while reducing the degradation of model performance on unrelated tasks.

</details>


### [251] [A Theory of Generalization in Deep Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01172)
*Elon Litman,Gabe Guo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个深度学习的非渐进泛化理论，其中经验神经正切核将输出空间划分为信号和噪声通道。在信号方向上误差快速消散，而在噪声方向上误差被捕获。理论适用于全特征学习机制，能解释深度学习中多种现象，并提出了一个无需验证数据的精确总体风险目标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习中的泛化理论通常基于渐进分析，无法解释实际观察到的现象，如良性过拟合、双下降、隐式偏差和grokking。需要发展一个非渐进的理论框架，能够解释这些现象并指导实践。

Method: 使用经验神经正切核分析输出空间划分：信号通道（对应重要特征）和噪声通道（对应无关特征）。在信号通道中，小批量SGD通过快速线性漂移积累相干信号，同时将记忆抑制为缓慢的扩散随机游走。理论允许核在算子范数上变化O(1)，覆盖全特征学习机制。

Result: 理论证明了即使在核发生O(1)变化的特征学习机制中，泛化仍然存在。提出了一个从单次训练运行中推导出的精确总体风险目标，该目标测量信号通道中的噪声。在实践中简化为Adam上的SNR预处理器，仅增加一个状态向量，无额外成本。

Conclusion: 该理论统一解释了深度学习中多种现象，包括良性过拟合、双下降、隐式偏差和grokking。提出的SNR预处理器在实践中显著加速grokking（5倍），抑制PINN和隐式神经表示中的记忆，并在嘈杂偏好下改进DPO微调，同时保持更接近参考策略（3倍）。

Abstract: We present a non-asymptotic theory of generalization in deep learning where the empirical neural tangent kernel partitions the output space. In directions corresponding to signal, error dissipates rapidly; in the vast orthogonal dimensions corresponding to noise, the kernel's near-zero eigenvalues trap residual error in a test-invisible reservoir. Within the signal channel, minibatch SGD ensures that coherent population signal accumulates via fast linear drift, while idiosyncratic memorization is suppressed into a slow, diffusive random walk. We prove generalization survives even when the kernel evolves $\mathcal{O}(1)$ in operator norm, the full feature-learning regime. This theory naturally explains disparate phenomena in deep learning theory, such as benign overfitting, double descent, implicit bias, and grokking. Lastly, we derive an exact population-risk objective from a single training run with no validation data, for any architecture, loss, or optimizer, and prove that it measures precisely the noise in the signal channel. This objective reduces in practice to an SNR preconditioner on top of Adam, adding one state vector at no extra cost; it accelerates grokking by $5 \times$, suppresses memorization in PINNs and implicit neural representations, and improves DPO fine-tuning under noisy preferences while staying $3 \times$ closer to the reference policy.

</details>


### [252] [Linear-Readout Floors and Threshold Recovery in Computation in Superposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01192)
*Hector Borobia,Elies Seguí-Mas,Guillermina Tormo-Carbó*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文通过分析两种不同的递归计算模板，解释了它们达到不同计算能力（$d^{3/2}$ vs $d^2$）的原因在于维持不同的接口不变量，并利用Welch型下界阐明了线性读出器的限制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 近期两种在叠加态中计算的方法达到了不同的递归容量：Hänni等人通过近似线性递归模板实现了$\tilde{O}(d^{3/2})$的计算特征，而Adler和Shavit使用阈值布尔恢复达到了接近二次方的容量。这两种看似矛盾的结果促使研究者探讨它们之间的根本区别。

Method: 提出了一个概念性框架，通过分析不同方法维持的接口不变量来区分两种方法。作为工具，记录了biorthogonal线性读出器的秩迹Welch型下界，证明了对于$F \gg d$，任何单位对角线性读出器的最坏情况串扰为$Ω(d^{-1/2})$。在二次特征负载$F=d^2$下，分析了随机支持阈值恢复与线性读出器的性能对比。

Result: 证明了线性读出器存在固有的串扰限制，而阈值恢复方法能够突破这一限制。将Welch下界与Hänni修正层的容错性匹配，解释了$d^{3/2}$尺度作为该模板的兼容性阈值，而非普遍上界。阈值恢复在稀疏度$s=O(d/\log d)$时能够成功，而线性读出器在伯努利稀疏状态下会产生$Ω(s/d)$的平均每坐标平方误差。

Conclusion: 两种方法达到不同计算能力的原因在于它们维持不同的接口不变量，而非相互矛盾。Hänni模板的$d^{3/2}$尺度是其特定设计下的兼容性阈值，而阈值恢复方法能够达到更高的二次方容量。超越Hänni模板的鲁棒非线性重置问题仍然开放。

Abstract: Two recent approaches to computation in superposition reach different recursive capacity regimes: Hänni et al. certify $\tilde{O}(d^{3/2})$ computable features in width $d$ via an approximate-linear recursive template, while Adler and Shavit reach near-quadratic capacity (up to logarithmic factors) using thresholded Boolean recovery. The main contribution of this paper is conceptual: we argue these results are not contradictory because they maintain different interface invariants, and we formalize the distinction.
  As a tool, we record a rank-trace Welch-type lower bound for biorthogonal linear readouts: for $F \gg d$, the worst-case off-diagonal cross-talk of any unit-diagonal linear readout is $Ω(d^{-1/2})$, and the bound is tight on average for unit-norm tight frames. At quadratic feature load $F=d^2$, random-support threshold recovery succeeds for sparsities $s=O(d/\log d)$, while linear readouts still incur $Ω(s/d)$ average per-coordinate squared error on Bernoulli sparse states. Matching the Welch floor against the published tolerance of the Hänni correction layer explains the $d^{3/2}$ scale as a compatibility threshold for that template, not a universal upper bound. Robust nonlinear reset beyond the Hänni template is left open.

</details>


### [253] [Focus and Dilution: The Multi-stage Learning Process of Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01199)
*Zheng-An Chen,Pengxiao Lin,Zhi-Qin John Xu,Tao Luo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究揭示了Transformer注意力学习中的聚焦-稀释循环现象，并通过梯度流分析在单层Transformer上提供了严格的理论解释


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管Transformer模型在各个领域取得了显著成功，但我们对它们的训练动态理解仍然有限。本研究旨在揭示注意力学习中的基本机制和动态过程。

Method: 在单层Transformer设置下，针对马尔可夫数据使用梯度流分析，通过阶段线性化方法研究训练动态，并在合成数据、WikiText和TinyStories上进行实验验证

Result: 发现注意力学习存在可预测的聚焦-稀释循环，该循环可分解为四个阶段：嵌入和投影的快速秩一压缩、注意力参数增长引发的高频令牌聚焦、注意力演化导致的嵌入质量重分配稀释聚焦、低频令牌不对称性打破临界点并开启新循环

Conclusion: Transformer训练过程中存在系统性的聚焦-稀释循环，这种循环动态为理解注意力机制的学习过程提供了新的理论框架，并在实际数据上得到了验证

Abstract: Transformer-based models have achieved remarkable success across a wide range of domains, yet our understanding of their training dynamics remains limited. In this work, we identify a recurrent focus-dilution cycle in attention learning and provide a rigorous explanation in a one-layer Transformer setting for Markovian data via gradient-flow analysis. Using stage-wise linearization around critical points, we show that a single focus-dilution cycle can be decomposed into a sequence of distinct stages. First, embedding and projection rapidly condense to a rank-one structure, while attention parameters remain effectively frozen. Then, the attention parameters begin to increase, inducing a frequency-driven focus toward high-frequency tokens. As attention continues to evolve, it generates next-order perturbations in embeddings, leading to a mass-redistribution mechanism that progressively dilutes this focus. Finally, small asymmetries among low-frequency tokens lift a degenerate critical point, opening new embedding directions and initiating the next cycle. Experiments on synthetic Markovian data as well as WikiText and TinyStories corroborate the predicted stages and cyclical dynamics.

</details>


### [254] [Local Hessian Spectral Filtering for Robust Intrinsic Dimension Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01221)
*Genki Osada*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Local Hessian Spectral Dimension (LHSD)方法，通过谱滤波解决高维空间中局部固有维度估计问题，避免法向噪声干扰，实现线性可扩展性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的局部固有维度(LID)估计方法在高维空间中失效，因为大量法向噪声会淹没切向信号

Method: 提出局部Hessian谱维度(LHSD)，通过对数密度Hessian矩阵应用谱滤波，显式截断与法向相关的大特征值，统计零曲率切向方向；使用随机Lanczos求积法(SLQ)实现，避免构建完整Hessian矩阵

Result: LHSD在合成和真实数据实验中表现出优越的鲁棒性，并能有效检测大规模扩散模型中的记忆化现象

Conclusion: LHSD方法成功解决了高维空间中LID估计的挑战，具有线性可扩展性，为大规模扩散模型分析提供了有效工具

Abstract: While diffusion models enable new approaches for estimating Local Intrinsic Dimension (LID), existing methods fail in high-dimensional spaces where noise from vast normal directions overwhelms the tangent signal. We propose Local Hessian Spectral Dimension (LHSD), which resolves this by applying spectral filtering to the log-density Hessian, explicitly cutting off large eigenvalues associated with normal directions to count zero-curvature tangent directions. Implemented using Stochastic Lanczos Quadrature (SLQ), LHSD avoids full Hessian construction, achieving linear scalability with dimension $D$. Experiments on synthetic and real data confirm LHSD's superior robustness and its utility in detecting memorization in large-scale diffusion models.

</details>


### [255] [Arbitrarily Conditioned Hierarchical Flows for Spatiotemporal Events](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01226)
*Keyan Chen,Qiwei Yuan,Zhitong Xu,Bin Shen,Shandian Zhe*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ARCH是一个基于分层流匹配的时空事件建模框架，能够灵活处理任意条件的事件预测和推理任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有点过程模型通常依赖强结构假设，且局限于自回归的事件预测，难以支持逆推理、轨迹重建和缺失事件恢复等更广泛的推理任务。

Method: 提出基于分层流匹配的ARCH框架，采用历史编码器-生成解码器架构，引入混合掩码策略实现任意观察事件的灵活条件建模。

Result: 在合成和真实数据集上的实验表明，ARCH在预测和条件推理任务上均优于现有基线方法。

Conclusion: ARCH能够统一处理预测、逆推理和部分轨迹恢复任务，为复杂时空事件分布建模提供了有效框架。

Abstract: Events in spatiotemporal systems are ubiquitous, yet modeling their complex distributions remains challenging. Existing point process models often rely on strong structural assumptions and are typically limited to autoregressive, event-by-event prediction. As a result, they struggle to support broader inference tasks such as inverse inference, trajectory reconstruction, and recovery of missing event locations. We introduce Arbitrarily Conditioned Hierarchical Flows (ARCH), a hierarchical flow matching framework for spatiotemporal event modeling. ARCH is expressive enough to capture complex event distributions while enabling tractable and accurate computation of conditional intensities, which quantify instantaneous event risk. Built on a history-encoder-generative-decoder architecture, ARCH introduces a hybrid masking strategy for flexible conditioning on arbitrary observed events. This enables a unified treatment of forecasting, inverse inference, and partial trajectory recovery within a single framework. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets show that ARCH consistently outperforms existing baselines across both prediction and conditional inference tasks.

</details>


### [256] [Attention Sinks in Massively Multilingual Neural Machine Translation:Discovery, Analysis, and Mitigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01229)
*Hillary Mutisya,John Mugane*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: NLLB-200模型存在跨注意力分析的系统性伪影：83-91%的注意力集中在非内容token上，导致原始分析不可靠。作者提出内容过滤方法，恢复了被掩盖的语言学信号。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究神经机器翻译中跨注意力模式的系统性伪影问题，发现非内容token（如结束符、语言标签、标点）占据了大部分注意力质量，导致语言学分析失真。

Method: 提出内容过滤方法，移除非内容token并重新归一化分布。在1000个平行句子上验证，涵盖非洲语言和非非洲语言基准。

Result: 非内容token占据83-91%的注意力质量；过滤后内容级相似性从36.7%提升到70.7%；恢复了被掩盖的语言学信号：教师强制与生成模式的差异、语言家族聚类、索马里语的句法矛盾。

Conclusion: 跨注意力分析存在系统性伪影，需要过滤非内容token才能获得可靠的语言学洞见。作者发布了过滤工具包和校正数据集以支持可重复的多语言NMT可解释性研究。

Abstract: Cross-attention patterns in neural machine translation (NMT) are widely used to study how multilingual models align linguistic structure. We report a systematic artifact in cross-attention analysis of NLLB-200 (600M): non-content tokens - primarily end-of-sequence tokens, language tags, and punctuation - capture 83 percent to 91 percent of total cross-attention mass. We term these "attention sinks," extending findings from LLMs [Xiao et al., 2023] to NMT cross-attention and identifying a causal mechanism rooted in vocabulary design rather than position bias. This artifact causes raw metrics to underestimate content-level similarity by nearly half (36.7 percent raw vs. 70.7 percent filtered), rendering uncorrected analyses unreliable. To address this, we validate a content-only filtering methodology that removes non-content tokens and renormalizes the distribution. Applying this to 1,000 parallel sentences across African languages (Swahili, Kikuyu, Somali, Luo) and non-African benchmarks (German, Turkish, Chinese, Hindi), we confirm the artifact is universal and recover masked linguistic signals: a 16.9 percentage-point gap between teacher-forcing and generation modes, clear language-family clustering in attention entropy, and a hidden Somali paradox linking SOV word order to monotonic alignment. We release our filtering toolkit and corrected datasets to support reproducible interpretability research on multilingual NMT.

</details>


### [257] [CombinationTS: A Modular Framework for Understanding Time-Series Forecasting Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01231)
*Xiaorui Wang,Fanda Fan,Chenxi Wang,Yuxuan Yang,Rui Tang,Kuoyu Gao,Simiao Pang,Yuanfeng Shang,Zhipeng Liu,Wanling Gao,Lei Wang,Jianfeng Zhan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CombinationTS框架通过模块化分解评估时间序列预测模型，揭示复杂编码器未必优于简单方案，并提出结构先验比增加编码器复杂度更有效


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前时间序列预测领域架构复杂度快速增加，但许多声称的SOTA提升在统计上脆弱或归因错误。需要从模型选择转向模块化归因，识别真正驱动性能的组件。

Method: 提出CombinationTS概率评估框架，将预测模型分解为五个正交模块：输入变换、嵌入、编码器、解码器、输出变换。在共享评估条件空间下评估，通过边际性能(μ)和稳定性(σ)量化每个组件。

Result: 发现"身份悖论"：一旦数据视图(嵌入)设计良好，无参数的身份编码器常匹配或超越复杂骨干网络。显示通过输入变换引入的显式结构先验比增加编码器复杂度能获得更好的性能-稳定性权衡。

Conclusion: 为架构必要性建立了原则性基线，表明复杂编码器并非总是必要，而结构先验和良好设计的数据视图更为重要。

Abstract: Recent progress in time-series forecasting has led to rapidly increasing architectural complexity, yet many reported State-of-the-Art gains are statistically fragile or misattributed. We argue that progress requires a shift from model selection to modular attribution, identifying which components truly drive performance. We propose CombinationTS, a self-contained probabilistic evaluation framework that decomposes forecasting models into orthogonal modules--Input Transformation, Embedding, Encoder, Decoder, and Output Transformation--and evaluates them under a shared evaluation condition space. By quantifying each component via marginalized performance ($μ$) and stability ($σ$), CombinationTS enables robust attribution beyond fragile point estimates. Through large-scale paired evaluation, we uncover the Identity Paradox: once the data view (Embedding) is well-designed, a parameter-free Identity Encoder often matches or outperforms complex backbones. We further show that explicit structural priors introduced via Input Transformations yield a more favorable performance-stability trade-off than increasing Encoder complexity, establishing a principled baseline for architectural necessity.

</details>


### [258] [Rhamba: Region-Aware Hybrid Attention-Mamba Framework for Self-Supervised Learning in Resting-State fMRI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01240)
*Ruthwik Reddy Doodipala,Pankaj Pandey,Pratheek Eranki,Carolina Torres-Rojas,Manob Jyoti Saikia,Ranganatha Sitaram*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Rhamba是一个用于静息态fMRI分析的区域感知预训练框架，结合解剖学引导的掩蔽策略和混合Attention-Mamba架构，在精神疾病分类任务上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自监督预训练在大规模神经影像分析中很有前景，但区域感知掩蔽和混合序列建模的影响尚未充分探索。需要开发能够平衡可解释性、可扩展性和性能的fMRI表示学习框架。

Method: 提出Rhamba框架：1）使用区域对齐的补丁嵌入；2）三种空间特异性递增的掩蔽策略（Any、Majority、Pure）；3）四种架构变体（Mamba only、Alternate、Attention-Mamba、Mamba-Attention）；4）在ABIDE数据集上预训练，在COBRE和ADHD-200数据集上微调用于精神分裂症和ADHD分类；5）使用Integrated Gradients进行可解释性分析。

Result: 1）掩蔽策略强烈影响重建行为（重建损失：Any > Majority > Pure），但下游性能差异较小且依赖数据集；2）Mamba-Attention混合架构在平均AUROC上表现最佳；3）Rhamba优于现有最先进方法；4）峰值性能取决于掩蔽策略和架构的交互作用而非单一配置。

Conclusion: Rhamba提供了一个灵活的框架，能够在大规模fMRI表示学习中平衡可解释性、可扩展性和性能。最佳性能取决于掩蔽策略和架构的交互，而非单一最优配置。

Abstract: Self-supervised pretraining is promising for large-scale neuroimaging, yet the impact of region-aware masking and hybrid sequence modeling remains underexplored. In this work, we introduce Rhamba, a region-aware pretraining framework that integrates anatomically guided masking with hybrid Attention-Mamba architectures for resting state functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) analysis. Models were pretrained on the ABIDE dataset using region-aligned patch embeddings and three masking strategies (Any, Majority, and Pure) with increasing spatial specificity. We evaluated four architectural variants: a Mamba only model, an Alternate architecture with interleaved Mamba and Attention blocks, and two hybrid encoder-decoder configurations (Attention-Mamba (AM) and Mamba-Attention (MA)). The pretrained models were fine-tuned on downstream classification tasks using the COBRE and ADHD-200 datasets for schizophrenia and attention-deficit/hyperactivity disorder discrimination. We employed Integrated Gradients, an explainable AI method, to identify the brain regions contributing to model predictions. Masking strategy strongly influenced reconstruction behavior, with reconstruction loss following a consistent ordering (Any > Majority > Pure). However, this trend did not directly translate into downstream performance, where differences were modest and dataset-dependent. The hybrid architecture with the MA configuration achieved the highest average AUROC across both datasets, and Rhamba outperformed state-of-the-art methods in comparative evaluation. Region-wise analysis showed that peak performance depends on the interaction between masking strategy and architecture rather than a single dominant configuration. Overall, Rhamba offers a flexible framework for balancing interpretability, scalability, and performance in large-scale fMRI representation learning.

</details>


### [259] [Breaking the Computational Barrier: Provably Efficient Actor-Critic for Low-Rank MDPs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01242)
*Ruiquan Huang,Donghao Li,Yingbin Liang,Jing Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过监督学习作为计算代理，在低秩MDPs中建立了常用RL oracle的清晰层次结构，并提出了一种仅依赖策略评估oracle的新型乐观actor-critic算法，在样本复杂度上优于现有方法且避免了计算昂贵的规划oracle。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有强化学习算法在函数逼近设置下虽然样本复杂度较好，但往往依赖计算上不可行的oracle。本文旨在通过监督学习作为计算代理，建立低秩MDPs中常用RL oracle的层次结构，并设计更高效的算法。

Method: 1) 使用监督学习作为计算代理分析低秩MDPs中常用RL oracle的层次结构；2) 提出仅依赖策略评估oracle的新型乐观actor-critic算法；3) 将理论结果扩展到近似低秩MDPs；4) 在标准Gym环境中进行实验验证。

Result: 1) 建立了低秩MDPs中RL oracle的清晰层次结构，表明策略评估是最计算高效的oracle；2) 提出的算法在样本复杂度上优于现有低秩MDPs方法；3) 理论扩展到近似低秩MDPs，能捕捉更广泛的真实环境；4) 实验验证了理论结果。

Conclusion: 通过监督学习作为计算代理，本文建立了低秩MDPs中RL oracle的层次结构，提出了仅依赖策略评估oracle的高效算法，在避免计算昂贵规划oracle的同时获得了更好的样本复杂度，适用于广泛的真实环境。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) is a fundamental framework for sequential decision-making, in which an agent learns an optimal policy through interactions with an unknown environment. In settings with function approximation, many existing RL algorithms achieve favorable sample complexity, but often rely on computationally intractable oracles. In this paper, we use supervised learning as a computational proxy to establish a clear hierarchy of commonly adopted RL oracles under low-rank Markov Decision Processes (MDPs). This hierarchy shows that policy evaluation is the most computationally efficient oracle, provided that supervised learning can be efficiently solved. Motivated by this observation, we propose a novel optimistic actor-critic algorithm that relies solely on the policy evaluation oracle. We prove that our algorithm outperforms the existing sample complexity guarantees for low-rank MDPs while avoiding computationally expensive planning or optimization oracles commonly assumed in prior works. We further extend our theoretical results to approximately low-rank MDPs and demonstrate that this setting captures a broad class of real-world environments. Finally, we validate our theoretical results with experiments on several standard Gym environments.

</details>


### [260] [S^3-R1: Learning to Retrieve and Answer Step-by-Step with Synthetic Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01248)
*Harsh Goel,Akhil Udathu,Susmija Jabireddy,Pradnesh Kalkar,Atharva Parulekar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: S^3-R1框架通过合成数据和强化学习改进工具使用搜索能力，解决稀疏奖励和训练数据不足问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前强化学习后训练模型在工具使用搜索方面存在局限，主要问题是稀疏结果奖励和缺乏包含不同难度问题的训练数据，导致模型无法进行深度搜索收集证据

Method: 1. 开发合成生成和筛选管道，从现有文档程序化生成多样化的多跳问题；2. 加入基于检索的验证步骤，专门分离中等难度问题；3. 结合扩展训练集与奖励结构，同时评估中间搜索质量和最终答案正确性

Result: S^3-R1在域外数据集上表现出更强的鲁棒泛化能力，相比现有基线提升达10%

Conclusion: S^3-R1框架通过数据中心方法和密集学习信号有效解决了稀疏奖励的信用分配问题，显著提升了模型的搜索和综合策略学习效果

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) post-training has enabled newer capabilities in models, such as agentic tool-use for search. However, these models struggle primarily due to limitations with sparse outcome-based rewards and a lack of training data that encapsulates questions of differing hardness, which results in models not performing deeper searches with tools to collect evidence for question-answering. To address these limitations, we introduce S^3-R1 (Synthetic data and stabilized Search R1), a framework that couples a data-centric approach with denser learning signals. We first develop a synthetic generation and curation pipeline that programmatically derives diverse, multi-hop questions from existing documents. This pipeline incorporates a retrieval-based verification step to specifically isolate questions of intermediate difficulty. We then pair this expanded training set with a reward structure that evaluates both intermediate search quality and the correctness of the final answer. This setup directly mitigates the credit assignment problems inherent to sparse rewards. Our evaluations show that S^3-R1 outperforms existing baselines by learning more effective search and synthesis strategies, yielding up to a 10% improvement in robust generalization on out-of-domain datasets.

</details>


### [261] [Activation Compression in LLMs: Theoretical Analysis and Efficient Algorithm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01255)
*Wen-Da Wei,Han-Bin Fang,Yang-Di Liu,Jiang-Xin Shi,James Kwok,Yu-Feng Li*

Main category: cs.LG
