We then evaluate a latent model-based adaptation pipeline that reuses nominal latent dynamics and retunes controllers under known injector failure, leakage-induced dynamics and reward shift, and compartmentalized reservoir connectivity. The results show that history-conditioned policies recover nearly all of the privileged-state performance while using only deployable well-level information, and that latent model-based retuning outperforms direct model-free retuning under the same scenario-specific real-simulator budget in the abnormal operating cases. The proposed framework therefore provides a simulator-budget-aware alternative to repeated online history matching and re-optimization for closed-loop CO2 storage control.

</details>


### [375] [Inducing Permutation Invariant Priors in Bayesian Optimization for Carbon Capture and Storage Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02409)
*Sofianos Panagiotis Fotias,Vassilis Gaganis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种新的高斯过程核（GP-Perm）用于处理置换对称性问题，适用于碳捕集与封存项目中的井位优化


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统贝叶斯优化中的高斯过程核在处理具有置换对称性的输入（如无序集合）时效率低下，而碳捕集与封存项目中的井群控制存在这种对称性，需要新的方法

Method: 1. 提出GP-Perm核，通过比较集合的诱导经验表示之间的稳定散度来编码置换不变性；2. 提出DKL-DS作为基线，使用Deep Sets架构学习置换不变嵌入；3. 在8个用例（7个合成基准和1个真实CCS案例）上评估

Result: GP-Perm核能够有效处理置换对称性问题，在碳捕集与封存井位优化中表现出色，优于传统方法

Conclusion: 提出的GP-Perm核为处理具有置换对称性的贝叶斯优化问题提供了有效解决方案，特别适用于碳捕集与封存等实际应用场景

Abstract: Bayesian Optimization is an iterative method, tailored to optimizing expensive black box objective functions. Surrogate models like Gaussian Processes, which are the gold standard in Bayesian Optimization, can be inefficient for inputs with permutation symmetries, as the most common kernels employed are better suited for vector inputs rather than unordered sets of items. Motivated by this issue, we turn to permutation invariant Bayesian Optimization for well placement in Carbon Capture and Storage projects. The high fidelity black box simulator is instructed to operate wells under group control, giving rise to permutation symmetries within injector and producer groups that cannot be exploited with standard GP kernels. In this work, our main contribution is a novel Gaussian Process kernel (GP-Perm) that encodes permutation invariance by comparing sets through a stable divergence between their induced empirical representations, and can be combined with standard kernels for additional vector-valued inputs. As a learned invariant baseline, we also consider a Deep Kernel Learning model (DKL-DS) using the Deep Sets architecture to learn a permutation-invariant embedding. We evaluate the proposed methodology across 8 use cases, comprising seven synthetic benchmarks and one realistic CCS case study (Johansen formation)

</details>


### [376] [Generalized Distributional Alignment Games for Unbiased Answer-Level Fine-Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02435)
*Mehryar Mohri,Jon Schneider,Yutao Zhong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文解决了ALFT中分布对齐游戏的估计偏差问题，通过推广到任意Bregman散度、提出多项式奖励的精确无偏估计器，以及针对KL散度游戏的最优多项式估计器，最终提出方差最优的AQP估计器，实现无偏、加速收敛的训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准分布对齐游戏算法依赖小批量对数奖励估计，由于Jensen不等式引入系统性偏差，导致训练不稳定。需要解决这种结构估计偏差问题。

Method: 1. 将对齐游戏推广到任意Bregman散度，针对多项式奖励几何构造精确无偏的U统计量估计器。2. 针对KL散度游戏，推导全局鲁棒极小极大多项式估计器，达到Θ(1/K²)统计误差极限。3. 综合两种方法提出方差最优增强多项式优化程序(AQP)估计器，系统降低方差。

Result: 1. 对于多项式奖励家族，实现了精确无偏估计。2. 对于KL散度游戏，证明了最优估计器达到统计误差极限Θ(1/K²)。3. AQP估计器不仅实现最优偏差，还证明能加速游戏收敛，实现更高效稳定的训练，且无在线计算开销。

Conclusion: 该研究系统解决了分布对齐游戏中的结构估计偏差问题，通过理论分析和算法设计，提出了最优的估计方法，实现了无偏、加速收敛的训练过程，为零计算开销的高效稳定ALFT提供了理论基础。

Abstract: The Distributional Alignment Game framework provides a powerful variational perspective on Answer-Level Fine-Tuning (ALFT). However, standard algorithms for these games rely on estimating logarithmic rewards from small batches, introducing a systematic bias due to Jensen's inequality that can destabilize training. In this paper, we systematically resolve this structural estimation bias. First, we generalize the alignment game to arbitrary Bregman divergences, showing that for a family of geometries inducing polynomial rewards, we can construct provably exact and unbiased estimators using U-statistics. Second, for the canonical KL divergence game where an exact solution is impossible, we derive a globally robust minimax polynomial estimator that is provably optimal, achieving the fundamental statistical error limit of $Θ(1/K^2)$, which we establish via the Ditzian-Totik theorem. Finally, we synthesize these two approaches to propose a novel Variance-Optimal Augmented Polynomial Optimization Program (AQP) Estimator, proving that by systematically reducing variance, our method achieves not only optimal bias but also provably accelerated game convergence, leading to more efficient and stable training with zero online computational overhead.

</details>


### [377] [Reference-Sampled Boltzmann Projection for KL-Regularized RLVR: Target-Matched Weighted SFT, Finite One-Shot Gaps, and Policy Mirror Descent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02469)
*Yao Shu,Chenxing Wei,Hongbin Lin,Shuang Qiu,Hui Xiong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出BOLT（Boltzmann-Targeted SFT），一种基于参考采样加权SFT的RLVR优化方法，将Boltzmann目标策略匹配到加权SFT诱导的策略，使用提示归一化Boltzmann权重，并分析了单次采样中的各种误差源。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线RLVR虽然能将可验证结果转化为可扩展的训练信号，但保持生成、验证器评分和参考策略评估在优化路径上。静态加权SFT虽能消除这一瓶颈，但加权似然仅由奖励无法完全指定，其采样器和权重会诱导被拟合的策略。需要找到使诱导策略等于固定参考KL正则化RLVR优化器的加权SFT目标。

Method: 识别出参考采样加权SFT目标，其诱导策略等于固定参考KL正则化RLVR优化器（标准Boltzmann目标策略）。通过指数倾斜参考策略的验证器奖励获得目标。在参考采样子类中，权重简化为提示归一化Boltzmann权重exp(r(x,y)/β)/Z(x)。BOLT是该投影的经验估计器，并进行了有限单次分析，分离了各种误差源。

Result: BOLT实现了目标匹配权重，展示了单次饱和、刷新采样器增益和优化时间节省。有限分析揭示了精确存储支持成本与分区估计、有效样本量方差、泛化、优化和近似误差的分离，解释了为什么额外SFT轮次无法修复缺失的参考策略覆盖。

Conclusion: 论文建立了参考采样加权SFT与KL正则化RLVR优化器之间的等价性，提出了BOLT方法，并提供了理论分析和实验证据，揭示了温度-覆盖率-方差前沿，为需要自适应采样覆盖的情况提供了KL策略镜像下降框架。

Abstract: Online reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) turns checkable outcomes into a scalable training signal, but it keeps rollout generation, verifier scoring, and reference-policy evaluations on the optimization path. Static weighted supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on precomputed rollouts seems to remove this bottleneck, yet a weighted likelihood is not specified by rewards alone: its sampler and weights induce the policy being fit. This paper identifies the reference-sampled weighted-SFT objective whose induced policy equals the fixed-reference KL-regularized RLVR optimizer. The optimizer is the standard Boltzmann target policy, obtained by exponentially tilting the reference policy by verifier reward. Matching a weighted-SFT induced policy to this target forces density-ratio weights; in the reference-sampled subclass, this reduces uniquely, up to prompt scaling, to the prompt-normalized Boltzmann weight $\exp(r(x,y)/β)/Z(x)$. BOLT, a Boltzmann-Targeted SFT procedure, is the empirical estimator of this projection. The finite one-shot analysis separates the exact stored-support price $β\log(1/π^*(S_N\mid x))$ from partition estimation, effective-sample-size variance, generalization, optimization, and approximation errors. This decomposition explains why extra SFT epochs cannot repair missing reference-policy coverage and exposes the temperature--coverage--variance frontier. When coverage needs adaptive sampling, refreshed Boltzmann projections become KL policy mirror descent; finite inner solves enter as additive drift from the exact mirror step. Single-run Qwen experiments provide projection evidence for the target-matched weight, one-shot saturation, refreshed-sampler gains, and optimization-time savings, within the stated single-run scope.

</details>


### [378] [Efficient Preference Poisoning Attack on Offline RLHF](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02495)
*Chenye Yang,Weiyu Xu,Lifeng Lai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究针对离线强化学习人类反馈（DPO）的标签翻转攻击，提出两种攻击方法BAL-A和BMP-A，通过将攻击问题转化为结构化二进制稀疏逼近问题来实施针对性毒化攻击


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离线RLHF管道（如DPO）依赖于预收集的偏好数据集，这使其容易受到偏好毒化攻击。当前需要研究针对log-linear DPO的标签翻转攻击，以揭示其安全漏洞

Method: 首先发现翻转一个偏好标签会导致DPO梯度产生参数无关的偏移，利用这一关键特性将针对性毒化问题转化为结构化二进制稀疏逼近问题。然后开发两种攻击方法：BAL-A（通过二进制感知格和LLL约简与Babai最近平面算法）和BMP-A（通过二进制匹配追踪适应非归一化梯度字典）

Result: 在合成字典和斯坦福人类偏好数据集上的实验验证了理论，并展示了字典几何如何决定攻击成功率。BMP-A提供了基于相干性的恢复保证和对K翻转预算的鲁棒性（不可能性）证书

Conclusion: 标签翻转攻击对离线RLHF系统构成严重威胁，攻击成功率受字典几何结构影响。提出的BAL-A和BMP-A方法能够有效实施针对性毒化攻击，揭示了DPO等系统的安全脆弱性

Abstract: Offline Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) pipelines such as Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) train on a pre-collected preference dataset, which makes them vulnerable to preference poisoning attack. We study label flip attacks against log-linear DPO. We first illustrate that flipping one preference label induces a parameter-independent shift in the DPO gradient. Using this key property, we can then convert the targeted poisoning problem into a structured binary sparse approximation problem. To solve this problem, we develop two attack methods: Binary-Aware Lattice Attack (BAL-A) and Binary Matching Pursuit Attack (BMP-A). BAL-A embeds the binary flip selection problem into a binary-aware lattice and applies Lenstra-Lenstra-Lovász reduction and Babai's nearest plane algorithm; we provide sufficient conditions that enforce binary coefficients and recover the minimum-flip objective. BMP-A adapts binary matching pursuit to our non-normalized gradient dictionary and yields coherence-based recovery guarantees and robustness (impossibility) certificates for $K$-flip budgets. Experiments on synthetic dictionaries and the Stanford Human Preferences dataset validate the theory and highlight how dictionary geometry governs attack success.

</details>


### [379] [Pretraining on Sleep Data Improves non-Sleep Biosignal Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02500)
*William Lehn-Schiøler,Magnus Ruud Kjær,Phillip Hempel,Magnus Guldberg Pedersen,Rahul Thapa,Bryan He,Nicolai Spicher,Andreas Brink-Kjaer,Lars Kai Hansen,Emmanuel Mignot*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 睡眠基础模型在睡眠领域表现优异，本研究探索睡眠生物信号作为预训练分布，能否学习到可迁移到相邻领域（非睡眠EEG和ECG）的表征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 验证睡眠生物信号是否可以作为有效的预训练分布，学习能够迁移到相邻领域（非睡眠EEG和ECG）的表征，探索跨领域生物信号学习的潜力。

Method: 采用睡眠基础模型的类似方法，进行仅睡眠的多模态对比预训练（使用留一出目标），然后在非睡眠EEG和ECG的8个下游任务上进行迁移学习评估。

Result: 睡眠预训练在所有8个下游任务上均优于从头训练，在多个任务上达到或超越了先前专门化SOTA模型和基础模型的性能。

Conclusion: 睡眠生物信号可以作为有效的预训练分布，学习到的表征能够成功迁移到相邻的EEG和ECG领域，为跨领域生物信号学习提供了新思路。

Abstract: Sleep foundation models have recently demonstrated strong performance on in-domain polysomnography tasks, including sleep staging, apnea detection, and disease risk prediction. In this work, we investigate whether sleep biosignals can serve as an effective pretraining distribution for learning representations that transfer beyond sleep to adjacent domains. Following sleep foundation models, we perform sleep-only multimodal contrastive pretraining (with a leave-one-out objective) and evaluate transfer to non-sleep EEG and ECG, two well-benchmarked biosignal modalities with heterogeneous datasets and clinically meaningful downstream tasks. Across eight downstream tasks spanning multiple EEG and ECG datasets, sleep pretraining consistently improves performance relative to training from scratch. Moreover, on several tasks, we achieve performance competitive with or surpassing prior specialized state-of-the-art and foundation models.

</details>


### [380] [A Novel Preprocessing-Driven Approach to Remaining Useful Life (RUL) Prediction Using Temporal Convolutional Networks (TCN)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02507)
*Florent Imbert,Tosin Adewumi,Hui Han*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种新的预处理流程，用于提升航空发动机剩余使用寿命预测的准确性，通过改进数据质量和时间表示来增强深度学习模型性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度学习方法主要关注模型架构设计，对输入特征处理较为统一，往往忽视了数据预处理对预测性能的重要影响。航空发动机RUL预测对预测性维护、运行可靠性和降低生命周期成本至关重要。

Method: 提出新颖的预处理流程，利用完整时间序列数据，在每个时间步生成RUL估计，使模型能够捕捉细粒度的退化动态，并在发动机整个运行寿命中提供连续的预测洞察。

Result: 在NASA C-MAPSS数据集上的实验表明，与CNN、RNN、LSTM、DCNN、TCN、BiGRU-TSAM、AGCNN、ATCN等最先进神经模型相比，该方法在航空发动机RUL预测中始终实现更高的准确性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 预处理在最大化神经预测模型有效性方面起着关键作用，所提出的预处理流程能显著提升RUL预测性能，为预测性维护提供更可靠的连续预测洞察。

Abstract: Accurate prediction of Remaining Useful Life (RUL) in aero-engines is vital for predictive maintenance, improved operational reliability, and reduced lifecycle costs. While deep learning approaches have demonstrated strong potential in this area, most existing methods focus primarily on model architecture design and treat input features uniformly, often neglecting the influence of data preprocessing. In this work, we propose a novel preprocessing pipeline that enhances RUL prediction by improving data quality and temporal representation before model training. Our approach leverages complete temporal sequences and generates RUL estimates at each timestep, enabling the model to capture fine-grained degradation dynamics and deliver continuous prognostic insights throughout the engine's operational life. To validate the effectiveness of the proposed pipeline, we conduct experiments on the NASA C-MAPSS dataset. Comparative evaluations against a suite of state-of-the-art neural models including CNN, RNN, LSTM, DCNN, TCN, BiGRU-TSAM, AGCNN, and ATCN, demonstrate that our approach consistently achieves superior accuracy and robustness in aero-engine RUL prediction. These results highlight the critical role of preprocessing in maximizing the effectiveness of neural prognostic models.

</details>


### [381] [MPCS: Neuroplastic Continual Learning via Multi-Component Plasticity and Topology-Aware EWC](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02509)
*Joern Hentsch*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MPCS是一个集成11种神经可塑性机制的持续学习系统，在MEP-BENCH基准测试中通过帕累托优化实现高性能，研究发现傅里叶编码最关键，而EWC正则化会降低性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决持续学习中可塑性（获取新知识）与稳定性（保留旧知识）之间的基本矛盾，通过多机制集成来优化这一权衡。

Method: 提出MPCS系统，集成11种互补机制：任务驱动神经发生、傅里叶编码输入、EWC正则化、元重放、混合巩固、混合门控、突触修剪/再生、赫布更新、任务相似性路由、自适应生长控制和连续神经元重要性跟踪。在MEP-BENCH基准上进行评估，使用任务性能、表示多样性和梯度冲突率的三维帕累托标准。

Result: MPCS获得94.2的归一化效率分数，在14个门通过系统中9个达到帕累托前沿。关键发现：1）傅里叶编码是最关键组件（移除后性能下降30.7个百分点）；2）全局EWC会降低性能；3）帕累托状态评估具有预测性，移除两个帕累托支配组件（EWC+赫布）得到MPCS_EFFICIENT，性能提升0.6个百分点且计算成本降低4.7倍。

Conclusion: MPCS通过多机制集成有效平衡了持续学习中的可塑性与稳定性，傅里叶编码是系统关键组件，而EWC正则化在高任务相似性场景下反而有害，帕累托前沿可作为有效的模型压缩指导。

Abstract: Continual learning systems face a fundamental tension between plasticity -- acquiring new knowledge  --  and stability  --  retaining prior knowledge. We introduce MPCS (Multi-Plasticity Continual System), a neuroplastic architecture that integrates eleven complementary mechanisms: task-driven neurogenesis, Fourier-encoded inputs, EWC regularization, meta-replay, mixed consolidation, hybrid gating, synapse pruning/regeneration, Hebbian updates, task similarity routing, adaptive growth control, and continuous neuron importance tracking. We evaluate MPCS on MEP-BENCH, a multi-track benchmark spanning 31 tasks across regression, classification, logic, and mixed domains, using a three-dimensional Pareto criterion over task performance (Perf), representation diversity (RD), and gradient conflict rate (GCR). Across 15 ablation configurations (3 seeds x 4 tracks x 2000 epochs), MPCS achieves a Normalized Efficiency Score of 94.2, placing it on the Pareto frontier among 9 of 14 gate-passing systems. Key findings: (i) Fourier encoding is the single most critical component (removal drops Perf by 30.7 pp and fails the MEP gate on 14% of tasks); (ii) global EWC degrades performance (NES = -4.2); topology-local EWC reduces this penalty (NES 90.5->91.8) but does not eliminate it; removing EWC entirely yields MPCS_EFFICIENT, the highest-Perf system -- establishing a monotone relationship in the high task-similarity regime (s_bar ~= 0.95): global EWC < topology EWC < no EWC; (iii) the Pareto status assessment is predictive: removing the two Pareto-dominated components (EWC + Hebbian) jointly yields MPCS_EFFICIENT, which improves Perf by 0.6 pp at 4.7x lower compute cost (127 vs. 602 min), validating the Pareto frontier as an actionable model-compression guide.

</details>


### [382] [Evaluating Tabular Representation Learning for Network Intrusion Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02519)
*Muhammad Usman Butt,Andreas Hotho,Daniel Schlör*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究了表格表示学习技术在网络入侵检测中的应用，通过系统评估多种表示学习方法在NetFlow数据集上的表现，发现没有单一方法在所有场景中表现最优，监督方法显著优于无监督异常检测，且跨数据集迁移效果受数据集组合影响较大。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统网络入侵检测系统依赖人工特征工程，需要领域专业知识，这与现代机器学习让模型直接从数据中学习有意义表示的原则相悖。研究者希望探索表格表示学习技术是否能通过自动学习NetFlow数据的鲁棒特征表示来改进入侵检测性能。

Method: 对最先进的表示学习方法在基准NetFlow数据集上进行系统评估，包括与传统自编码器和端到端Transformer基线的比较。使用监督分类器和无监督异常检测器评估学习到的表示，并对每种组合进行全面的超参数探索。还进行了跨数据集迁移实验。

Result: 结果显示出强烈的数据集-模型依赖性，没有单一方法在所有场景中持续占优。对于监督分类，TabICL在CIDDS数据集上表现最佳，而自编码器紧随其后，在数据集平均排名上与端到端Transformer模型并列。监督方法显著优于无监督异常检测方法。跨数据集迁移实验表明，通过适当的方法和分类器选择，学习到的表示可以在网络环境间泛化，但迁移性能因源-目标数据集组合而异，表明对网络环境间分布差异敏感。

Conclusion: 表格表示学习可以改善网络入侵检测，但没有"一刀切"的解决方案。最佳方法选择取决于具体数据集，监督方法通常优于无监督方法。学习到的表示可以跨网络环境迁移，但迁移效果受数据集间分布差异影响。研究强调了在网络入侵检测中考虑数据集特定特性和环境差异的重要性。

Abstract: Classic Network Intrusion Detection Systems (NIDS) often rely on manual feature engineering to extract meaningful patterns from network traffic data. However, this approach requires domain expertise and runs counter to the widely adopted principle of modern machine learning and neural networks: that models themselves should learn meaningful representations directly from data. We investigate whether tabular representation learning techniques can improve intrusion detection performance by automatically learning robust feature representations for NetFlow data. This paper presents a systematic evaluation of state-of-the-art representation learning methods on benchmark NetFlow datasets, comparing against traditional autoencoders and end-to-end transformer baselines. We evaluate learned representations using both supervised classifiers and unsupervised anomaly detectors, with comprehensive hyperparameter exploration for each combination. Our results reveal strong dataset-model dependency, with no single approach consistently dominating across all scenarios. For supervised classification, TabICL achieves the best performance on CIDDS, while autoencoders follow closely and tie with end-to-end transformer models for the best average rank across datasets. Supervised approaches substantially outperform unsupervised anomaly detection methods, where no single combination consistently dominates as optimal choices depend on the dataset. Cross-dataset transfer experiments demonstrate that learned representations can generalize across network environments with appropriate method and classifier selection. However, transfer performance varies substantially depending on the source-target dataset combination, indicating sensitivity to distributional differences between network environments.

</details>


### [383] [Physics-Informed Neural Learning for State Reconstruction and Parameter Identification in Coupled Greenhouse Climate Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02524)
*Sani Biswas,Khursheed J. Ansari,Md. Nasim Akhtar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种耦合物理信息神经网络方法，用于联合重建温室内的温湿度动态，并同时识别关键模型参数，在数据稀疏和噪声条件下实现一致估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 温室环境中的温湿度动态监测对农业管理至关重要，但实际观测往往稀疏且带有噪声。传统数据驱动方法难以准确重建物理过程，需要结合物理知识来提高估计的准确性和可解释性。

Method: 开发了一种耦合物理信息神经网络框架，将简化的物理模型约束整合到神经网络训练中。通过将控制动态的物理方程作为正则化项，使网络在满足数据拟合的同时遵守物理规律，实现状态重建和参数识别。

Result: 在模拟昼夜强迫条件的合成数据集上评估，相比纯数据驱动神经网络基线，耦合PINN显著提高了重建精度，降低了温湿度误差，特别是在湿度通道改善明显。同时成功恢复了主导物理参数。

Conclusion: 物理信息学习方法在温室气候建模中具有重要潜力，能够在数据稀缺的环境系统中实现准确的状态重建和可解释的参数识别，为环境系统建模提供了新思路。

Abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) have recently emerged as a promising framework for integrating data-driven learning with physical knowledge. In this work, we propose a coupled PINN approach for the joint reconstruction of indoor temperature and humidity dynamics in greenhouse environments, together with simultaneous identification of key model parameters. The method incorporates a reduced-order physically motivated model into the learning process, enabling consistent estimation under sparse and noisy observations.
  The artificial intelligence contribution lies in the development of a coupled physics-informed neural learning framework that integrates governing dynamical constraints into neural network training, while the engineering application focuses on greenhouse climate state reconstruction and parameter identification.
  The proposed framework is evaluated on a controlled synthetic benchmark that mimics diurnal forcing conditions. Compared with a purely data-driven neural network baseline, the coupled PINN achieves improved reconstruction accuracy, reducing temperature and humidity errors while maintaining high coefficients of determination. The improvement is particularly pronounced in the humidity channel, where latent moisture dynamics are more difficult to infer from limited measurements.
  In addition to accurate state reconstruction, the method successfully recovers the dominant physical parameters governing the system dynamics, demonstrating its ability to learn interpretable representations beyond data interpolation. These results highlight the potential of physics-informed learning for greenhouse climate modeling and, more broadly, for data-scarce environmental systems.

</details>


### [384] [Recurrent Deep Reinforcement Learning for Chemotherapy Control under Partial Observability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02552)
*Firas Mohamed Elamine Kiram,Imane Youkana,Rachida Saouli,Gian Antonio Susto,Laid Kahloul*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究探讨了在化疗剂量优化中，使用基于记忆的强化学习策略（特别是循环TD3方法）在部分可观测条件下能否改善治疗效果，结果表明循环架构在状态信息不完全时能显著提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 化疗剂量优化需要在不完全观测患者状态的临床环境下做出序贯决策，平衡肿瘤抑制与毒性，但现有强化学习方法通常假设完全可观测状态，这与实际临床条件不符。

Method: 采用基于循环TD3的方法，使用独立的LSTM演员-评论家网络，在AhnChemoEnv基准测试中评估了离策略和同策略循环架构，并与前馈TD3和Soft Actor-Critic方法进行比较，固定药代动力学和药效学变异性以隔离隐藏状态不确定性和观测噪声。

Result: 在十个随机种子下，循环架构在全可观测条件下仅带来适度改善，但在部分可观测条件下表现出显著更强、更稳定的性能，实现了更一致的肿瘤抑制和更好的正常细胞保护。

Conclusion: 基于记忆的策略在临床相关状态信息不完整或有噪声时特别有益，为化疗控制中的部分可观测问题提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Chemotherapy dose optimization can be formulated as a dynamic treatment regime, requiring sequential decisions under uncertainty that must balance tumor suppression against toxicity. However, most reinforcement learning approaches assume full observability of the patient state, a condition rarely met in clinical practice. We investigate whether memory-augmented policies can improve chemotherapy control under partial observability. To this end, we employ a recurrent TD3-based approach with separate LSTM actor-critic networks and evaluate it on the AhnChemoEnv benchmark from DTR-Bench, considering both off-policy and on-policy recurrent architectures against feed-forward TD3 and Soft Actor-Critic. Pharmacokinetic and pharmacodynamic variability are held fixed to isolate hidden-state uncertainty and observation noise and to avoid confounding effects from inter-patient variability. Across ten random seeds, recurrence yields modest benefit under full observability but substantially stronger and more stable performance under partial observability, with more consistent tumor suppression and improved normal-cell preservation. These findings indicate that memory-based policies are particularly beneficial when clinically relevant state information is incomplete or noisy.

</details>


### [385] [StreamIndex: Memory-Bounded Compressed Sparse Attention via Streaming Top-k](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02568)
*Jaber Jaber,Osama Jaber*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: StreamIndex是一种Triton实现的压缩稀疏注意力（CSA）流水线，通过分块分区-合并top-k驱动避免中间张量全量存储，解决了V4-Flash在长序列下内存爆炸问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CSA实现需要全量存储FP32分数张量，在长序列（如S=65,536）时内存需求达256GB，超出单GPU HBM容量，限制了模型扩展性。

Method: 提出StreamIndex，核心是分块分区-合并top-k驱动，不完整存储中间张量；与TileLang的流水线注意力内核组合，实现内存高效处理。

Result: StreamIndex在H200上支持序列长度扩展到1,048,576（32倍扩展），峰值HBM仅6.21GB；与全量存储方法相比召回率接近1.0000，在S=262,144时运行时间1.97秒。

Conclusion: StreamIndex有效解决了CSA索引器步骤的内存瓶颈，为长序列处理提供了可行方案，但未涉及注意力内核加速或端到端实际检查点行为。

Abstract: DeepSeek-V3.2 and V4 introduce Compressed Sparse Attention (CSA): a lightning indexer (a learned scoring projection over compressed keys) scores them, the top-k are selected per query, and a sparse attention kernel reads only those. Public CSA implementations materialize a [B, S, H_I, T] FP32 score tensor before the top-k reduction. With H_I=64 indexer heads and the V4-Flash compression ratio m=4, that intermediate is 256 GB at sequence length S=65,536, exceeding any single-GPU high-bandwidth-memory (HBM) budget. We present StreamIndex, a Triton implementation of the CSA pipeline whose central component is a chunked partition-merge top-k driver that never materializes the full intermediate. On synthetic-but-realistic V4-shaped inputs at the indexer-step (layer) level on a single NVIDIA H200, the materialize path runs out of memory (OOMs) at S=65,536 with V4-Flash dimensions; StreamIndex runs the same indexer to S=1,048,576 with 6.21 GB peak HBM, a 32x regime extension. Set-overlap recall against the materialize ground truth is bit-exact at small S where both fit; across three 5-point design-space sweeps (chunk size, key-tile size, top-k), mean recall rounds to 1.0000 with min recall at least 0.9980 in every cell. The chunked driver composes with TileLang's pipelined attention kernel: at S=262,144 with V4-Flash dimensions, the materialize indexer paired with TileLang attention OOMs while the chunked indexer paired with the same attention runs in 1.97 s at 18.56 GB peak. Our contribution targets the indexer step; we make no claim of a faster attention kernel or of real-checkpoint end-to-end behavior. Code: https://github.com/RightNow-AI/StreamIndex.

</details>


### [386] [Gradient Boosted Risk Scores](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02593)
*Costa Georgantas,Jonas Richiardi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种基于梯度提升的算法，用于构建紧凑且预测性强的风险评分模型，相比回归方法能生成更少的规则


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 风险评分是医疗、保险和风险管理中可解释且可操作的一类机器学习模型，但现有方法主要使用线性回归，无法建模非线性效应，且生成的规则数量较多

Method: 提出基于梯度提升的算法，能够建模非线性效应；提供C++实现及Python和R绑定；在12个表格数据集上进行评估

Result: 在回归、分类和时间到事件任务中，该方法在保持竞争性预测性能的同时，相比AutoScore产生更紧凑的评分：分类任务规则减少60%，时间到事件任务规则减少16%

Conclusion: 该方法能够构建更紧凑且预测性强的风险评分模型，优于基于回归的替代方案

Abstract: Risk scores are an interpretable and actionable class of machine learning models with applications in medicine, insurance, and risk management. Unlike most computational methods, risk scores are designed to be computed by a human by attributing points to a data sample based on a limited set of criteria. The most common approaches for generating risk scores use linear regressions to estimate the effect of selected variables. We propose a simple and effective approach towards building compact and predictive risk scores. We provide an algorithm based on gradient boosting that is capable of modeling nonlinear effects, along with a C++ implementation with Python and R bindings. Through extensive empirical evaluation on twelve tabular datasets spanning regression, classification, and time-to-event tasks, we show that our method achieves competitive predictive performance while producing substantially more compact scores than regression-based alternatives, with 60% fewer rules for classification tasks and 16% fewer rules for time-to-event tasks on average, compared to AutoScore.

</details>


### [387] [HARMES: A Multi-Modal Dataset for Wearable Human Activity Recognition with Motion, Environmental Sensing and Sound](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02596)
*Robin Burchard,Pascal-André Brückner,Marius Bock,Juergen Gall,Kristof Van Laerhoven*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: HARMES是一个多模态穿戴式数据集，结合了IMU运动传感、环境传感器（温湿度、气压）和音频三种手腕记录模态，用于日常活动识别，包含20名参与者在家庭环境中超过80小时的数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 单一传感模态在识别日常活动时存在局限性，特别是对于相似或复杂活动会产生模糊信号。多模态方法能够利用不同模态的互补优势，提高活动识别的准确性。

Method: 收集了20名参与者在家庭环境中执行15类日常活动的数据，通过手腕设备同时记录三种模态：IMU运动数据、环境传感器数据（湿度、温度、气压）和音频数据。数据集包含超过80小时的记录数据，每人约3小时标记活动数据。

Result: HARMES是目前首个结合这三种特定传感器组合的数据集，规模比之前最大的手腕惯性-声学HAR数据集大近6倍。基准测试显示，模态贡献具有活动依赖性，对于仅靠运动数据模糊的活动，多模态能提供互补价值。

Conclusion: HARMES数据集为多模态穿戴式活动识别研究提供了重要资源，展示了多模态方法在识别日常活动中的价值，特别是对于运动数据难以区分的活动，其他模态能提供关键补充信息。

Abstract: With each sensing modality exhibiting inherent strengths and limitations, multi-modal approaches for wearable Human Activity Recognition (HAR) are becoming increasingly relevant -- particularly for recognizing Activities of Daily Living (ADLs), where individual modalities often produce ambiguous signals for similar or complex activities. This work introduces HARMES, a multi-modal wearable dataset combining three wrist-recorded modalities: motion sensing via an Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU), atmospheric environmental sensors (humidity, temperature, and pressure), and audio. Collected from 20 participants performing household activities in their own homes, HARMES totals over 80 hours of recorded data, with approximately three hours of labeled activity data per participant across 15 ADL classes. To the best of our knowledge, HARMES is the first dataset to combine this particular sensor trio, and it is nearly six times larger than the previously largest wrist-inertial-acoustic HAR dataset. In an extensive benchmark, we evaluate cross-subject generalization and conduct an ablation study revealing that modality contributions are activity-dependent and can provide complementary value, particularly for activities that are ambiguous from motion data alone. HARMES is freely available at Zenodo, alongside example code for loading the dataset and training models on GitHub.

</details>


### [388] [Isotropic Fourier Neural Operators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02597)
*Michael F. Staddon*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种改进的傅里叶神经算子（Isotropic Fourier Neural Operator），通过修改线性变换确保空间对称性，在保持模型性能的同时大幅减少参数数量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统傅里叶神经算子的线性变换不能保证物理系统的各向同性对称性，而大多数物理系统都是各向同性的，需要一种能保持空间对称性的改进方法。

Method: 修改傅里叶神经算子中的线性变换，使其能够确保空间对称性被尊重，从而构建各向同性的傅里叶神经算子。

Result: 改进后的各向同性傅里叶神经算子不仅提升了模型性能，还将参数数量在2D情况下减少了16倍，在3D情况下减少了96倍。

Conclusion: 通过确保空间对称性，各向同性傅里叶神经算子在保持物理系统本质特征的同时，显著提高了计算效率和模型性能。

Abstract: Fourier Neural Operators are deep learning models that learn mappings between function spaces and can be used to learn and solve partial differential equations (PDEs), in some cases significantly faster than traditional PDE solvers. Within the model are Fourier layers, which apply linear transformations directly to the Fourier modes, with parameters depending on the wave numbers. However, most physical systems are isotropic, with the results being independent of the coordinate system chosen, but the linear transformations do not necessarily respect these symmetries. We propose a modification to the linear transformations that ensures spatial symmetries are respected, called the Isotropic Fourier Neural Operator, which both improves model performance and reduces the number of parameters by up to a factor of 16 in 2D and 96 in 3D.

</details>


### [389] [Gradient-Discrepancy Acquisition for Pool-Based Active Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02609)
*Mohamadsadegh Khosravani,Sandra Zilles*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于梯度的主动学习获取准则，源自Luo等人的泛化界，可替代不确定性采样或结合多样性方法，理论证明有效


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 主动学习的效果取决于获取准则的选择，传统方法如不确定性采样存在局限性，需要更理论驱动的获取准则来提升样本选择效率

Method: 提出基于梯度的获取准则，从Luo等人的泛化界推导而来，可替代不确定性采样中的不确定性度量，或整合到考虑样本分布的多样性方法中

Result: 提供了理论证明，并通过实验评估验证了所提获取准则的有效性

Conclusion: 提出的基于梯度的获取准则为主动学习提供了新的理论驱动方法，在理论和实践上都表现出良好效果

Abstract: The effectiveness of active learning hinges on the choice of the acquisition criterion by which a learning algorithm selects potentially informative data points whose label is subsequently queried. This paper proposes a novel gradient-based acquisition criterion, derived from a generalization bound introduced by Luo et al. (2022). This criterion can be applied in lieu of uncertainty measures in uncertainty sampling, or incorporated into diversity-based methods that consider the spread of sampled points in addition to the uncertainty of their labels. We provide a theoretical justification of the proposed acquisition criterion, and demonstrate its effectiveness in an empirical evaluation.

</details>


### [390] [Selective Prediction from Agreement: A Lipschitz-Consistent Version Space Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02611)
*Mohamadsadegh Khosravani*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种在固定池（转导）设置下进行选择性分类的方法，通过一致性协议和Lipschitz边界约束来确定哪些样本可以安全预测，哪些需要弃权。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在选择性分类中，当未标记的数据池预先给定且只能查询部分点的标签时，如何有效地选择查询点并进行可靠的预测是一个重要问题。传统方法缺乏对版本空间一致性的理论保证。

Method: 1. 通过一致性协议视角看待选择性预测：在嵌入空间中利用Lipschitz边界约束定义版本空间；2. 推导上下Lipschitz边界，为每个池点定义经过认证的有效标签集合；3. 仅在所有一致分类头都同意时进行预测，否则弃权；4. 提出单调次模几何代理进行预算化查询，使用贪心算法保持标准近似因子。

Result: 该方法能够在固定池设置下为选择性分类提供理论保证：1. 确定了哪些标签可以被安全预测（当所有一致分类头都同意时）；2. 提出了有效的查询策略；3. 贪心算法保持了标准近似因子，确保了查询效率。

Conclusion: 通过一致性协议和Lipschitz边界约束的方法，在固定池选择性分类中实现了可靠的预测和有效的查询策略，为实际应用提供了理论保证和实用算法。

Abstract: We consider selective classification with abstention in the fixed-pool (or transductive) setting, where the unlabeled pool is given beforehand and only a subset of points can be queried for labels. Our main insight is to view selective prediction through agreement: given queried labels and Lipschitz margin constraints in an embedding space, the version space of Lipschitz-consistent classification heads is well defined. We obtain upper and lower Lipschitz margin bounds that define, for each pool point, a set of certified valid labels containing the prediction of every head in the version space. The model therefore predicts only when the label is forced (i.e., all consistent heads agree), and abstains otherwise. We also propose a monotone submodular geometric proxy for budgeted querying, and show that a greedy algorithm retains the standard approximation factor.

</details>


### [391] [Gradient-Gated DPO: Stabilizing Preference Optimization in Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02626)
*Inoussa Mouiche*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Gate-DPO通过引入梯度门控机制解决DPO中的"挤压效应"，稳定训练过程，在不修改偏好目标的情况下改善对齐效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DPO虽然简化了人类反馈强化学习，但存在"挤压效应"问题：负梯度集中在高置信度预测上，抑制替代响应，导致训练中出现系统性概率崩溃。

Method: 提出梯度门控偏好优化(Gate-DPO)，根据模型的概率几何结构调节拒绝响应的梯度。当更新针对极低概率响应时，门控机制衰减有害梯度，同时保持标准优化行为。

Result: 在多个架构和偏好数据集上的实验表明，Gate-DPO能持续减少挤压效应，提高选择响应似然。质量动力学分析显示更健康的优化行为，改善偏好响应并减少对整体分布的抑制。

Conclusion: 控制梯度动态而非单纯扩大规模是实现稳定高效对齐的关键。较小的门控模型可以比更大的非门控模型表现出更强的选择响应改进，Gate-DPO与现有方法互补。

Abstract: Preference optimization has become a central paradigm for aligning large language models with human feedback. Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) simplifies reinforcement learning from human feedback by directly optimizing pairwise preferences, removing the need for reward modeling and policy optimization. However, recent work shows that DPO exhibits a squeezing effect, where negative gradients applied to rejected responses concentrate probability mass on high-confidence predictions while suppressing alternative responses. This phenomenon arises even in simple softmax models and can lead to systematic probability collapse during training. We introduce Gradient-Gated Preference Optimization (Gate-DPO), a method that stabilizes training by modulating rejected gradients according to the model's probability geometry. When updates target extremely low-probability responses, the gate attenuates harmful gradients while preserving standard optimization behavior. Gate-DPO addresses this optimization pathology without modifying the underlying preference objective and is complementary to existing methods such as extended SFT, IPO, and Cal-DPO. Experiments across multiple architectures and preference datasets show that Gate-DPO consistently reduces squeezing and improves chosen-response likelihood. Mass-dynamics analysis further reveals healthier optimization behavior, with improved preferred responses and reduced suppression of the overall distribution. Notably, smaller gated models can exhibit stronger chosen-response improvements than larger ungated models, suggesting that controlling gradient dynamics, rather than scale alone, is key to stable and efficient alignment.

</details>


### [392] [CNNs for Vis-NIR Chemometrics: From Contradiction to Conditional Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02636)
*Dário Passos*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文指出近红外深度学习研究中存在相互矛盾的结论，认为这些矛盾源于未控制的调节变量，并提出一个条件性设计框架来链接架构选择与光谱物理特性、数据集状态和部署场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 近红外深度学习研究在化学计量学中报告了相互矛盾的结论，例如小核与大核、浅层与深层架构、原始光谱与预处理、单域训练与迁移学习等选择。这导致同一架构在不同研究中表现出优劣不一，给化学计量学实践者带来了实际困境。

Method: 通过分析已发表的化学计量学和光谱学研究证据，追踪矛盾根源到三个主要因素：(1) 水主导基质中可见-近红外测量的间接性；(2) 有效感受野与信息性光谱结构宽度不匹配；(3) 验证设计作为隐藏超参数影响模型排名。基于此提出一个条件性设计框架。

Result: 分析表明这些矛盾不是方法不可调和的结果，而是结构上预期的未控制调节变量的后果。提出的框架能够将架构和预处理选择与光谱物理特性、数据集状态和预期部署场景联系起来。

Conclusion: 该观点将深度学习化学计量学从模板驱动的架构选择转向可重复、物理感知且部署对齐的模型比较，为实践者提供了更系统的设计指导。

Abstract: Near-infrared (NIR; a.k.a.\ NIRS) deep-learning studies in chemometrics increasingly report mutually inconsistent conclusions regarding convolutional neural network (CNN) design, including small versus large kernels, shallow versus deep architectures, raw spectra versus preprocessing, and single-domain training versus transfer learning. As a result, the same architecture can appear superior in one study and inferior in another, creating a practical impasse for chemometric practitioners. In this review, we argue that these contradictions are not evidence of irreconcilable methods but a structurally expected consequence of uncontrolled moderating variables. Specifically, we trace recurring disagreements to (i) the indirect nature of Vis--NIR measurement in water-dominated matrices, (ii) mismatch between effective receptive field (ERF) and the width of informative spectral structure, and (iii) validation design (including split strategy, hyperparameter tuning budget, and exposure to deployment-like shifts) acting as a hidden hyperparameter that can dominate model ranking. Building on evidence from published chemometrics and spectroscopy studies, we propose a conditional design framework that links architecture and preprocessing choices to spectral physics, dataset regime, and intended deployment scenario. Overall, the proposed perspective moves DL Chemometrics from template-driven architecture selection toward reproducible, physics-aware, and deployment-aligned model comparison.

</details>


### [393] [CARD: Coarse-to-fine Autoregressive Modeling with Radix-based Decomposition for Transferable Free Energy Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02657)
*Ziyang Yu,Yi He,Wenbing Huang,Wen Yan,Yang Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CARD是一个用于计算自由能差的生成框架，通过基数分解将3D坐标转换为混合离散-连续序列，实现粗到细的自回归建模，在保持经典方法精度的同时实现约40倍推理加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自由能计算方法存在显著局限性：经典计算方法依赖大量分子动力学模拟，计算成本极高；而基于深度学习的方法要么受限于表达能力不足的生成模型，要么受限于特定系统的输入维度，泛化能力有限。

Method: CARD采用创新的基数分解方法，将3D坐标双射转换为混合离散-连续序列，实现粗到细的自回归建模。该模型对应零自由能分布，可作为任意系统绝对自由能计算的提案分布，无需依赖炼金术路径。

Result: CARD在多种任务实验中，对具有不同拓扑结构的未见系统，达到了与经典计算方法相当的精度，同时实现了约40倍的推理加速。

Conclusion: CARD通过创新的序列建模方法，成功解决了自由能计算中精度与效率的权衡问题，为分子相互作用的热力学偏好分析提供了高效准确的解决方案。

Abstract: Estimating free energy differences quantifies thermodynamic preferences in molecular interactions, which is central to chemistry and drug discovery. Despite fruitful progress, existing methods still face key limitations: classical computational approaches remain prohibitively expensive due to their reliance on extensive molecular dynamics simulations, while deep learning-based methods are constrained by either less-expressive generative models or input dimensions tied to a specific system, resulting in negligible generalization. To address these challenges, we propose CARD, a generative framework that employs a novel radix-based decomposition to bijectively convert 3D coordinates into mixed discrete-continuous sequences, enabling coarse-to-fine autoregressive modeling with enhanced expressiveness. Notably, the model corresponds to a distribution with zero free energy, serving as a proposal for absolute free energy computation of arbitrary systems without relying on alchemical pathways. Experiments across diverse tasks demonstrate that CARD matches the accuracy of classical computational methods on unseen systems with diverse topologies, while achieving an approximately 40-fold speedup in inference.

</details>


### [394] [Spectral Model eXplainer: a chemically-grounded explainability framework for spectral-based machine learning models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02684)
*Jose Vinicius Ribeiro,Rafael Figueira Goncalves,Fabio Luiz Melquiades,Sylvio Barbon Junior*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种针对光谱数据的解释性AI框架SMX，能够直接解释化学意义的光谱区域而非孤立变量，解决了现有方法不适用于光谱数据物理连续性和高共线性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有可解释AI方法（如SHAP、PFI、VIP）主要针对表格数据设计，无法有效处理光谱数据的物理连续性和高共线性，只能为孤立光谱变量分配相关性，无法解释化学意义的光谱区域。

Method: 提出SMX框架：1) 通过PCA汇总每个光谱区域；2) 定义基于分位数的逻辑谓词；3) 在随机子样本中通过扰动估计谓词相关性；4) 在有向加权图中聚合袋装排名，使用局部到达中心性进行总结；5) 关键组件是阈值光谱重建，将谓词边界反投影到原始光谱域。

Result: 该方法在8个真实光谱数据集（6个基于X射线荧光，2个基于伽马射线光谱）和1个具有已知地面真实值的合成基准上进行了评估。

Conclusion: SMX框架为光谱分类器提供了专家可理解的光谱区域级解释，能够直接与测量光谱进行视觉比较，解决了光谱数据特有的解释性挑战。

Abstract: Spectral-based machine learning models have been increasingly deployed in chemometrics and spectroscopy, where predictive accuracy is as important as explainability. Current employed eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) methods are largely adapted from tabular or generic multivariate domains, assigning relevance to isolated spectral variables rather than to the chemically meaningful spectral zones. Widely adopted tools such as SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP), Permutation Feature Importance (PFI), and Variable Importance in Projection scores (VIP) were not designed for the physical continuity and high collinearity of spectral data, and their variable-level outputs require post-hoc aggregation to recover zone-level information. This study introduces the Spectral Model eXplainer (SMX), a post-hoc, global, model-agnostic XAI framework that explains spectral classifiers through expert-informed spectral zones. SMX summarizes each zone via PCA, defines quantile-based logical predicates, estimates predicate relevance with perturbation in stochastic subsamples, and aggregates bag-wise rankings in a directed weighted graph summarized by Local Reaching Centrality. A key component is threshold spectrum reconstruction, which back-projects predicate boundaries to the original spectral domain in natural measurement units, enabling direct visual comparison with measured spectra. The method was evaluated on eight real spectral datasets (six based on X-ray Fluorescence--XRF and two based on Gamma-ray Spectrometry) and one synthetic benchmark with known gr

</details>


### [395] [MSMixer: Learned Multi-Scale Temporal Mixing with Complementary Linear Shortcut for Long-Term Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02689)
*Ahmed Cherif*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MSMixer是一个轻量级多尺度MLP架构，通过并行多尺度分支、可学习门控和DLinear捷径，在长时序预测中实现最佳性能，参数量仅112K。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有轻量级MLP模型通常只操作单一时间分辨率，无法显式建模多尺度模式（快速振荡、中期周期性和缓慢宏观趋势），限制了长时序预测能力。

Method: 提出MSMixer，包含三个创新：1)三个并行尺度分支（下采样因子{1x,4x,16x}）的独立MLP块；2)可学习softmax门动态加权分支输出；3)DLinear互补捷径提供全窗口趋势和季节性上下文。

Result: 在四个ETT基准测试中，MSMixer平均MSE最低（0.357），优于DLinear（0.386）和NLinear（0.365），在16个配置中赢得12个。相比Transformer基线，在9/16配置中达到最佳或次佳MSE，参数量比PatchTST少5倍。

Conclusion: MSMixer通过多尺度架构有效捕获长时序预测中的多尺度模式，在保持轻量级（112K参数，O(T)复杂度）的同时达到最优性能，消融实验证实多尺度分支和DLinear捷径的互补贡献。

Abstract: Long-term time series forecasting requires models that simultaneously capture rapid oscillations, medium-range periodicities, and slowly evolving macro-trends from a fixed look-back window. Existing lightweight MLP-based models typically operate on a single temporal resolution, limiting their ability to explicitly model patterns at multiple scales. We propose MSMixer, a channel-independent multi-scale MLP architecture that addresses this limitation through three complementary innovations: (i) three parallel scale branches at down-sample factors {1x, 4x, 16x} with independent MLP blocks, (ii) a learnable softmax gate that dynamically weighs branch outputs, and (iii) a DLinear complementary shortcut that provides full-window trend and seasonality context. MSMixer contains only 112K parameters at H=96 and runs at O(T) complexity. Evaluated on four ETT benchmarks with standard chronological splits and three random seeds, MSMixer achieves the lowest average MSE (0.357) among lightweight models, outperforming DLinear (0.386, -7.4%) and NLinear (0.365, -2.1%), winning 12 of 16 configurations. Against five Transformer-based baselines from the literature, MSMixer achieves best or second-best MSE in 9 of 16 configurations while using 5x fewer parameters than PatchTST. Ablation and sensitivity analyses confirm the complementary contributions of the multi-scale branches and the DLinear shortcut.

</details>


### [396] [Federated Reinforcement Learning for Efficient Mobile Crowdsensing under Incomplete Information](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02705)
*Sumedh J. Dongare,Patrick Weber,Andrea Ortiz,Walid Saad,Oliver Hinz,Anja Klein*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出FDRL-PPO算法，通过联邦学习让移动用户自主优化任务参与策略，提升移动众感知系统的效率和公平性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 移动众感知系统中，移动用户需要在信息不完全的情况下制定任务参与策略以最大化收入，而平台需要最大化任务完成量。传统方法需要完美非因果信息，这在现实中不可行。

Method: 提出完全去中心化的联邦深度强化学习算法FDRL-PPO，每个移动用户基于自身经验、可用资源和偏好学习策略，通过联邦学习交换模型参数而非原始数据，共同提升学习效果。

Result: 在合成和真实数据集上的评估表明，FDRL-PPO在任务完成率、任务完成公平性、能耗和冲突提案数量等方面均优于基准算法。

Conclusion: FDRL-PPO算法能有效解决移动众感知系统中的任务参与策略优化问题，在保护隐私的同时提升系统整体性能。

Abstract: Mobile crowdsensing (MCS) is a distributed sensing architecture that utilizes existing sensors on mobile units (MUs) to perform sensing tasks. A mobile crowdsensing platform (MCSP) publishes the sensing tasks and the MUs decide whether to participate in exchange for money. The MCS system is dynamic: the task requirements, the MUs' availability, and their available resources change over time. The MUs aim to find an efficient task participation strategy to maximize their income while the MCSP focuses on maximizing the number of completed tasks. As optimal strategies require perfect non-causal information about the MCS system, which is unavailable in realistic scenarios, the main challenge is to find an efficient task participation strategy for the MUs under incomplete information. To this end, a novel fully decentralized federated deep reinforcement learning algorithm, FDRL-PPO, is proposed. FDRL-PPO enables every MU to learn its own task participation strategy based on its experiences, available resources, and preferences, without relying on perfect non-causal information about the MCS system. To replenish their batteries, the MUs rely on energy harvesting. As a result, their available energy varies over time, leading to varying availability and fragmented learning experiences. To mitigate these challenges, the proposed approach leverages federated learning, enabling MUs to collaboratively improve their models without sharing private raw data like their own experiences. By exchanging only learned models, MUs collectively compensate for individual limitations, and find more scalable, robust, and efficient task participation strategies. Comprehensive evaluations on both synthetic and real-world datasets show that FDRL-PPO consistently outperforms benchmark algorithms in terms of task completion ratio, fairness in task completion, energy consumption, and number of conflicting proposals.

</details>


### [397] [Visual Latents Know More Than They Say: Unsilencing Latent Reasoning in MLLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02735)
*Xin Zhang,Qiqi Tao,Jiawei Du,Moyun Liu,Joey Tianyi Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文发现现有潜在视觉推理方法存在"沉默视觉潜在变量"问题，即视觉潜在变量在训练中变得语义丰富，但在最终答案预测中却被系统性地抑制。作者提出推理时潜在优化的两阶段方法来解决这一问题，无需参数更新即可释放视觉潜在变量的推理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有连续潜在空间推理方法虽然提供了一种紧凑的多模态推理替代方案，但存在一个被忽视的优化病理：尽管视觉潜在变量在训练中变得语义丰富，但它们对最终答案预测的贡献被系统性地抑制。在共享参数空间中，自回归目标倾向于依赖直接的视觉输入作为捷径，导致潜在变量趋向于过渡状态而非信息丰富的推理内容。

Method: 提出推理时潜在优化方法，保持骨干参数冻结。第一阶段：通过查询引导的对比潜在-视觉对齐来预热视觉潜在变量，提高语义质量同时防止潜在变量坍缩。第二阶段：通过置信度进展奖励进一步优化潜在推理，激励沿着潜在跨度的预测标记分布逐渐变得更加集中，使预测通过潜在推理而非绕过它。

Result: 在八个基准测试和四个模型骨干上的实验表明，推理时潜在优化（无需参数更新）能有效释放视觉潜在变量被抑制的推理能力。

Conclusion: 通过识别并解决"沉默视觉潜在变量"问题，提出的推理时潜在优化方法能够有效释放多模态模型中视觉潜在变量的推理能力，为连续潜在空间推理提供了更有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Continuous latent-space reasoning offers a compact alternative to textual chain-of-thought for multimodal models, enabling high-dimensional visual evidence to be integrated without explicit reasoning tokens. However, we identify a previously overlooked optimization pathology in existing latent visual reasoning methods: although visual latents become semantically enriched during training, their contribution to final answer prediction is systematically suppressed. Within the shared parameter space, the autoregressive objective favors shortcut reliance on direct visual input, driving latent tokens toward transition-like states rather than informative reasoning content. We term this phenomenon Silenced Visual Latents. To address it, we disentangle the two conflicting objectives by directly optimizing the latent reasoning at inference time, keeping backbone parameters frozen. In Stage I, visual latents are warmed up via query-guided contrastive latent--visual alignment, improving semantic quality while preventing latent collapse. In Stage II, the latent reasoning is further optimized via a confidence-progression reward, which incentivizes predicted token distributions along the latent span to become progressively more concentrated, routing predictions through the latent reasoning rather than bypassing it. Experiments across eight benchmarks and four model backbones show that inference-time latent optimization, without any parameter updates, effectively unleashes the suppressed reasoning capacity of visual latents.

</details>


### [398] [Bolek: A Multimodal Language Model for Molecular Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02745)
*Frederic Grabowski,Jacek Szczerbiński,Maciej Jaśkowski,Kalina Jasińska-Kobus,Paweł Dąbrowski-Tumański,Tomasz Jetka,Bartosz Topolski*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Bolek是一个紧凑的多模态语言模型，通过将分子指纹嵌入到指令调优的文本解码器中，将自然语言推理基于分子结构，在分子性质预测任务中表现出色且解释性更强。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前分子性质模型难以审计：传统预测器只返回分数而无解释，语言模型生成的解释与输入分子关联较弱。需要开发能够提供可验证推理的分子推理模型。

Method: Bolek将Morgan指纹嵌入注入指令调优的文本解码器，通过分子描述、RDKit描述符预测、子结构检测等对齐任务微调，并在15个TDC二元分类任务上使用基于具体分子特征的合成思维链进行下游推理训练。

Result: Bolek在二元分类任务中优于其Qwen3-4B-Instruct基础模型，在15个任务中的13个上优于TxGemma-9B-Chat，ROC/PR AUC从0.55提升至0.76。其解释更可靠，引用数值描述符的频率高10-100倍，与RDKit计算值高度相关（Spearman rho=0.87-0.91）。在未见任务上也表现出良好的泛化能力。

Conclusion: 针对性的模态注入和与可验证分子特征相关的推理监督可以产生紧凑、可审计的分子推理模型，为药物发现决策提供更可靠的解释。

Abstract: Molecular property models increasingly support high-stakes drug-discovery decisions, but their outputs are often difficult to audit: classical predictors return scores without rationale, while language models can produce fluent explanations weakly grounded in the input molecule.
  We introduce Bolek, a compact multimodal language model that grounds natural-language reasoning in molecular structure by injecting a Morgan fingerprint embedding into an instruction-tuned text decoder. Bolek is fine-tuned on molecular alignment tasks, including molecule description, RDKit descriptor prediction, and substructure detection, and on downstream reasoning over 15 TDC binary classification tasks using synthetic chains-of-thought anchored in concrete molecular features.
  Across these tasks, Bolek outperforms its Qwen3-4B-Instruct base on all endpoints in yes/no mode and on 13 of 15 in chain-of-thought mode, raising mean ROC/PR AUC from 0.55 to 0.76. It also outperforms TxGemma-9B-Chat on 13 of 15 binary classification tasks despite being less than half its size. Bolek's explanations are more grounded than those of the baseline LLMs: it cites numerical descriptors 10-100x more often per chain-of-thought, and the cited values agree strongly with RDKit for key descriptors such as TPSA, MolLogP, and MolWt (Spearman rho = 0.87-0.91). Generalisation extends beyond the training panel: on 15 unseen TDC classification endpoints, Bolek matches TxGemma on five, and it produces non-trivial rank correlations on three held-out regression endpoints despite never seeing downstream regression during training.
  These results suggest that targeted modality injection and reasoning supervision tied to verifiable molecular features can yield compact, auditable molecular reasoning models.

</details>


### [399] [A decoupled diffusion planner that adapts to changing cost limits by using cost-conditioned generation for safety and reward gradients for performance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02777)
*Rufeng Chen,Zhaofan Zhang,Zhejiang Yang,Hechang Chen,Sihong Xie*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出SDGD方法，通过将自适应安全轨迹生成重新解释为从约束轨迹分布中采样，结合成本限制引导和奖励梯度引导，实现离线安全强化学习中的安全合规性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离线安全强化学习需要策略在部署时适应变化的安全预算。现有基于扩散的规划器将奖励改进和约束满足视为竞争性梯度目标，导致在成本限制下安全合规性不可靠。

Method: 提出Safe Decoupled Guidance Diffusion (SDGD)：1) 使用无分类器引导条件化成本限制，使采样偏向满足指定限制的轨迹；2) 使用奖励梯度引导优化轨迹以获得更高回报；3) 引入Feasible Trajectory Relabeling (FTR)重新塑造奖励目标，抑制奖励诱导的成本漂移。

Result: 在DSRL基准测试中，SDGD在94.7%的任务(36/38)中满足约束条件，在安全方法中达到最强的安全合规性，同时在21个任务中获得最高奖励。

Conclusion: SDGD通过解耦成本限制引导和奖励梯度引导，将自适应安全轨迹生成重新构建为约束采样问题，在保证安全合规性的同时提高奖励回报，为离线安全强化学习提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Offline safe reinforcement learning often requires policies to adapt at deployment time to safety budgets that vary across episodes or change within a single episode. While diffusion-based planners enable flexible trajectory generation, existing guidance schemes often treat reward improvement and constraint satisfaction as competing gradient objectives, which can lead to unreliable safety compliance under cost limits. We reinterpret adaptive safe trajectory generation as sampling from a constrained trajectory distribution, where the budget restricts the trajectory region, and reward shapes preferences within that region. This perspective motivates Safe Decoupled Guidance Diffusion (SDGD), which conditions classifier-free guidance on the cost limit to bias sampling toward trajectories satisfying the specified limit, while using reward-gradient guidance to refine trajectories for higher return. Because direct reward guidance can increase return while also steering samples toward trajectories with higher cumulative cost, we introduce Feasible Trajectory Relabeling (FTR) to reshape reward targets and discourage such directions. We further provide a first-order sampling-time analysis showing that FTR suppresses reward-induced cost drift under a prefix-restorative alignment condition. Extensive evaluations on the DSRL benchmark show that SDGD achieves the strongest safety compliance among baselines, satisfying the constraint on 94.7% of tasks (36/38), while obtaining the highest reward among safe methods on 21 tasks.

</details>


### [400] [A Closed-Form Persistence-Landmark Pipeline for Certified Point-Cloud and Graph Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02836)
*Sushovan Majhi,Atish Mitra,Žiga Virk,Pramita Bagchi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PLACE 是一个基于持久同调的封闭式分类管道，通过持久同调特征对点云和图形进行分类，提供三种定量保证：边界风险率、描述符选择规则和预测证书，无需学习权重或校准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发一种基于持久同调的封闭式分类方法，提供理论保证和可解释性，避免传统机器学习方法中的权重学习和校准需求。

Method: 使用稀疏地标网格上的 Mitra-Virk 单点坐标函数求和进行嵌入，通过最大化结构失真常数 λ(ν) 获得封闭式权重，实现持久同调特征的分类。

Result: 在 Orbit5k 上是最强的基于图的方法，在 MUTAG 和 COX2 上与最强的拓扑基线在统计噪声范围内匹配；提供了边界风险率、描述符选择规则和预测证书的理论保证。

Conclusion: PLACE 提供了一种具有理论保证的封闭式持久同调分类方法，在多个基准测试中表现良好，但在某些数据集上存在描述符盲区和覆盖限制，预测证书在当前规模下尚不可操作。

Abstract: We introduce PLACE (Persistence-Landmark Analytic Classification Engine), a closed-form pipeline for classifying point clouds and graphs through their persistent-homology signatures. Three quantitative guarantees -- a margin-based excess-risk rate, a closed-form descriptor-selection rule, and a per-prediction certificate -- are derived from training labels alone, with no learned weights or held-out calibration. The embedding sums Mitra-Virk single-point coordinate functions over a sparse landmark grid; closed-form weights maximize a structural distortion constant $λ(ν)$ (a Lipschitz lower bound on $\mathcal{D}_n$ under non-interference). (i) An $O(kR/(Δ\sqrt{m_{\min}}))$ margin bound, driven by class-mean separation $Δ$ and embedding radius $R$, matched by a sample-starved minimax lower bound. (ii) The Mahalanobis margin under Ledoit-Wolf-shrunk covariance is the strongest closed-form descriptor selector on a heterogeneous 64-descriptor chemical-graph pool (mean Spearman $ρ\approx +0.54$ across 10 benchmarks, positive on 9 of 10); the isotropic surrogate $Δ/\sqrt\ell$ admits a closed-form selection-consistency rate on homogeneous (14-15 descriptor) protein/social pools. (iii) A training-time-decided certificate with no per-prediction overhead, in non-asymptotic Pinelis and asymptotic Gaussian plug-in forms. Empirically, PLACE is the strongest diagram-based method on Orbit5k and matches the strongest topology-based baseline within statistical noise on MUTAG and COX2. The remaining gaps fall into two diagnosable regimes: descriptor blindness on NCI1/NCI109, and pool-coverage limits elsewhere. Both radii exceed the firing threshold $\hatΔ/2$ on every benchmark at our training-set sizes, dominated by the $\sqrt\ell$ scaling of the multivariate-norm bound; the per-prediction certificate is constructive but not yet operational at these sizes.

</details>


### [401] [Trust, but Verify: Peeling Low-Bit Transformer Networks for Training Monitoring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02853)
*Arian Eamaz,Farhang Yeganegi,Mojtaba Soltanalian*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种层剥离框架来监控Transformer语言模型的训练动态，通过构建轻量级层特定参考解来诊断未优化层，揭示训练损失无法发现的优化机会。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度神经网络训练在高度非凸的景观中进行，标准指标难以提供层级学习质量的可见性。Transformer语言模型训练昂贵，模型常以冻结形式重用，未优化层会默默降低性能，因此需要更精细的训练监控方法。

Method: 提出层剥离框架，将每个Transformer层针对训练模型的中间表示进行局部优化。通过构建轻量级层特定参考解，并通过不同排列将层投影到多个中间输出，获得可实现的基准线。

Result: 实验显示层参考边界在不同训练阶段能匹配甚至超越训练模型，暴露了聚合损失曲线隐藏的低效性。该分析在二值化和量化设置下仍然有效，能持续区分表面收敛和有效最优性。

Conclusion: 层剥离框架为Transformer训练提供了精细的诊断工具，揭示了仅依赖训练损失无法发现的优化机会，在量化等脆弱训练动态中尤其有价值。

Abstract: Understanding whether deep neural networks are effectively optimized remains challenging, as training occurs in highly nonconvex landscapes and standard metrics provide limited visibility into layer-wise learning quality. This challenge is particularly acute for transformer-based language models, where training is expensive, models are often reused in frozen form, and poorly optimized layers can silently degrade performance. We propose a layer-wise peeling framework for monitoring training dynamics, in which each transformer layer is locally optimized against intermediate representations of the trained model. By constructing lightweight, layer-specific reference solutions and projecting layers onto multiple intermediate outputs via different permutations, we obtain achievable baselines that enable fine-grained diagnosis of under-optimized layers. Experiments on decoder-only transformer models show that these layer-wise reference bounds can match or even surpass the trained model at various stages of training, exposing inefficiencies that remain hidden in aggregate loss curves. We further demonstrate that this analysis remains effective under binarization and quantized settings, where training dynamics are particularly fragile. Across all numerical results, the proposed bounds consistently separate apparent convergence from effective optimality, highlighting optimization opportunities that are invisible when relying on training loss alone.

</details>


### [402] [Unsupervised Machine Learning for Detecting Structural Anomalies in European Regional Statistics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02884)
*Bogdan Oancea*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种无监督机器学习框架，用于检测欧洲区域社会经济统计数据的结构性异常，通过五种异常检测方法识别出与欧盟整体模式显著偏离的区域。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统统计验证工具（如范围编辑、比率检查、单变量异常检测）在识别单个序列的极端值方面有效，但不适合检测高维设置中指标的不寻常组合。需要一种能够识别区域社会经济结构异常的方法。

Method: 使用Eurostat公开数据构建NUTS2区域横截面数据集（2022年），涵盖四个关键指标：购买力平价GDP、失业率、高等教育程度、人口密度。应用并比较五种无监督异常检测技术：单变量z分数、马氏距离、孤立森林、局部离群因子和单类支持向量机。如果一个区域被至少三种方法标记，则被分类为结构性异常。

Result: 机器学习方法识别出一组一致的区域，其多变量特征与欧盟整体模式显著偏离。这些异常区域包括高度发达的大都市经济（布鲁塞尔、维也纳、柏林、布拉格）和具有持续社会经济劣势的区域（中西部斯洛伐克、北匈牙利、卡斯蒂利亚-拉曼恰、埃斯特雷马杜拉），以及特征与欧盟首都区域明显不同的伊斯坦布尔。

Conclusion: 该框架完全可复制、可扩展，且与现有验证工作流程兼容，为欧洲统计系统内早期检测异常区域配置提供了灵活工具。这些异常不一定表示数据质量问题，而是反映了值得分析或政策关注的有意义的结构性差异。

Abstract: Ensuring the coherence of regional socio-economic statistics is a central task for national statistical institutes. Traditional validation tools, such as range edits, ratio checks, or univariate outlier detection, are effective for identifying extreme values in individual series but are less suited for detecting unusual combinations of indicators in high-dimensional settings. This paper proposes an unsupervised machine learning framework for identifying structurally atypical regional profiles within Europe using publicly available Eurostat data. We construct a cross-sectional dataset of NUTS2 regions (2022) covering four key indicators: GDP per capita in PPS, unemployment rate, tertiary educational attainment, and population density. We apply and compare five anomaly detection techniques, univariate z-scores, Mahalanobis distance, Isolation Forest, Local Outlier Factor, and One-Class SVM, and classify a region as a structural anomaly if it is flagged by at least three of the five methods. The findings show that machine learning methods identify a consistent set of regions whose multivariate profiles diverge substantially from the EU-wide pattern. These include both highly developed metropolitan economies (Brussels, Vienna, Berlin, Prague) and regions with persistent socio-economic disadvantages (Central and Western Slovakia, Northern Hungary, Castilla-La Mancha, Extremadura), as well as Istanbul, whose profile differs markedly from EU capital regions. Importantly, these anomalies do not necessarily signal data quality issues; rather, they reflect meaningful structural divergence that warrants analytical or policy attention. The proposed framework is fully reproducible, scalable, and compatible with existing validation workflows, offering a flexible tool for early detection of unusual regional configurations within the European Statistical System.

</details>


### [403] [SpecKV: Adaptive Speculative Decoding with Compression-Aware Gamma Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02888)
*Shikhar Shukla*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SpecKV：一种轻量级自适应控制器，通过分析草稿模型的置信度和熵来动态调整推测解码中的推测长度γ，相比固定γ=4的基线提升56.0%的推理速度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有推测解码系统普遍使用固定的推测长度γ（通常为4），但实际应用中最佳γ值会因任务类型和目标模型压缩程度而变化，需要一种自适应方法来优化推理性能

Method: 通过收集5122个步骤级别的数据，分析草稿模型的接受率、熵和置信度，发现草稿模型置信度和熵是接受率的强预测指标（相关性≈0.56）。基于此训练一个小型MLP作为自适应控制器SpecKV，根据草稿模型信号动态选择每步的γ值以最大化预期token数

Result: SpecKV相比固定γ=4基线提升56.0%的推理速度，每次决策仅增加0.34ms开销（<0.5%的步骤时间），改进具有统计显著性（p<0.001）

Conclusion: SpecKV证明了通过轻量级自适应控制器动态调整推测长度的有效性，能显著提升推测解码性能，特别是在不同压缩程度下。开源了所有分析数据、训练模型和代码

Abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates large language model (LLM) inference by using a small draft model to propose candidate tokens that a larger target model verifies. A critical hyperparameter in this process is the speculation length~$γ$, which determines how many tokens the draft model proposes per step. Nearly all existing systems use a fixed~$γ$ (typically~4), yet empirical evidence suggests that the optimal value varies across task types and, crucially, depends on the compression level applied to the target model. In this paper, we present \textbf{SpecKV}, a lightweight adaptive controller that selects~$γ$ per speculation step using signals extracted from the draft model itself. We profile speculative decoding across 4~task categories, 4~speculation lengths, and 3~compression levels (FP16, INT8, NF4), collecting 5,112 step-level records with per-step acceptance rates, draft entropy, and draft confidence. We demonstrate that the optimal~$γ$ shifts across compression regimes and that draft model confidence and entropy are strong predictors of acceptance rate (correlation~$\approx 0.56$). SpecKV uses a small MLP trained on these signals to maximize expected tokens per speculation step, achieving a 56.0\% improvement over the fixed-$γ$=4 baseline with only 0.34\,ms overhead per decision ($<$0.5\% of step time). The improvement is statistically significant ($p < 0.001$, paired bootstrap test). We release all profiling data, trained models, and notebooks as open-source artifacts.

</details>


<div id='cs.RO'></div>

# cs.RO [[Back]](#toc)

### [404] [LiDAR for Rehabilitation: A Comprehensive Survey of Applications, AI Techniques, and Future Directions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00879)
*Soumia Siyoucef,Najmeddine Dhieb,Hakim Ghazzai,Eleonora Guanziroli,Franco Molteni,Gianluca Setti*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文综述了2019-2025年间LiDAR在康复医疗中的应用，包括3D体态扫描、步态分析、机器人辅助康复、实时监测、环境扫描和活动识别等方面，并分析了基于学习的处理技术、统计趋势和研究空白。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统康复监测技术如基于摄像头的系统存在隐私问题，可穿戴传感器则可能不舒适且易出错。LiDAR技术具有优势，但在康复领域的应用缺乏系统综述，需要全面梳理当前方法、AI处理技术和未来挑战。

Method: 对2019-2025年间发表的LiDAR在康复、伤后护理和医院环境应用的研究进行系统综述，涵盖多个应用领域，分析处理技术特别是基于学习的方法，并进行统计分析和趋势识别。

Result: 这是首篇专门针对LiDAR在康复应用中的全面综述，系统梳理了当前方法、AI处理技术，并识别了研究趋势、空白和未来的研究方向。

Conclusion: LiDAR在康复领域展现出巨大潜力，但需要更多研究来克服技术挑战，探索新的应用场景，并开发更高效的AI处理算法，以推动该技术在临床实践中的广泛应用。

Abstract: Rehabilitation aims to help patients with limited mobility regain their physical abilities through targeted movements, exercises, stimulation, and other therapeutic methods. Recent advances in technology have introduced sensor-based systems into rehabilitation and clinical practices, enabling real-time monitoring and providing accurate feedback on movement accuracy. Among these sensors, LiDAR has demonstrated strong potential, offering key advantages over conventional techniques such as camera-based systems, which raise privacy concerns, and wearable sensors, which can be uncomfortable and prone to errors. In this work, we review the applications of LiDAR in rehabilitation, post-injury care, and hospital environments, focusing on studies published between 2019 and 2025. Studies across several areas have been explored: 3D body scanning and gait analysis with standalone LiDAR, LiDAR mounted on robotic systems for rehabilitation, real-time monitoring and environment scanning for safe navigation, and activity and position recognition. We also analyze processing techniques, particularly learning-based approaches, and support the discussion with statistical analysis, highlighting trends, gaps, and future research opportunities. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first comprehensive survey dedicated to LiDAR for rehabilitation applications, providing an overview of current methods, AI-based processing techniques, and open challenges.

</details>


### [405] [ARIS: Agentic and Relationship Intelligence System for Social Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00943)
*Stavya Datta,Fucai Ke,Leimin Tian,Hamid Rezatofighi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ARIS是一个用于社交机器人的代理AI框架，通过统一多模态推理、基于图的社会世界模型和检索增强生成，显著提升了机器人的社交互动能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前社交机器人系统在多轮互动、社会关系推理和上下文对话方面存在不足，需要更先进的框架来提升社交机器人的智能水平和互动质量。

Method: 开发了ARIS框架，包含三个核心组件：社会世界模型（基于知识图谱映射和更新用户社会关系）、高效的RAG对话管道（保持有界延迟）、以及通过结构化API协调语音、视觉和物理动作的模块化代理架构。

Result: 在Pepper机器人上的用户研究（N=23）显示，ARIS相比大型语言模型基线，在感知智能、生动性、拟人化和喜爱度方面均有显著提升。

Conclusion: ARIS通过整合社会关系建模、高效对话管理和模块化架构，为社交机器人提供了更强大的社交互动能力，并将开源发布以促进该领域发展。

Abstract: Foundational models have advanced social robotics, enabling richer perception and communicative interaction with users. However, current systems still struggle with multi-turn engagement, social-relationship reasoning, and contextually grounded dialogue at scale. We present ARIS (Agentic and Relationship Intelligence System), an agentic AI framework that unifies multimodal reasoning, a graph-based Social World Model, and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) within a single modular architecture for social robots. We evaluate ARIS with the Pepper robot in a robot-mediated dyadic conversational setting, comparing it against a large language model baseline. A user study (N=23) shows that ARIS yields significantly higher perceived intelligence, animacy, anthropomorphism, and likeability. Our contributions are threefold: (1)~a Social World Model that explicitly maps and updates social relationships between users through a knowledge graph, enabling social reasoning and re-identification across encounters; (2)~an efficient RAG-based conversational pipeline that maintains bounded latency as dialogue histories grow to thousands of exchanges while preserving response relevance; and (3)~system integration and empirical validation of these components within a modular agentic architecture that coordinates speech, vision, and physical action through structured APIs. The implementation of ARIS will be released as open source upon publication.

</details>


### [406] [Ablation Study of Multimodal Perception, Language Grounding, and Control for Human-Robot Interaction in an Object Detection and Grasping Task](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00963)
*Zi Tian,Guanting Shen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 对多模态人机交互系统进行控制性消融研究，分析三大模块（语言模型、感知系统、控制器）对端到端性能的影响，通过比较不同配置找出影响执行时间和成功率的关键因素。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 本文旨在通过系统性的消融研究，明确多模态人机交互系统中各个模块对整体性能的具体贡献，为未来系统优化提供工程指导。

Method: 比较了3种语言模型、5种感知配置和3种控制器，进行两阶段因子研究：先分别评估各模块，再对最优候选组合进行端到端评估。

Result: 通过消融实验揭示了各模块对执行时间和成功率的不同影响，识别出对系统性能影响最大的关键组件，明确了未来工程优化的重点方向。

Conclusion: 该研究为多模态人机交互系统的模块选择提供了实证依据，帮助工程师在系统设计时做出更明智的组件选择决策，以平衡执行时间和成功率。

Abstract: This manuscript extends our previous multimodal human-robot interaction system by introducing a controlled ablation study of the three modules that most strongly influence end-to-end performance: the large language model used for action extraction, the perception system used for visual grounding, and the controller used for motion execution. The goal is not to redesign the full pipeline, but to isolate the contribution of each component under a common experimental protocol and then evaluate the best combinations end-to-end. We therefore compare three language models, five perception configurations, and three controllers, followed by a second-stage factorial study over the best candidates. The resulting analysis is intended to clarify which choices primarily affect execution time, which primarily affect success rate, and where the largest engineering gains are likely to come from in future revisions of the system.

</details>


### [407] [Value Functions for Temporal Logic: Optimal Policies and Safety Filters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01051)
*Oswin So,William Sharpless,Sylvia Herbert,Chuchu Fan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 论文研究无限时域无折扣设置下，时序逻辑规范的最优策略问题，解决了贪婪最大化Q函数可能导致无限期推迟任务完成的问题，提出了基于状态历史的非马尔可夫策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在无限时域无折扣设置下，对于复杂时序逻辑任务（如嵌套Until、Globally等规范），贪婪最大化Q函数可能导致策略无限期推迟任务完成，即使值函数是最优的。现有方法在基本到达、避免和到达-避免问题上表现良好，但对于更复杂的时序逻辑规范，值最优性和策略最优性之间的关系变得微妙。

Method: 基于最近将时序逻辑值函数分解为构成值函数图的结果，构建基于状态历史的非马尔可夫策略，避免贪婪最大化Q函数的病理问题。证明这些策略对于嵌套Until、Globally和Globally-Until规范的定量鲁棒性分数的最优性。还将Q函数作为复杂时序逻辑规范的安全过滤器。

Result: 提出了能够避免无限期推迟任务完成的非马尔可夫策略，并证明了它们对于复杂时序逻辑规范的最优性。扩展了先前仅限于简单避免或到达-避免任务的结果，将Q函数作为复杂时序逻辑规范的安全过滤器。

Conclusion: 对于复杂时序逻辑规范，基于状态历史的非马尔可夫策略能够解决贪婪最大化Q函数导致的病理问题，确保策略最优性。该方法为无限时域无折扣设置下的时序逻辑控制提供了理论保证和实用工具。

Abstract: While Bellman equations for basic reach, avoid, and reach-avoid problems are well studied, the relationship between value optimality and policy optimality becomes subtle in the undiscounted infinite-horizon setting, particularly for more complicated tasks. Greedily maximizing the Q-function can produce policies that indefinitely defer task completion for reach-avoid problems, or equivalently, Until specifications, even when the value function is optimal. Building upon recent results decomposing the value function for temporal logic (TL) into a graph of constituent value functions, we construct non-Markovian policies based on state history that avoid this pathology and prove their optimality with respect to the quantitative robustness score for nested Until, Globally, and Globally-Until specifications. We further show how the Q function can serve as a safety filter for complex TL specifications, extending prior results beyond simple avoid or reach-avoid tasks.

</details>


### [408] [Online Safety Filter for Deformable Object Manipulation with Horizon Agnostic Neural Operators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01069)
*Jiaxing Li,Hanjiang Hu,Zhuoyuan Wang,Yorie Nakahira,Changliu Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于可变形物体操纵的在线安全过滤器，通过最小化修改名义控制策略来实时强制执行明确的任务级安全约束，结合神经算子和边界控制屏障函数实现实时安全认证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于学习的方法通过奖励塑造间接编码安全性，无法保证部署时的约束满足。可变形介质（流体、布料、软物体）的机器人操纵任务需要直接的安全约束保证。

Method: 结合两个关键组件：1）无时间范围神经算子，学习底层PDE动力学的边界输入输出映射，无需重新训练即可泛化到不同滚动长度；2）边界控制屏障函数，通过轻量级二次规划在任务相关输出级别认证安全性。

Result: 在FluidLab的流体操纵任务中评估，安全过滤器将安全轨迹率提高了高达22%，同时减少了到达安全集所需的步骤数，证明约束驱动的安全强制执行比奖励塑造方法更可靠和高效。

Conclusion: 提出的约束驱动在线安全过滤器能够实时强制执行可变形物体操纵任务的安全约束，通过神经算子和边界控制屏障函数的结合，实现了比传统奖励塑造方法更可靠和高效的安全保证。

Abstract: Safety critical control of robotic manipulation tasks involving deformable media such as fluids, cloth, and soft objects remains challenging because existing learning based approaches encode safety indirectly through reward shaping, which provides no guarantee of constraint satisfaction at deployment. We present a constraint driven online safety filter for deformable object manipulation that enforces explicit task level safety constraints in real time by minimally modifying any nominal control policy. Our approach combines two key components: a horizon agnostic neural operator that learns the boundary input output mapping of the underlying PDE dynamics and generalizes across variable rollout lengths without retraining, and a boundary control barrier function that certifies safety at the task relevant output level via a lightweight quadratic program. The resulting safety constraint is affine in the boundary input rate, enabling real time online filtering. We evaluate the proposed method on fluid manipulation tasks in FluidLab, where the filter improves safe trajectory rates by up to 22% over unfiltered base policies while also reducing the number of steps required to reach the safe set, demonstrating that constraint driven safety enforcement is both more reliable and more efficient than reward shaping approaches.

</details>


### [409] [Sentinel-VLA: A Metacognitive VLA Model with Active Status Monitoring for Dynamic Reasoning and Error Recovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01191)
*Wenhao Li,Xiu Su,Yichao Cao,Hongyan Xu,Xiaobo Xia,Shan You,Yi Chen,Chang Xu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Sentinel-VLA是一种配备主动"哨兵"模块的元认知视觉语言动作模型，通过动态推理和错误恢复机制提升任务执行鲁棒性，采用自动生成数据和自演化持续学习算法，在真实世界实验中比SOTA模型PI0提升30%以上成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前VLA模型在推理能力、状态监控和自我纠正方面存在局限，需要更智能的监控和动态调整机制来提升任务执行鲁棒性。

Method: 1) 引入主动"哨兵"模块监控实时执行状态，仅在必要时触发动态推理或制定错误恢复方案；2) 通过设计管道自动生成和标注所有训练数据（44个任务，260万次转换）；3) 提出自演化持续学习算法识别能力边界并自动收集扩展数据；4) 使用正交持续适配器将参数更新约束到正交空间，防止灾难性遗忘。

Result: 在真实世界实验中，Sentinel-VLA相比SOTA模型PI0将任务成功率提升了30%以上，展示了显著的性能改进。

Conclusion: Sentinel-VLA通过元认知监控和按需推理机制有效解决了VLA模型在推理、监控和纠错方面的挑战，结合自动数据生成和持续学习算法，实现了鲁棒的任务执行性能提升。

Abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have advanced the field of embodied manipulation by harnessing broad world knowledge and strong generalization. However, current VLA models still face several key challenges, including limited reasoning capability, lack of status monitoring, and difficulty in self-correction. In this paper, we introduce \textbf{Sentinel-VLA}, a metacognitive VLA model equipped with an active ``sentinel'' module to monitor real-time execution status. Only when necessary, such as during initial planning or upon detecting an error, the model triggers a dynamic reasoning or formulate error recovery solutions. This on-demand reasoning mechanism ensures robust decision-making while minimizing computational overhead. Notably, all training data (spanning 44 tasks and over 2.6 million transitions) is automatically generated and annotated through our designed pipeline. We also propose the Self-Evolving Continual Learning (SECL) algorithm, which allows Sentinel-VLA to identify its capability boundaries and automatically collect data for expansion, paired with Orthogonal Continual Adapter (OC-Adapter) to constrain parameter updates to an orthogonal space, thereby preventing catastrophic forgetting. Real-world experiments demonstrate that Sentinel-VLA boosts the task success rate by over 30\% compared to the SOTA model, PI0. We will open-source all the code, weights, and data generation pipeline.

</details>


### [410] [VLA-ATTC: Adaptive Test-Time Compute for VLA Models with Relative Action Critic Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01194)
*Wenhao Li,Xiu Su,Dan Niu,Yichao Cao,Hongyan Xu,Zhe Qu,Lei Fan,Shan You,Chang Xu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出VLA-ATTC框架，为视觉-语言-动作模型增加自适应测试时计算，通过不确定性触发"认知离合器"在需要时从反射执行切换到深思熟虑阶段，显著提升复杂场景下的决策质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前VLA模型依赖快速本能决策，缺乏深思熟虑，在复杂或模糊场景中容易产生次优甚至灾难性动作。需要一种机制让模型能够根据需要调整计算资源进行更审慎的决策。

Method: 1) 基于不确定性的"认知离合器"动态切换反射执行和TTC深思阶段；2) 相对动作评判器通过成对比较从候选动作中选出最优动作，避免不稳定的绝对值估计；3) 高效采样策略分摊计算成本；4) 自动化数据管道无需人工标注生成偏好对。

Result: 在LIBERO-LONG基准测试中，VLA-ATTC将最先进模型PI0.5的失败率降低了50%以上。代码和权重将开源。

Conclusion: VLA-ATTC通过自适应测试时计算机制，显著提升了VLA模型在复杂场景下的决策质量，将反射执行与深思熟虑相结合，为具身智能体提供了更可靠的决策框架。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have demonstrated remarkable capabilities and generalization in embodied manipulation. However, their decision-making relies on a fast, instinctive process that lacks deliberation. This strategy often leads to suboptimal or catastrophic actions when facing complex or ambiguous scenarios that require greater consideration. In this paper, we introduce \textbf{VLA-ATTC}, a framework that endows VLA models with adaptive test-time compute (TTC). VLA-ATTC employs an uncertainty-based ``cognitive clutch'' to dynamically transition from reflexive execution to a TTC deliberation phase when necessary. During TTC phase, a novel \textbf{Relative Action Critic} (RAC) model identifies the optimal action from generated candidates via pairwise comparisons. This relative mechanism replaces unstable absolute value estimation, significantly simplifying the learning objective. Furthermore, we introduce an efficient sampling strategy to amortize computational costs and an automated data pipeline that curates preference pairs without manual annotation. On the LIBERO-LONG benchmark, VLA-ATTC reduces the failure rate of the SOTA model PI0.5 by over 50\%. We will open-source all the code and weights.

</details>


### [411] [TAIL-Safe: Task-Agnostic Safety Monitoring for Imitation Learning Policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01195)
*Riad Ahmed,Momotaz Begum*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: TAIL-Safe为模仿学习策略提出了一种安全集识别方法，通过李普希茨连续的Q值函数评估状态-动作对的安全性，并在策略提出不安全动作时使用恢复机制引导回安全区域。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有模仿学习策略（如流匹配和扩散策略）在执行任务时对初始条件极其敏感，容易产生累积漂移误差，即使在训练分布内也可能失败。需要一种方法让策略能够判断是否能按演示的方式执行任务，确保在现实环境中安全部署。

Method: 提出基于三个任务无关的短期标准（可见性、可识别性、可抓取性）的李普希茨连续Q值函数，将状态-动作对映射到长期安全分数。该函数的零超水平集定义了经验控制不变集。当策略提出不安全动作时，采用受Nagumo定理启发的恢复机制，通过Q函数的梯度上升引导策略返回安全区域。使用高斯泼溅技术构建高保真数字孪生来收集失败数据。

Result: 在Franka Emika机器人上的实验表明，原本在运行时扰动下会失败的流匹配策略，在TAIL-Safe引导下能够实现一致的任务成功率。

Conclusion: TAIL-Safe为模仿学习策略提供了安全部署的框架，通过识别安全集和恢复机制，显著提高了策略在扰动下的鲁棒性和任务成功率，为实际应用中的安全部署奠定了基础。

Abstract: Recent imitation learning (IL) algorithms such as flow-matching and diffusion policies demonstrate remarkable performance in learning complex manipulation tasks. However, these policies often fail even when operating within their training distribution due to extreme sensitivity to initial conditions and irreducible approximation errors that lead to compounding drift. This makes it unsafe to deploy IL policies in the field where out-of-distribution scenarios are prevalent.
